Name: Grupo Pochteca
Description:
We are a Mexican company with a presence throughout Latin America, dedicated to the marketing of value-added raw materials. We serve more than 40 industrial sectors, including water treatment, mining, food, automotive, oil exploration and drilling, personal care, cleaning, sanitation, and the metalworking industry.

We have a catalog of more than 9,980 products, including both generic and specialty products for each industry. Our logistics network consists of 33 distribution centers in Mexico, 4 in Central America (El Salvador, Costa Rica, Guatemala, and Panama), 17 in South America (Argentina, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru), and 1 in the United States, from which we serve more than 28,330 customers annually in over 500 cities.

We provide specialized technical support backed by 6 quality control laboratories, 17 application research and development labs, and 4 multi-functional labs, where we design customized solutions. We also have the support of leading national and international suppliers in their respective industries, 22.4 million liters of storage capacity, and over 354,700 m² of logistics infrastructure.

Founded in 1988, Grupo Pochteca is a market leader and serves more than 8,000 clients monthly. We hold certifications such as ISO 9001-2008, Clean Industry, and FSC, and we were the first company in Mexico to obtain the NACD (United States) Responsible Distributor Certification. We are currently listed on the Mexican Stock Exchange.

At Grupo Pochteca, we offer the quality, reliability, and support our clients need to strengthen their operations.

We invite you to visit our website to learn more about our products and services: pochteca.net

Name: Tricon Energy
Description:
Tricon Energy is an industry leader in the global trade and distribution market. Founded in 1996, Tricon has grown into one of the largest privately held companies in Houston, Texas, with annual revenues of several billion dollars. We employ talent in nearly forty countries and conduct business in over one hundred.

We add value to our suppliers and customers by providing superior logistics, risk management, financing, and market intelligence services. We originate and market products globally, meeting specific location, quality, timing and volume requirements. We also provide a versatile range of price risk management and contracting alternatives to our clients. Each day, we strive to enhance international commerce through the physical movement and marketing of industrial chemicals, dry bulk, fuels, plastic intermediates, and fertilizers. We are committed to providing our clients and suppliers with streamlined services so they can focus on their core business. With our worldwide team of professionals, we have grown from a business that began with distribution of caustic soda, to a globally recognized company trading and distributing hundreds of products.

Name: WD-40 Company
Description:
Founded in San Diego, California U.S.A. in 1953, WD-40 Company is a publicly traded, global sales and marketing company. The blue and yellow can with the little red top and yellow “shield” carries with it positive brand equity - the brand is memorable, easily recognizable and known for its superiority in quality and reliability to end users across 62 unique channels of trade in more than 176 countries.  Our maintenance products currently make up ~90% of net sales and homecare and cleaning products ~10%.

WD-40 Company's corporate headquarters and Corporate Brand Support Center are located in San Diego.  Our ~500 highly engaged tribe members in our 15 offices throughout the world are caretakers of our brands and innovators of our future.

Our “Why”
We exist to create positive lasting memories in everything we do. We solve problems. We make things work smoothly. We create opportunities.

Our “How”
We create positive lasting memories by cultivating a tribal culture of learning and teaching which produces a highly engaged workforce who live our company’s values every day. 

Our “What”
Our mission is to deliver unique, high value and easy-to-use solutions for a wide variety of maintenance needs in workshops, factories and homes. We market and distribute our brands across multiple trade channels in countries all over the world.

In the company's 70 year history, there has not been a reduction in force.  We work diligently to ensure that our approach to workforce planning and hiring is conservative to ensure sustainable workforce in good times and bad. We invest carefully and our people and take seriously the commitment we make to hiring, developing and retaining. This aligns with our people first strategy: our people are not disposable.

Name: Quimidroga
Description:
Quimidroga S.A. is a company founded in 1944 in Barcelona dedicated to the marketing and distribution of chemical products, whose mission is to contribute to the development of a more sustainable chemical industry. Headquartered in Barcelona and present throughout the Mediterranean Arc, Quimidroga works every day to become the benchmark distributor in Southern Europe.

Quimidroga seeks to be a reference through its way of understanding and developing its activity: constant work, a close relationship with suppliers and clients based on trust and transparency, and a deep knowledge of our activity, which allows us to position ourselves as a company specialised in each of the industrial sectors in which we are present.

The sustained practice of these principles by a team of more than 500 people has made us the undisputed leader in our sector for the Iberian Peninsula and one of the top 10 European distributors. In 2022 Quimidroga registered a turnover of €1 248 million.

Not only does Quimidroga market a wide range of chemical products ranging from basic industrial products or commodities to the most sophisticated specialties, but it is also integrated into the supply chain of clients and suppliers, carrying out all kinds of operations, thanks to its extensive distribution network which has one of the most modern and best equipped Logistics Complexes in Europe. It is also involved in the development of new solutions from its R&D&I laboratories.

Name: Redox Ltd
Description:
Redox markets a range of more than 1,000 different chemicals, ingredients and raw materials, sourced from leading manufacturers throughout the world. Our products are supplied to 170 different industries throughout Australia, New Zealand, Malaysia and the United States. Whatever your chemical raw material or ingredient need, Redox can help.

Our dedicated team of more than 400 employees operate from 16 offices across the globe, with more than 100 convenient storage locations. Redox is well placed to source and supply an extensive range of products. Let us be an integral part of your sourcing strategy.

Starting as a small trader of speciality products in 1965, Redox has grown to become one of the largest chemical, ingredient and raw material distributors in the Asia Pacific region.

A growing business with sales revenue of over $1.258 billion in the financial year 2023, we have ambitious targets and need talented people to get to our goal.

Redox looks for long term partnerships, where shared values and common goals align for mutual benefit.

Our relationships are open, innovative and based on teamwork.

Redox is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the ticker of RDX

Name: Wego Chemical Group
Description:
Wego Chemical Group—a privately owned and operated firm—is a global supplier and distributor of chemicals, minerals, and raw materials. 

We offer a variety of chemical products with diverse applications and uses, servicing a wide range of industrial and distribution markets. Since inception in 1978 our philosophy has been founded upon the sourcing and development of competitive chemical supply originating from the Pacific Rim, with a strong emphasis on China, Taiwan, Korea, Japan, India, and Indonesia.

Name: Bodo Möller Chemie
Description:
Bodo Möller Chemie is one of the leading distributors of speciality chemical products and bonding solutions in Europe. With over 45 years of experience in this field our Core business areas are Adhesives & Sealants, Additives, Polymers and Coatings. With its headquarters in Germany (Offenbach) and subsidiaries in now 24 offices in Europe, Africa and Asia, a production plant in Egypt and a laboratory in Poland, the Bodo Möller Chemie Group has developed into a global operating company.

Bodo Möller Chemie is dedicated to meeting the needs and expectations of customers without compromising its commitment to sustainability. Bodo Möller Chemie is certified according to ISO 9001:2000 and ISO 14001:2005, ISO 18001 and participates actively in the Responsible Care Programme. Bodo Möller Chemie is also a fully assessed company according to ESAD II.

Name: Maha
Description:
Starting with raw materials distribution, we have now ventured into “greener pastures”, not limited to technology and equipment, and also new product innovations.

We dream to build an ecosystem as a sustainable solutions provider, connecting players worldwide with opportunities in Asia and vice versa. Yet we always stay committed to enrich lives with chemistry by sharing knowledge, fostering bonds, and promoting sustainability.

It’s always about growth, and we are here to help you accelerate it.

We are Maha, your preferred partner from Asia.

Visit us: www.maha.asia

Name: Stavian Talent
Description:
Founded in 2009, with the vision to become the leading industrial, multi-national Fortune Global 500 company.

Stavian Group is committed to achieving sustainable development, contributing to the national and global community development and demonstrating social and environmental responsibilities.

Our product and services such as Chemical & Petrochemicals, Paper, High-Tech Materials, Recycling & Circular Economy, Logistics, Industrial Park Development, Venture Capital, Industrial Metal...

Stavian Group extends to over 100 countries and territories, serves more than 14,000 global customers and partners. The group operates through nearly 30 offices and 40++ warehouses globally, with a workforce of nearly 2,000 employees domestically and internationally. In 2022, the group recorded approximately $2 billion in revenue.

Prestigious Company ranked Top 22 largest chemical distributors in the world and the Top 6 largest chemical distributors in Asia - the Pacific region (according to ICIS report 2021) and ranked Top 23 in the the Top 500 Largest Private Enterprises in Vietnam (VNR500), Top 1 of Top 10 of Vietnam Excellent Brand Awards 2022 in Processing - Manufacturing Category.

We are proud to be one of the Vietnamese Company honored to receive the “Best Companies to Work for in Asia 2022” voted by HR Asia Magazine, was honored to receive the “Corporate Excellence Award 2022” at the Asia Pacific Enterprise Awards (APEA), "Employer of Choice 2022" by CareerBuilder.vn and "Top 10 Vietnam‘s Best Workplaces in the Energy Industry - Processing - Manufacturing" announced by Viet Research 2023.

Name: Tajchem
Description:
Taj Al Mulook General Trading LLC (Tajchem) is a multinational organization that has been operational for over 36 years. Our head office is in Dubai with a subsidiaries in Netherlands and Saudi Arabia. We are also ISO: 9001 certified with the highest credit rating from Coface and Dun & Bradstreet. The company is head by an experienced board of directors leading a talented group of individuals with extensive knowledge and expertise in the chemical distribution industry.

Our management team is highly experienced and characterized by a clear commitment to profitable, sustainable growth while identifying talent to drive the company towards its objectives. Tajchem supplies chemicals to MEA (Middle East and Africa) regions and caters to a wide range of industries including Polyurethane, Paint Inks & Coating, Rubber, Plastics, Construction Chemicals, Lubricants, Oil & Gas, Petrochemicals, Water Treatment, Ceramics, Food and Feed Ingredients and Industrial & Specialty Chemicals. State of the art warehousing facilities in Dubai, Umm Al-Quwain, Riyadh & Jebel Ali Free Zone enable us to cater to U.A.E, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan and Lebanon and manyothers. We also have a significant presence and customer base in Egypt, Tunisia, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Djibouti, Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, Malawi, Mozambique and Madagascar. Our specialized sales team provides high quality technical & professional services backed by decades of experience.

Centralized warehousing services provide customers with inventory management, local stocks, Hazardous Cargo handling & Transportation services. Backed by professional management and dedicated staff, we are continuously expanding our product portfolio, market reach, and distribution capacity. We have developed strong relationships with suppliers to ensure customers are provided with a consistent supply of quality products at competitive prices even in the most challenging market conditions

Name: YASHAM
Description:
Yasham means success, and as a company, we strive for success in everything we do. Our foundations are strongly built on the promoter’s guiding principles of Trust, Transparency and Humility. Guided by our philosophy – Beyond Chemicals Building Partnership, Yasham, over the years, has earned goodwill from all its associates and business partners. 

Founded in 1997 with a focus on indenting of Pharmaceutical products, we have successfully spread our wings and evolved into different Business divisions namely Pharmaceuticals, Personal Care, Pet Care, Home Care Printing inks and coatings, Veterinary, Exports, Food & Nutraceuticals, and Construction. Yasham offers a range of products with impeccable quality in line with industry standards and regulatory requirements. With more than two decades of experience in the distribution segment, Yasham has a firm grasp on the market and industry trends.  

We have a strong presence across the country with branch offices in key geographies and representatives stationed at multiple geographies. Competent personnel and domain experts in our team, with years of experience, cater to the needs of all kinds of industries. Every member of the team is committed to the common objectives of Yasham and is ready to walk the extra mile to help you achieve your goals. This whole team, consisting of professionals with unquestionable leadership qualities and proven track records, are always at your disposal to serve you.

Yasham today is not only a preferred brand amongst the customers, but also commands immense respect from its suppliers and employees. As we continue to strive for excellence, our ideology is and always will be “Beyond Chemicals Building Partnership”.

Name: Prakash Chemicals Agencies Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Prakash Chemicals was Founded in 1966, we are Global Market Leader in chemical distribution with a product portfolio of over 250+ products and a highly diverse supplier base. 

Embracing a culture of innovation, we have delivered specialized solutions to more than 4,000+ customers across various industries. Our commitment to safety and sustainability has helped us set new benchmarks for entrepreneurial integrity and futuristic thinking.

At Prakash Chemicals, we continuously assess global trends, latest innovations and environmental factors to ensure our product portfolio can meet changing industry needs and challenges. Our portfolio encompasses over 250+ chemicals used across a diverse group of industries including Coatings, Oil & Gas, Food, Pharmaceuticals, Personal Care, Water treatment, Paints, Plastic and Rubber additives, Animal feed, Agro and more.

Name: Mercantil
Description:
Nuestra empresa fue fundada en 1980, convirtiéndose rápidamente en un reconocido proveedor de insumos químicos para la industria minera.

Esta ventana comercial nos permitió ampliar nuestro portafolio de productos, creando las divisiones de Industria, Aguas y Procesos y Laboratorio, consolidando así a Mercantil como socio comercial en el crecimiento y desarrollo de nuestros clientes.

En 2012 se crea Grupo Mercantil, con la finalidad de agrupar a nuestras empresas en una misma marca.

En 2018 Mercantil SA reorganiza sus empresas, quedando 3 divisiones y 5 unidades para la comercialización de todos sus productos.

Misión
Ser una plataforma de desarrollo de nuevos negocios de comercialización de productos industriales 

Visión
Ofrecer productos y servicios de calidad, soportados en una gestión eficiente y un equipo profesional especializado en cada sector para lograr la satisfacción del cliente 
Valores
Estamos comprometidos con alcanzar el éxito comercial dejando una huella positiva en la sociedad, a través del respeto al medio ambiente y la capacitación continua a nuestro personal para estos fines. 

RUC: 20100312736

Name: Química Delta
Description: Distribuimos un extenso catálogo de productos químicos y petroquímicos de alta calidad, cuidando su integridad, garantizando su disponibilidad y entrega oportuna, ofreciendo una grata experiencia de compra y un precio competitivo, que permiten la reducción en el capital de trabajo de nuestros clientes.

Name: METROLAB SA
Description:
METROLAB SA is a leading supplier of laboratory instruments, equipment and consumables in Greece and  one of the market leaders in Chromatography, Endotoxin detection, Tablet testing and Water Testing sectors, having secured a major market share with a vast customer base. The company has a good share in many other fields of Chemistry and Biology like Food Microbiology, Electrochemistry and Spectroscopy.

METROLAB focus on pharmaceutical, food, water, environmental, life science and clinical industry, research institutes and universities markets

METROLAB’s services include sales, system integration, service & maintenance, instrument calibration & validation, user training, application development etc. All services are running under ISO 9001

With main offices in Athens and a network of trusted dealers in the North, West, Mid, and the South of Greece, and in Cyprus, METROLAB successfully cover the whole of Greece and Cyprus. 

The company runs its own logistics with privately owned vehicles and inventory. Logistics, ordering, purchasing and accounting are running effectively on the versatile Microsoft Dynamics Business Solutions Navision ERP environment.  

METROLAB is the distributor of  well known international manufacturers:
LLG, Charles River Laboratories, Distek , Xylem WTW, Thermo Scientific CCS,  SGE Analytical Sciences, YMC, GL SCience, Chrom4, IKA Labortechnik, SI Analytics, IDEXX Water Microbiology, LAB-M, Microgen Bioproducts,   Interscience, Mesa Labs, YL Corporation, GBC Scientific etc

Name: Environ Speciality Chemicals Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Environ is a leading specialty chemicals distributor to the lubricant, polymer, coating, ink, adhesive and sealant industries in India.

It was established in 1995 and operates in India and The Middle East with over 50-100 people working at its facilities in India and The United Arab Emirates (UAE).

Environ represents more than 45 Major Chemical Manufacturers as their Authorised Distributor for the Indian Subcontinent and The Middle East.

Its customers range from global multinational companies to regional and local companies in the lubricant, polymer, coating, ink, adhesive and sealant industries.

Name: RAHN-Group
Description: The RAHN-Group develops and distributes performance materials into highly specialized industries. Our two divisions EnergyCuring and Cosmetics serve the markets of surface technologies and personal care. We pride ourselves of our longstanding tradition as a family operation, our responsible business ethics and a professional service attitude. As a group of eight companies, spanning three continents with 130 employees, we are a global enterprise, yet small enough to still really care for all our individual business partners.

Name: HSH Chemie
Description:
HSH Chemie is the No. 1 Chemical Distributor in Central and Eastern Europe with more than 35 years of experience and 14 sales office locations across CEE.

Founded in 1976, with headquarters based in Hamburg, HSH Chemie is a family-owned company, providing services in more than 20 countries.

With more than 330 employees, the HSH Chemie dynamically improves its market position achieving 288 mio. EUR sales turnover in 2021.

HSH Chemie is offering a wide range of products to five main Industry Focus Groups:

- Coatings, Adhesives & Building
- Personal & Home Care
- Food, Feed & Pharma
- Plastics & Rubber
- Industrial Performance

Our proactive culture, efficient and reliable communication, proficient sales development, high technical competence, professional marketing approach and comprehensive customer care makes us a competent and strategic business partner.

We are an organization that shows responsibility to society and to the environment by being aware of the importance of sustainable development.

We operate in compliance to all environment, safety and health regulations in our region and to the highest quality standards the chemical industry we work with can expect.

Name: Veseris
Description:
Veseris is dedicated to being the preferred choice of professionals by offering the broadest range of products and services to help environmental sciences customers meet every challenge. It supports structural pest control, public health (vector control), wildlife control, animal health, fumigation, turf and ornamental, and vegetation management markets across North America.

In addition to our extensive catalog of products, Veseris is home to industry-leading tools and resources, including ProTraining, 200+ Sales & Service professionals, 75+ ProCenters, and Veseris Inventory Manager. You can learn more about Veseris by visiting Veseris.com. 

To join our team, visit www.veseris.com

Name: Laboratory Scientific Supplies (Life Science and Healthcare Company)
Description:
Laboratory Scientific Supplies is an ISO certified organization that was established in 2000 with the philosophy to offer complete laboratory solutions in the Middle East. LSS management brings wealth of experience to cater Laboratory Market as they have been serving this sector for more than 50 years. The first office was established back in 1965 in East Pakistan. We offer complete laboratory solutions for industries like Pharmaceuticals, Food & Beverages, Water and Waste Water, Chemicals, Industrial etc. Other than that, we also provide services to sectors like Education, Healthcare, Research Institutions, Government Organizations and Testing Laboratories.
LSS only partners with the industry's best known manufacturers to provide you with a wide range of Chemicals, Glassware, Consumables and Instruments. We have built up a reputation for sourcing excellent products that are backed with sound technical advice to our clients. Our friendly sales personnel provide you with information relating to a variety of products and services, product availability, delivery options and any special offers available from LSS. A full time service team comprising highly qualified engineers is also available on call day to day to offer a wide range of servicing options to support your equipment purchases. They specialize in a number of key areas that include installation as well as handling of high precision equipment and chemicals.
We understand how critical it is for you to have the right products at the right time as any delays can bring the whole production process to a halt. To ensure that everything is aligned with your time, cost and quality requirements, LSS also offers project management services to support planning and delivery. Depending on the size and scope of agreement, a project manager can also be assigned who will work with the client to create and execute the project plan.
LSS is now successfully operating in MENA region with offices in UAE, Egypt,  Oman and Pakistan

Name: MTALX Energy
Description:
MTALX Energy is a cross-commodity global physical trading business.
Determined to tackle the some of the world’s toughest challenges: clean energy for all; inclusive global growth; developing a bigger circular economy.

Name: DKSH Performance Materials
Description:
DKSH’s purpose is to enrich people’s lives. For more than 150 years, we have been delivering growth for companies in Asia and beyond across our Business Units Healthcare, Consumer Goods, Performance Materials, and Technology. As a leading Market Expansion Services provider, we offer sourcing, market insights, marketing and sales, eCommerce, distribution and logistics, as well as after-sales services. Listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange, DKSH operates in 36 markets with 33,100 specialists, generating net sales of CHF 11.1 billion in 2021.

The DKSH Business Unit Performance Materials distributes specialty chemicals and ingredients for food, pharmaceutical, personal care, and various industrial applications. With 48 innovation centers and regulatory support worldwide, we create cutting-edge formulations that comply with local regulations. With around 1,370 specialists, the Business Unit generated net sales of CHF 1.3 billion in 2021. www.dksh.com/pm

Name: IMPAG Group
Description:
Impressum:  https://www.impag.com/impressum/

We are an attractive and preferred partner to our customers, providing high quality technical, regulatory and commercial services for all products we distribute. 

The IMPAG Group’s portfolio of products and services makes it an ideal provider of complete solutions. With the support of our extensive partner network, we serve customers in the segments of Nutrition & Health, Personal  and Home Care, Pharmaceuticals, Industrial and Performance Chemicals.

Competence, passion, integrity and respect form the foundation of the value system we integrate into our daily work. The work environment in our modern company makes the best employees want to work here – by supporting them, challenging them and giving them the opportunity to develop. 

Through our customer-centric approach, we work reliably with consistent quality and transparency.

We are continually developing and expanding our sales markets in Europe, and source our products from all over the world.

Let us show you what we can do for you!

Name: Rebain International
Description:
Rebain International is a global supplier of chemical raw materials with over 27 years of experience. Headquartered in Barcelona, Spain, we operate across Europe, Africa, the Americas, and Asia Pacific.

We serve industries including Coatings, Agrochemicals, Personal & Home Care, Food Ingredients, Oil & Gas, and more.

Name: Deimos Italy
Description:
ABOUT US
We are experts in the distribution of food ingredients and chemical specialties for industries operating on the Italian market of life science.

Deimos Group is the result of the aggregation of various companies with a long tradition of distribution for the pharmaceutical, food and cosmetic markets as well as some industrial sectors. 

In order to maintain the strong commercial presence developed through the years, the founders of the previous companies continue to operate in the new group in various roles as partners and consultants.

MISSION
We want to support our partners - customers, suppliers and Principals - by offering them an all-round application, logistics and technical-commercial service, customized and based on years of experience and dedication to quality and sustainability.

VISION
We want to be creators of innovative solutions and professionals in the distribution of ingredients and specialty chemicals for market of life science.

Name: National Coatings & Supplies | Single Source, Inc. (NCS | SSI)
Description:
National Coatings and Supplies | Single Source, Inc. (NCS | SSI) is both family and employee-owned company that distributes industrial paint, coatings, supplies, and equipment to more than 15,000 collision centers, body shops, manufactures, maintenance companies, and individuals across the United States.

Description:
Philosophy

As a family undertaking with a long tradition, we do not think in terms of quarterly results, but instead in generations. We act on the basis of what is good for the company in the long term.

Despite this, we know that the only constant in life is change. As an independent, medium-sized family enterprise we respond innovatively, quickly and flexibly – to our customers’ requirements and to changing markets as well as to ecological challenges. This basic attitude of ours is reflected throughout the entire Group.

View Büfa Principles PDF and video below
Composites

BÜFA Composite Systems is a systems supplier offering innovative, tailor-made composite products, excellent technical service, complete solutions and equipment as well as application expertise.

The extensive range of technologies that are available from BÜFA Composite Systems means an advance in knowledge for manufacturers in the automotive, rail vehicles, wind energy, building and construction, sanitary, tanks and pipes, marine and leisure industries.
Sustainability

At BÜFA Composite Systems we are targeting an over 50% share of cobalt-free products in our portfolio.

We are working in various areas to design our products more sustainably. Since last year we have been using an eco-resin consisting of up to around 40 per cent recyclable materials as a raw material.

In a range of projects we are working on styrene-free systems that help processors to reduce emissions and contamination with VOC (volatile organic compounds). A further example of VOC avoidance is the BÜFA-AE-Cleaner, a highly effective cleaning agent that users accept as a substitute for conventional cleaning agents such as acetone.

In addition BÜFA Composite Systems has developed a “BÜFA foaming resin complete system”. By foaming the material we can reduce component weights by up to 45%.

Der Partner des Fachhandels

Fachhändler sind bei beko richtig, wenn es um höchste Qualität, optimale Verkaufsunterstützung, individuelle Betreuung und faire Preise geht. Von professionellen Klebstoffen, spezialisierten Dichtstoffen über Aerosole bis hin zu Terrassenunterkonstruktionen und vielem mehr werden Sie bei beko bestens beraten. Name: Next Materials
Description:
Next Materials is a new company focused on giving unused chemicals a second life. We source recycled materials, surplus stock, and products that would normally be discarded due to oversupply, plant closures or bankruptcies. Instead of allowing these materials to become waste, we recover them, qualify them and place them back into productive use.

Our goal is simple. Reduce waste in the chemical industry and create value from materials that still have full industrial potential. By applying the principles of the circular economy, we help manufacturers lower raw material costs, improve sustainability performance and access reliable alternative supply.

Next Materials works across Europe and surrounding regions to identify available inventories, ensure proper handling and documentation, and deliver practical solutions for customers who want cost efficiency and a lower environmental footprint.

Next Materials turns unused materials into new opportunities and supports a cleaner and more responsible chemical supply chain.

Name: VIBA Fasteners & Bonding
Description:
Welkom bij VIBA!

Met een rijke historie van 80 jaar is VIBA een autoriteit in de wereld van de techniek. Wij leveren maatwerk met een uiteenlopend assortiment bevestigingsoplossingen, maar ook met ons complete programma voor de luchtvaart- en automotive industrie. Daar zijn we van oudsher op een vernieuwende manier goed in: met beproefde technieken en innovatieve oplossingen.

Bevestigingsoplossingen

VIBA is gespecialiseerd in mechanische en chemische bevestigingsmaterialen voor industrie en bouw. Als onafhankelijk provider vinden of ontwikkelen wij altijd de beste oplossing voor onze partners, in samenwerking met de grootste leveranciers van A-merken. De kwaliteit en de levensduur van verbindingen staan daarbij voorop. Bovendien hebben wij de kennis en de apparatuur in huis om voor elke situatie trek-, pel-, druk- en afschuifsterkten te bepalen en veroudering te simuleren en hierover gedetailleerd te rapporteren.

Tooling en composieten

VIBA biedt mallenbouwers, gieterijen en composietverwerkers een uitgebreid programma op het gebied van tooling en composieten, met onder meer oppervlakteharssystemen, lamineer- en gietsystemen, modelpasta's, parts in minutes, polyurethanen, blokmaterialen, lossingmiddelen, glas- en carbonvezels en polyesters.

Luchtvaart- en hightechindustrie

Met gespecialiseerd gereedschap en toegepaste bevestigingssystemen neemt VIBA een unieke plaats in binnen de lucht- en ruimtevaartindustrie. Bovendien ontwikkelen wij oplossingen voor de defensie-, de maritieme en de hightechindustrie.

Automotive

Samen met dochter MAD zorgt VIBA ervoor dat alle autowerkplaatsen in Nederland hun klanten kunnen bedienen. Wij leveren onder meer producten voor autoruitreparatie, onderhoudsmiddelen, veiligheids-schoenen, trekhaken en fiets- en dakdragers.

MAD ontwikkelt en verkoopt wereldwijd remservice-equipment, veer- en beladingssystemen.

Description:

What can we offer?
• Independent benchmarking and supply of APIs, excipients and FDFs for current and future business.
• Information management on market developments and product changes.
• Support with regulatory and documentation issues from launch to commercial implementation.
• Stockpiling as part of supply contracts and timely deliveries.
• Organization of joint meetings with manufacturers and customers at trade fairs and trips.
• Support and organization of necessary quality audits (including EU GMP audits).
• Evaluation of possible contract manufacturers.

Who are we?
Highly motivated and pharma business addicted people, with 14+ years of experiences in business development, purchasing and sales. Active as independent API specialists in the field of identify savings potential, based on benchmarking, deep data analysis, network and know-how. Positive and strategically thinkers, always friendly and helpful with strong communicative and social skills. Driven to widen the network and building up valuable relationships to partners, focussing on different people and cultures.

Have we piqued your interest?

Name: REDOX ANGOLA

Description:
Bestek İnşaat Elektronik İthalat ve İhracat San. ve Tic. Ltd.Şti 2003 yılında Ankara'da kurulmuştur. Alanında lider global bir oyuncu olan 3M firması ile başladığı ticari faaliyetlerine, 18 senedir 3M iş ortağı olarak devam etmektedir. 2021 yılından itibaren de iş birliklerinin sayısını arttırarak, Lohmann, Fischer ve Enimac markalarının Türkiye distribütörlüğünü alarak ürün ve hizmet gamını genişletmiştir.

Firmamız, 3M distribütörü olarak, tüm Türkiye'de birçok sanayi kuruluşunun ve üretim yapan firmaların çözüm ortağı olma misyonu ile hareket etmektedir. 

Başta, 3M endüstriyel yapıştırıcı ve bant ürün grubu olmak üzere, 3M elektrik&elektronik ürünleri, 3M yapı&mimari ürünleri, 3M havacılık&otomotiv ürün grubu ve 3M iş güvenliği&zımpara ürün grupları olmak üzere son derece kritik ve değerli bir portföy ile çalışmaktadır. 

Ankara yanı sıra, İstanbul ve İzmir'deki şubeleriyle, yüksek stok kapasitesi, hızlı ve zamanında sevkiyat gücüne ilaveten, yarı mamul işleme (kesim-aktarım-özel işlem operasyonları) imkanlarını da üreticinin hizmetine sunmaktadır. 

Ülke geneline yayılmış tecrübeli ve teknik bilgi sahibi satış kadrosu ve alt bayileri ile müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarını anlayıp en verimli şekilde çözmek için tüm imkanları ile yeni yatırımlar yapmaktadır.  

Aktif satış ekibi iş ortaklarının ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda numune denemeleri ve uygulama eğitimleri ile müşteriye doğru yerde doğru ürünü sunarak müşteri memnuniyetini en üst seviyeye çıkarmaktadır.

Üreticinin yanında olarak, 16 yıldır öğrendiklerini yine kıymetli paydaşları için kullanmaya devam eden firmamız, ülkemizin gelişimine katkıda bulunabilmek için birçok pazar ve sektörde aranan bir tedarikçi durumundadır.

Paydaşları ve iş ortaklarından aldığı güç ve motivasyonla sanayi ve üreticinin yanında olmaktan gurur duyuyor ve birlikte büyüyoruz.

Name: Ecovar Group
Description:
Ecovar is the leading distributor of professional pest solutions, delivering trusted expertise, innovative products, and exceptional service to help your business thrive.

In today’s fast-paced world, where product quality, efficient distribution, and reliable after-sales support are crucial to success, Ecovar stands as your trusted partner. We provide tailored solutions that simplify operations, enhance efficiency, and empower businesses across the UAE and Saudi Arabia.

Since 2008, we have collaborated closely with global manufacturers and local professionals to ensure our partners have access to the most effective, science-backed solutions. Driven by a commitment to quality, innovation, and long-term partnerships, Ecovar continues to shape the future of pest control distribution in the region.

In 2010, Ecovar founded PestWorld East conference in Dubai in collaboration with the National Pest Management Association NPMA. PWE is a specialized conference designed to address challenges and provide education that focuses primarily on the specific issues and challenges pest control professionals encounter daily. More than 500 industry professionals from 55+ countries attend this bi-annual conference.

Cada uno de nuestros clientes es la clave de nuestro éxito y es por eso que nuestros servicios de apoyo son muy importantes. Estamos investigando de forma permanente buscando la mejora continua de las aplicaciones de nuestros clientes, por lo que ofrecemos actualizaciones regulares que le permiten estar siempre a la vanguardia en su negocio.

Como empresa referente en el mercado de adhesivos, selladores y tratamientos de superficiales podrá acceder a nuestra exclusiva y completa gama de productos premium, beneficiarse de nuestra experiencia y garantizar la máxima fiabilidad en sus procesos.

Automoción

Industria Ferroviaria
Industria Marina
Transporte Comercial
Sector Energético (eólica, fotovoltaica, nuclear)

En Antala nos complace ser el representante en España, Portugal, Reino Unido e Irlanda del grupo DGE - Smart Specialty Chemicals, compuesto por empresas distribuidoras de productos químicos especializados con presencia en toda Europa.

Name: INSUQUIM Part of Barentz
Description:
La alianza creció
Ahora somos Barentz y te invitamos a crecer con nosotros
A lo largo de décadas, en Insuquim S.R.L. hemos construido relaciones sólidas y de confianza con nuestros clientes y socios. Hace un año, dimos un paso decisivo al unir nuestra historia a la de un grupo global.
Barentz, distribuidor global de soluciones de ingredientes especiales para los sectores de Nutrición Humana, Nutrición Animal, Farmacéutico, Cuidado Personal y Cuidado del Hogar, así como de Performance Materials. buscaba en Paraguay una empresa con la misma visión del mundo: enfoque en la calidad, la innovación y las relaciones cercanas.
Desde esta integración, hemos vivido un ciclo de crecimiento que amplió nuestro portafolio, fortaleció nuestras capacidades técnicas y logísticas, y abrió nuevas oportunidades para ofrecer aún más valor a cada cliente.
Ahora damos un paso más: el equipo que ya conoces y en el que confías pasa a actuar oficialmente bajo el nombre Barentz.
¿Qué significa esto para ti como cliente?
•	Tu próxima innovación puede llegar desde más de 70 países.
•	Acceso a un portafolio global con miles de productos y soluciones exclusivas.
•	Conexión con una red de aproximadamente 2.800 especialistas en todo el mundo.
•	Apoyo técnico y comercial respaldado por una estructura global, con una facturación aproximada de €2,3 mil millones y más de 27.000 clientes atendidos.
Si tienes alguna duda, contacta a tu representante. Si no la tuvieras, te invitamos a entrar en contacto para conocer las novedades que se estarán presentando próximamente.
Avancemos juntos hacia esta nueva etapa!

Name: Altiras
Description:
Altiras is dedicated to the beneficial reuse of chemicals and petroleum products.  We develop sustainable solutions for secondary chemicals and fuels, deriving value from materials that would otherwise be waste.  

Altiras Chemicals develops reuse markets for sustainable chemical co-products, by-products, and already used chemicals, collectively known as "secondary chemicals."  Altiras Chemicals utilizes its chemical and market know-how to develop innovative new markets to effectively distribute secondary chemicals, eliminating waste and delivering improved economic value with minimal risk.  Altiras Chemicals is the industry leader in secondary chemical product stewardship. Altiras Chemicals also offers recycling services where appropriate. 

Altiras Fuels buys upstream, midstream, and downstream fuel co-products, by-products, and off-spec materials.  Altiras Fuels processes, distributes or blends virtually all fuel products to meet market specifications.  Altiras Fuels also has vacuum distillation capabilities to separate specific fuel mixtures, where needed.  The company excels in its logistics and distribution capabilities, enabling efficient multi-modal movements for specific projects.

Name: Matar S.r.l.
Description:
Matar S.r.l. è un'azienda italiana fondata nel 1980 sulla base dell'esperienza maturata nel settore dei gas compressi e liquefatti.
Il suo core business è incentrato sulla commercializzazione di bombole e accessori per ogni tipo di applicazione, dalle tradizionali bombole in acciaio alle bombole in lega di alluminio e materiali compositi.

Matar S.r.l. è un distributore autorizzato di Luxfer Gas Cylinders, azienda leader nella produzione di bombole in lega di alluminio e materiali compositi.
Negli ultimi anni per soddisfare le esigenze dei propri clienti sono state inserite all’interno del portafoglio prodotti bombole in acciaio di produzione Europea costruite secondo standard qualitativi che consentono di aver maggior leggerezza e migliori performance.

Grazie alla sua vasta esperienza, Matar S.r.l. è presente in tutti i settori applicativi: industriale, medicale, antincendio, alimentare, subacquea, SCBA e sistemi di trasporto e stoccaggio gas (ad esempio, pacchi bombole e ceste porta bombole).

Il suo punto di forza risiede nell'ampio magazzino, sempre rifornito di bombole e relativi accessori, valvole, raccordi, tubi flessibili e tutti i componenti necessari per bombole e sistemi.
Questo vantaggio consente all'azienda di soddisfare rapidamente le richieste dei clienti, con spedizioni rapide ed efficienti in tutti i paesi del mondo.

Matar S.r.l. offre anche servizi post-vendita, collaudo, revisione, rigenerazione e verniciatura delle bombole. Il servizio principale è il collaudo delle bombole che, grazie ad un impianto all'avanguardia, garantisce un controllo sicuro, rapido ed efficiente dell'integrità dei contenitori, consentendone la rimessa in servizio.

La volontà di espansione su nuovi mercati, spinge Matar S.r.l. ad entrare a far parte del gruppo Di Natale – Bertelli S.p.a. leader europeo nel settore oleodinamico.

Name: INSUQUIM S.R.L.
Description:
INSUQUIM se funda un 15 de Junio de 1993 con el principal objetivo de proveer a la industria insumos y productos químicos de primera línea, garantizando su trazabilidad desde el mismo origen hasta el cliente final
Esta apuesta apoyada en prestigiosas marcas comerciales, de las cuales somos Representantes y Distribuidores, hizo que la empresa emergiera y buscara nuevos mercados en la industria, es así que hoy abarcamos además de las tradicionales Farmacéutica y Alimenticia, la industria Cosmética, Domisanitaria, de Nutrición Animal y otros sectores.

Name: PT. Multi Kimia Raya Nusantara (MKR Chemical)
Description:
MKR Chemical was founded in 1974 and has now evolved into a center of chemical information and a complete product supplier in Indonesia. MKR Chemical supplies industrial chemicals, specialty chemicals, reagent chemicals, scientific & lab equipments, solvents, adhesives, feed chemical, etc.

Products available include household cleaning products, detergents,  cosmetics, food and fine ingredients, adhesives, additives, industrial alcohols, fertilizers, resins and waxes, silicone, surface coatings, specialty and general chemicals. 

MKR Chemical also provides consulting services and advices for your manufacturing, operations and/or end-product needs. MKR Chemical has a team of chemistry expert specialists providing consultation and in-house product formulations for various industries.

In-house product formulation includes detergent (dish washing, laundry), hand and body soap, anti rust for cars, water treatment, food processing, etc. Our own in-house formulated products offer customers' value and are of high quality compared to off-the-shelf products on the market today.

Name: Zyax Chem
Description:
Zyax Chem is a privately held Indian chemicals and advanced materials company with over five decades of experience in the industrial chemicals, manufacturing and the service industry.

From its headquarters in Mumbai, the company develops, manufactures & trades a wide portfolio of products,offering services and solutions spanning nano tech, stone care, home care, pool care, general chemicals and specialty industrial chemicals.

The company operates on five core pillars that define its approach to product development, services and market leadership. These pillars are Protection, Cleaning, Care, Maintenance and Innovation, the final one being an internal founding principle that drives continuous improvement and new technology development across all business areas.

A defining strength of Zyax Chem is its global partnerships, through which the company brings world class technologies, brands and formulations to India. These collaborations allow Zyax Chem to launch new advanced solutions, international grade coatings and globally benchmarked solutions across its verticals, creating a strong competitive advantage in the Indian market.

Zyax Chem combines formulation R&D, manufacturing, services and brand building under one umbrella, operating multiple verticals and brands; including Vetro Power Nano-Tech Products, Vetro Power Advanced Material Care, Flagstone Fix Stone Care Products & Services, Faber Italy and Zyax Consumer & Digital.

Description:

Our sustainable and well-established global network of partners, clients and suppliers enables us to offer a wide range of innovative products and services. Name: Redox Inc
Description:
Redox markets a range of close to 1,000 different organic and inorganic raw materials, sourced from leading manufacturers throughout the world. Our products are supplied to 200 different industries throughout Australia, New Zealand, Malaysia and the United States. Whatever your chemical raw material or ingredient need, Redox can help.

Our dedicated team of more than 380 employees operate from twelve sales offices across the region, with more than 50 convenient storage locations. Redox is well placed to source and supply an extensive range of chemical products. Let us be an integral part of your sourcing strategy.

Starting as a small trader of speciality products in 1965, Redox has grown to become one of the largest privately owned chemical raw material importers and distributors in the Asia Pacific region.

A growing business with sales revenue of over $1.081 billion in the financial year 2022, we have ambitious targets and need talented people to get to our goal.

Redox looks for long term partnerships, where shared values and common goals align for mutual benefit.

Our relationships are open, innovative and based on teamwork.

Name: Suffolk Sales and Service/ Suffolk Chemical Co./ Suffolk Solutions

Our family business standards are as vital to us today as they were back in 1939.

We look forward to working with you.

As a leading chemical company, we provide raw materials that enhance performance across various industries, including hot melt adhesives, road construction, and water treatment.

Our mission is to empower businesses with superior mineral solutions that drive efficiency, performance, and sustainability. We’re dedicated to producing consistent, reliable products that meet the evolving needs of our partners worldwide.

Global Reach, Local Expertise: Serving businesses globally with tailored solutions and fast, efficient delivery.

We are more than just a supplier—we are a strategic partner committed to helping your business thrive.

Contact us today to explore how our raw materials can enhance your production processes.

Let’s work together to build solutions that last. Connect with us now!

Name: DECACHEM DOO Chemicals Europe Serbia
Description:
Decachem is a leading producer and distributor of purified phosphoric acid, offering technical, feed, and food grade solutions. Our facility in the Industrial Zone of Novi Sad, Serbia, is equipped with state-of-the-art technology to process top-quality raw materials into high-grade phosphoric acid.

With excellent connectivity to major European highways (E-5), significant river routes, and nearby seaports, Decachem is strategically positioned to trade products internationally. We specialize in using superior purification materials such as tributyl phosphate and dibutyl phosphate to enhance phosphoric acid quality, support rare earth metals extraction, and facilitate water purification and other chemical processing activities. These operations are conducted in-house or with our trusted tolling partners.

In addition to phosphoric acid, we supply a wide range of top-quality acids, ADR goods for industrial production, and highly reactive chemicals essential for mining, flotation, and other applications. Safety is our top priority in all our operations and deliveries.

We also focus on sourcing and distributing Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (APIs) and food and feed grade materials, ensuring our customers receive the highest quality products for their diverse needs.

Join us at Decachem, where quality and safety drive our commitment to excellence in the chemical industry.

Our portfolio includes Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (APIs), excipients, and specialty chemicals, sourced from globally certified partners.

*EU-based warehouse stock for rapid delivery

*Documentation and regulatory support (EU-GMP, CEP, DMF)

*Risk mitigation through second-supplier strategies

*Tailored sourcing solutions for niche or hard-to-find materials

Our strengths:

*Flexible minimum order quantities (MOQs)

*Transparent and reliable supply chain management

Name: DKSH FRANCE
Description:
DKSH France S.A. filiale française du groupe de négoce international DKSH, est un leader sur le marché français dans le commerce chimique et la distribution de spécialités chimiques et d’ingrédients.

DKSH France S.A. a été fondée en 1939 à Lyon, sous le nom de Siber Hegner & Cie France, dans le but de fournir à l’industrie locale de la soie brute. Forte d’une implantation Lyonnaise au cœur de la vallée de la chimie, la société a évoluée vers la distribution de matières premières pour l’industrie chimique, au début des années 1980, en synergie avec les autres filiales européennes.

Depuis 1993, la société est basée à Miribel en proche banlieue Lyonnaise aux croisements d’importants axes autoroutiers, à proximité de l’aéroport et de lieux de stockage.

Nous servons avec succès aujourd’hui les industries chimiques, cosmétiques, pharmaceutiques, électroniques et alimentaires avec différentes gammes de spécialité chimiques, d’ingrédients et de produits innovants.
Par ailleurs, nous complétons notre offre avec des produits techniques, machines et instruments.

Name: Markam Petrol Ürünleri İthalat İhracat Limited Şirketi
Description:
Markam Petrol, endüstriyel dünyada mükemmel performansı hedefleyen bir şirkettir.  Yağlayıcılar ve yağ ürünleri konusundaki derin uzmanlığıyla bilinir ve müşterilere yüksek kaliteli ve çevreci ürünler sunar. 

Şirketimiz, endüstriyel tesislerde ve makinelerde verimliliği artırmak, aşınma ve yıpranmayı azaltmak ve uzun ömürlülüğü sağlamak amacıyla özel yağlayıcılar sunar. 

Markam Petrol, müşterilerimizin özel ihtiyaçlarını anlar ve her sektörde başarılı işbirlikleri için özelleştirilmiş yağlayıcı çözümleri sunar. 

Yüksek kalite standartlarına bağlı kalarak ve çevreye duyarlı yaklaşımını sürdürerek, Markam Petrol her zaman müşteri memnuniyetini öncelikli tutar. 

Sektörünün lider bir markası olarak, Markam Petrol, yaratıcılığı, inovasyonu ve mükemmeliği teşvik eder ve müşterilere rekabet avantajı sağlamak için en iyi endüstriyel yağlayıcıları sunar. 

Markam Petrol, güvenilir ve etkili yağlayıcılarla müşterilerine endüstriyel başarıya katkıda bulunan bir iş ortağı olarak tanınır. 

Makinelerinizin en iyi şekilde çalışmasını istiyorsanız, Markam Petrol size ihtiyacınız olan güvenilir ve performans odaklı yağlayıcıları sunmaya hazır. 

Bizimle çalışarak, işletmenizin en iyi performansı sergilemesine yardımcı olabilir ve çevresel uyumluluk konusunda da sorumluluk sahibi olabilirsiniz. 

Markam Petrol: Endüstriyel başarıya giden yolunuzu aydınlatmak için burada!

Name: KEFO Srbija
Description:
Preduzeće KEFO je osnovano 1949 kao preduzeće za uvoz i distribuciju laboratorijskih hemikalija, potrošnog materijala i opreme pod imenom Kemoservis. 1954 se Kemoservis udružio s preduzećem Fotomaterial koje se bavilo uvozom i distribucijom fotografskog potrošnog materijala i opreme. Preduzeće je poslovanje nastavilo pod imenom Kemoservis-fotomaterial.

Do 2001. godine preduzeće KEFO je prošlo restrukturiranje, privatizaciju i promenu imena. Od 2001. godine KEFO je u privatnom vlasništvu. Iste godine je prestalo s distribucijom i prodajom fotomaterijala i opreme. Glavna delatnost preduzeća od tada je prodaja i distribucija svih proizvoda koje pri svom radu upotrebljavaju laboratorije: laboratorijske hemikalije, standardni referentni materijali i laboratorijski potrošni materijal i oprema.
2005. godine KEFO je postao suvlasnik evropskog preduzeća LLG – Laboratory Logistics Group. LLG je drugo najveće evropsko preduzeće za prodaju laboratorijske potrošne robe i opreme. KEFO je kao suvlasnik LLG-a raširio svoj prodajni program laboratorijskim potrošnim materijalom i opremom preko 500 dobavljača. U centralnom skladištu u Meckenheimu (Nemačka) na skladištu je više od 10.000 različitih proizvoda koje nedeljno dostavljamo kupcima. S kompletnim programom KEFO ostvaruje svoj sinonim: KEFO- Svet laboratorija.

2007. godine KEFO je osnovao svoje drugo kćerka preduzeće u Beogradu u Srbiji sa sopstvenim kancelarijama, skladištem, dostavnim vozilima i saradnicima osposobljenim za prodaju hemikalija i ostale robe za laboratorije. 
KEFO PRODAJNI PROGRAM:
- LABORATORIJSKE HEMIKALIJE
- LABORATORIJSKA OPREMA I PRIBOR

Name: Petrochem Portugal
Description:
Desde 1977 com sede em Lisboa, a Petrochem tem como principal actividade o desenvolvimento, produção e comercialização de produtos químicos para a Indústria. 

O Laboratório de Análises Petrochem é acreditado pelo IPAC segundo a norma NP EN ISO/IEC 17025.  Esta acreditação reforça a credibilidade e o controlo de qualidade de matérias-primas e produto acabado.

A Petrochem é certificada pela norma NP EN ISO 9001 para as actividades de “Produção e Comercialização de Produtos Químicos de Higiene e Manutenção Industrial” e “Consultoria, Assistência Técnica e Tratamento de Águas em Equipamentos Industriais”.

Com uma equipa de 40 colaboradores qualificados e com uma unidade fabril própria com capacidade instalada de 7.500 toneladas/ano, a Petrochem dispõe de um vasto know-how, entregas rápidas e uma gama de produtos eficazes, distribuída por três áreas de actuação:
  - Higiene e Desinfecção
  - Manutenção Industrial
  - Tratamento de Águas
Para complementar a nossa oferta, disponibilizamos aos nossos Clientes:
  - Consultoria
  - Análises em Laboratório
  - Soluções Integradas

Sendo Portugal o principal mercado da empresa, as soluções Petrochem estão, no entanto, presentes em países como Angola, Argélia, Cabo Verde, Espanha, Iraque, Líbia, Marrocos e República Democrática do Congo.

Name: KSM, al 65 jaar partner in smering en onderhoud
Description:
KSM, partner in smering en onderhoud, is voor alle industriële sectoren de aangewezen partner voor het optimaliseren van smeertechnische onderhoudsprocessen en het (volautomatisch) ontzorgen van het emulsiebeheer.

KSM is leverancier van industriële smeermiddelen, voedselveilige smeermiddelen en (olievrije) metaalbewerkingsvloeistoffen van wereldmarktleiders als:

•	Castrol: industriële smeermiddelen en metaalbewerkingsvloeistoffen
•	Quaker Houghton: metaalbewerkingsvloeistoffen
•	Shell: industriële smeermiddelen
•	Fuchs Cassida: voedselveilige smeermiddelen
•	Aquaslide: olievrij Triple Clean Verspanen op waterbasis
•	Klüber: industriële smeermiddelen
•	Apiezon: vacuümtoepassingen

Daarnaast biedt KSM een portfolio additionele producten, te weten:

•	Memolub automatische smeersystemen
•	Belki Filtratieapparatuur

Tevens biedt KSM een uitgebreid pakket aan (Fluid Management) services, om zodoende het vloeistofbeheer te optimaliseren.

•	Emulsies 24/7 volautomatisch meten én bijvullen: maakt het voor iedere metaalbewerker mogelijk om 24/7 volautomatisch de pH waardes, geleidbaarheid, concentratie en temperatuur van emulsies te bewaken en stabiel te houden.
•	Olieanalyses
•	Emulsiemetingen
•	Afvoer olie/emulsie
•	Machinereiniging
•	Machinesmering
•	Machining Quickscan
•	Maintenance Quickscan
•	Clean produceren

Onze werkwijze: KSM heeft haar ruim zestig jaar kennis en ervaring gebundeld in de RCL methode. Deze biedt de zekerheid van een gestructureerde aanpak die alle aspecten die van invloed zijn op het resultaat van (smeer)technisch onderhoud en emulsiebeheer in kaart brengt, analyseert en optimaliseert. Bovendien is deze aanpak optimaal afgestemd op de individuele behoeftes, wensen en eisen van iedere klant afzonderlijk. Het resultaat: productiemaximalisatie, een verlaging van risico’s en tot wel 30% kostenbesparingen.

DEKAGRO se bazează pe grupul industrial de îngrășăminte NEA KARVALI (KAVALA), creat la începutul anilor 1960, a cărui reputație internațională și rădăcinile sale euro-elene i-au permis să rămână singurul sit industrial mediteranean din domeniul nutriției plantelor, complet integrat care contribuie la independența Europei și a vecinilor săi apropiați.
DEKAGRO este una dintre puținele companii care pune la dispoziție soluțiile sale speciale de fertilizanți. Datorită flexibilității și know-how-ului echipelor industriale, asigură calitatea producțiilor sale în conformitate cu cele mai exigente standarde internaționale și europene.

With firm commitment to excellence in work Culture and products, HiMedia has its own in-house bulk raw materials manufacturing plant. This enables us to deliver consistent quality products that conform to ISO 9001:2008 and ISO 13485:2003 and WHO: GMP.

La empresa KEYSTONE, C.A; pensando siempre en las partes interesas se compromete en ofrecer una amplia y accesible línea de lubricantes con la mejor relación precio-valor, haciendo todas y cada una de las labores superando los niveles de exigencia, desarrollando nuevas y mejores formas de hacer el trabajo, enfocándonos en la mejora continua de todos nuestros procesos, estimulando así la generación de ideas para luego seleccionarlas e implementarlas.

Nos comportamos y expresamos con honradez, siendo coherentes entre lo que pensamos y hacemos; actuamos con sinceridad de acuerdo con la verdad y justicia. Somos fieles a los compromisos que asumimos, actuando con transparencia en las relaciones organizacionales, manteniendo una actitud profesional frente a las partes interesadas, destacándonos por cumplir con nuestros compromisos asumiendo las consecuencias de nuestros actos.

Reconocemos a las personas como entidad única que necesitan ser valoradas según sus intereses y necesidades, cuidando los derechos, espacios y tiempos del otro demostrando la pasión por el servicio del bien individual y común, participando solidariamente con los sectores más vulnerables de la comunidad.

Nuestros esfuerzos por garantizar un producto de calidad, eficiente y eficaz nos ha llevado a obtener certificaciones nacionales e internacionales como el sello de calidad Norven; norma ISO 9001:2015 respaldado internacionalmente por IQNET; la acreditación de la API (Instituto Americano de Petróleo) y más recientemente la inclusión de nuestros productos de la línea Sky Super Truck Diésel CK-4 Y CI-4 a la lista de lubricantes autorizados por Volvo Mack y Renault.

Hoy la calidad de nuestros productos se mide no sólo por su fuerza de trabajo, procesos y experiencia, sino por la voluntad de seguir innovando y construyendo el futuro que queremos.

Name: Proanalytica d.o.o. Srbija
Description:
Proanalytica je osnovana 2000. godine sa ciljem da kroz visok nivo usluge i podrške korisnicima ponudi širok asortiman laboratorijskih hemikalija, instrumenata i potrošnog materijala. Naše opredeljenje za robu najvišeg kvaliteta, kao i posvećenost kvalitetu usluga, kreiralo je jasan i prepoznatljiv profil firme, rezultiralo njenim kontinuiranim razvojem i stalnim rastom prisustva na tržištu.

Proanalytica doo danas je ekskluzivni zastupnik relevantnih svetskih proizvođača, nudi više od 100 000 proizvoda i pruža usluge po najvišim evropskim standardima.

25 godina kasnije, naš kontinuirani razvoj i rast potvrđen je činjenicom da smo danas deo velike grupacije pod kapom Češke kompanije Lachner, renomiranog proizvođača hemikalija visokog kvaliteta. Udruženo iskustvo, znanje i profesionalizam omogućilo je uspešnu sinergiju u okviru koje ponosno predstavljamo ključnu figuru u implementaciji novih metoda upotrebom naprednih tenhologija naših inostranih partnera, a sve u cilju poboljšanja rada u laboratorijama.

Proanalytica doo je za primarni cilj uvek imala okupljanje i usavršavanje svog tima, kao osnovu za uspešno poslovanje, a upravo jakim i uspešnim timom očuvali smo i nadogradili svoj portfolio te praćenjem inovacija u sferi promocije svog znanja, danas vam možemo predstaviti našu novu platformu koja nudi jasan uvid u ono što smo postigli za sve ove godine.

Prvenstveno smo zahvalni vama, korisnicima naših usluga, jer smo zahvaljujući vašem poverenju i iskustvu bili bolji. Sprega stručne i laboratorijske prakse, sa objedinjenom uslugom s’ naše strane, recept je za kvalitetno poslovanje. Zbog toga smo danas na mestu kojim se ponosimo ali istovremeno vrlo odgovorno održavamo.

Na mapi onih koji brinu o ekologiji i potrebama laboratorija svojski se trudimo da budemo lako uočljivi i to nam je najvažnija misija.

Founded in 1968, Jupiter Dyechem and is a part of the privately held Chokhani Group of Companies. Jupiter Dyechem employs 85 people and is headquart red in Mumbai with 8 sales and operations offices across the country.

Our organization is committed to maintain the highest environment and safety standards in all its operations.

Name: InterAtlas Chemical Inc.
Description:
Chemical manufacturing companies continue to face dynamic issues that impact their supply chain requirements. Our research shows that there are six issues affecting chemical manufacturing company’s supply chain and their ability to compete.

We have identified these six issues as Lack of Security of Supply; Long lead times; Reduced Cash Flow; Cumbersome Logistics and Delays; Complex Risk Management requirements; Lack of Market Knowledge.

By identifying these six issues top chemical manufacturing companies are able to identify relevant suppliers to optimize their purchasing, cash flow, production and sales while maintaining a high level of compliance and customer service. These relevant suppliers have material available from stock, with a truck that is able to deliver on-time to meet production schedules.

InterAtlas Chemical Inc is a chemical distribution company providing materials from various overseas manufacturers from our warehouse in Newark NJ. With a short list of chemicals offered, InterAtlas Chemical works to have material available for delivery to their clients when needed by maintaining a replenishing inventory of their materials.

InterAtlas Chemical offers the following materials: 
Paraformaldehyde | Hexamine | Nonylphenol | Phthalic Anhydride | Pentaerythritol | PTBP | Bisphenol A | Maleic Anhydride |

If you are a Purchasing Manager or Buyer and are looking for a relevant supplier please contact us at 1-905-684-9991 or email us at kevin.lake@interatlaschemical.com.

Name: Xoder Technologies
Description:
The MISSION of our company is to promote human health and quality of life by providing redox expertise and technologies to support discovery, translational and clinical investigations aimed at disease prevention, diagnosis, and treatment.

Our patented technologies are well established and are being used by hundreds of academic and industry groups worldwide.

WHY REDOX?

REDuction and OXidation (combined to form “REDOX”) reactions are at the very core of Life on Earth, or as Albert Szent-Györgyi, the 1937 Nobel Prize winner for discovery of vitamin C, said:

              “Life Is Nothing But An Electron Looking For A Place To Rest”

The most familiar form of biological oxidation essential to life is the oxidation of sugars and fats to extract usable energy and release water and carbon dioxide, a process dependent on oxygen  as the ultimate acceptor for the electrons released from the nutrients. Plants during photosynthesis do the opposite, gathering the sun’s energy and carbon dioxide to generate oxygen and biomass (sugars, proteins, and other biomolecules) that then serve as energy sources for humans and other species.

Why are redox reactions important in medicine?  While the emphasis in this area many decades ago was on “free radicals” and the damage these can impart, it is now clear that both radical and non-radical oxidizing species are important, and they are not only damaging, but also essential for life’s fundamental processes.

While antioxidants are widely known to remove potentially damaging ROS and having beneficial effects, it is now appreciated that the science is much more nuanced, and depending on individual characteristics and disease context, these could in some cases be harmful to health.

Biomedical research to decipher the complexity of human redox reactions is critical and our technologies support these efforts for the advancement of redox medicine.

Description:

Soyventis was born of an ideology - An ideology to create a global chemical supply chain company capable to service the industry with lean costs of an international trading company and deliver products to the doorstep like a distribution company.

We will continue to grow our presence in a systematic and structured way to enable us to operate with a solution based approach.


Why Soyventis:

In this ever shrinking world, it is not difficult to source product internationally, neither is it difficile to organize supply chain across continents. But to be able to accomplish this at the right cost, and sustain it over years, is by far the most challenging task big and small companies face alike.

At Soyventis, we are focused on providing solutions and not just products. With our local presence, we build relationships that last forever. We strive to provide value to our customers and suppliers alike.

Having worldwide sales enables us to provide a global view of the market place. Our agile sales team is always alert to changing micro and macro economic conditions and prompt in sourcing the most difficult molecules. 

We study the most important aspects of international sourcing, like supply chain, regulations, feedstock risks and choose suppliers with integrity, financial stability and the highest standards of quality and environmentally sustainable practices. Name: Reba Scientific
Description:
Why Citric acid Passivation?

Passivation of stainless steel has conventionally been accomplished by immersing the steel in a nitric acid bath.  This process is both hazardous and environmentally unfriendly.

Now, CitriSurf citric acid passivation technology has proven to be a vast improvement over the traditional toxic nitric acid formulations.

Learn More about Passivation for Stainless Steel: https://www.rebaaus.com/passivation-for-stainless-steel

Using citric acid in the passivation of stainless steel might sound like a new concept, however, it was developed years ago in Germany’s beverage industry, where they needed metal containers that were free of iron on the surface.

Not only that, Citric acid is organic, safe and easy to use. When formulated correctly, citric acid provides excellent performance at considerable cost savings. This acid is the same acid found in oranges and other citrus fruits.

What’s more, stainless steel isn’t the only metal that can undergo passivation with citric acid; it can also serve in the passivation of titanium and others.

VECCO e.V. was founded on 9 May 2012 in Seligenstadt with eight electroplating companies and eleven participants.
VECCO e.V. is represented by the following board members:
-FIRST CHAIRMAN
Matthias Enseling
-SECOND CHAIRMAN
Christian Herzog
-TREASURER
Marita Voss-Hageleit

From the very beginning, the focus of the work of VECCO e.V. was on the preparation of the approval dossier for the substance "Chromium trioxide and its aqueous solutions" as well as on the "Use of chromium trioxide in solid form and in aqueous solution of any composition to change the properties of surfaces made of metal and plastic with or without current flow"
and includes the applications
•functional and decorative chrome plating
•decoating
•anodize
•dye
•etch
•electropolishing

The main focus of Vecco e.V. is to support companies that need chromium trioxide and other chemicals as well as various chromates in surface technology and to sustainably and carefully maintain the handling of the substances and to enable them to continue their work!
Furthermore, the VECCO ensures that the social benefit of these substances, especially in surface technology and especially in electroplating, can be maintained in the future!

All products and treatments are designed to lower operating costs, improve processes, and solve difficult issues and problems. Rhule LLC headquarters, located in New Hope Pennsylvania, serves clients in many regions in North America.

Rhule LLC technicians and sales representatives are experienced in both chemistry and equipment for diagnosing issues, recommending solutions, which often results in cost savings and increased effectiveness. Free consultations, both on-site and via phone are available.

Don Rhule is president and CEO of Rhule LLC.

Name: Valpetrol Srl
Description:
Da oltre 30 anni Valpetrol è un punto di riferimento per la vendita di lubrificanti, grassi, prodotti chimici, accumulatori e attrezzature per una vasta gamma di settori, tra cui trazione leggera e pesante, industria, agricoltura e movimento terra.
La nostra azienda si distingue per la capacità di anticipare e rispondere alle esigenze del mercato offrendo una selezione di prodotti, sia commodities che specialities, dei principali leader globali come Gulf, Petronas, Fuchs, Castrol e Sunoco in modo rapido e tempestivo ma soprattutto realmente ottimizzato per ogni specifica esigenza applicativa. 
Valpetrol si impegna a lavorare in stretta collaborazione con i propri clienti, sviluppando soluzioni versatili ed efficaci sia dal punto di vista tecnico che logistico. Grazie alla nostra ampia capacità di magazzino e a una rete strutturata di corrieri nazionali di fiducia siamo in grado di garantire una distribuzione veloce e sicura su tutto il territorio italiano, mantenendo alti standard di precisione e affidabilità.
In un mercato che tende all’omologazione e alla delocalizzazione, noi puntiamo sul supporto diretto e costante del nostro ufficio tecnico altamente specializzato che è sempre a disposizione del cliente per fornire soluzioni tempestive e su misura, grazie alla profonda conoscenza delle applicazioni e dei prodotti.
Valpetrol offre inoltre un servizio di consulenza completa per sviluppare prodotti di lubrificazione personalizzati con caratteristiche specifiche di performance, sostenibilità ambientale e innovazione tecnologica. Attraverso la nostra linea Valpetrol Private Label diamo ai clienti la possibilità di creare linee di prodotti customizzate con il proprio brand, dalla selezione dei componenti alla compliance normativa, dall’etichetta all’imbottigliamento. 
Valpetrol. Soluzioni su misura, al passo con te, per crescere insieme.

Welcome to our company D & D Chemicals.
 Here, we are committed to delivering exceptional quality and service to our clients, continually evolving to meet the demands of a dynamic market.

Since our establishment in 2003 as a trading company, we have grown and diversified, achieving a significant milestone 
In 2006 by extending our business with Delta Hydrocarbons, India. This expansion enabled us to broaden our product range and enhance our capabilities.

In 2012, we were honored to become the exclusive agent for Hubei Color Root Technology Co., Ltd. in Bangladesh, a partnership that has greatly enriched our offerings. Building on this success,
 In 2018, we extended our collaboration to include their affiliate, Chroma (Shanghai) Chem-Tech Co., Ltd. These partnerships have positioned us to provide an extensive range of superior quality products, particularly in the textile sector.

Our dedication to excellence extends far beyond our product offerings. We provide comprehensive technical support through our advanced lab facilities, where our experts are ready to offer tailored solutions and suggestions. We are also dedicated to offering competitive pricing, ensuring that our clients receive the best value for their investment.

Central to our mission is the promotion of eco-friendly and sustainable practices. We are passionately dedicated to minimizing our environmental footprint and fostering a more sustainable future. This commitment is reflected in both our product offerings and our operational processes.

We are grateful for your trust and partnership, and we look forward to continuing to serve you with excellence and integrity.

We are committed to what we do with always an eye on the best solution. 

Welcome to KRAHN CHEMIE!

KRAHN CHEMIE is at home in the world of chemical distribution. For more than 100 years, we have been distributing specialty chemicals to the processing industry in Europe. In our capacity as a long-standing distributing and marketing partner for leading international raw material producers,we offer our customers an extensive, superior product range, technical advice and our own laboratory services. 

KRAHN CHEMIE’S headquarters is seated in Hamburg. Together with our subsidiary KRAHN CHEMIE Polska, KRAHN CHEMIE Benelux in the Netherlands and Pietro Carini in Italy, we are there where our customers are: always on site and always nearby.

KRAHN CHEMIE, with our 160 employees, generated a turnover of about 200 million euros in 2015. 

Our company is part of the OTTO KRAHN (GmbH & Co.) KG holding which incorporates two operational subsidiaries: KRAHN CHEMIE GmbH and ALBIS PLASTIC GmbH. ALBIS PLASTIC focuses mainly on the distribution and compounding of thermoplastics.

Bob’s passion to bring a Canadian owned presence into the industrial gas market and Ben’s frustration with the service available to him as a consumer of industrial gas lead them to form Core Industrial Gases.

Our organization has invested in a system with leading edge technology from the engineers at Cryovation. Core’s mission is to provide high quality industrial gases along with responsive and knowledgeable service to the businesses of Ontario. Each Core location is owner operated by Canadian business people with roots in their communities.

For our customer's convenience, we have three locations: Ajax, Sudbury and Smiths Falls. Stop by, give us a call at 905-683-3232 or check out our Website,  come see the difference independence makes.

Dawn Scientific Inc: Your Scientific Partner -Four Decade Legacy

Dawn Scientific Inc., a woman-owned small business located in the center of New Jersey, has been rendering services to clients since 1982. We deliver high-quality laboratory products, Chemicals, Reagents, Consumables, Equipment, and Instruments, while catering to the unique needs of the individual customer. We have been committed to providing the best to the scientific community for over 40 years.
We serve many industries such as Pharmaceuticals, Life Sciences, Cannabis, Food & Beverage, Cosmetics, Schools and Universities, Oil & Petroleum, Environmental, Contract testing -Analytical Laboratories, and many more. 
Our range of products include:
• Lab Consumable Products: From Flasks to Pipettes, our lab essentials ensure precision and reliability at competitive prices. 
• Lab Chemicals: We provide an extensive range of chemicals for various applications, including R&D, QC, Analytical lab
• Lab Reagents: Ready to use Volumetric, Buffer, Test Solutions, Histological reagents, Standard Solutions, Custom reagents
• High Purity Lab Solvents: Methanol, Acetonitrile, Ethanol, Isopropanol, Acetone, DMF, DMSO, THF, Chloroform 
• Top Suppliers: Partnering with industry-leading suppliers and manufacturers to bring you the best in lab products and chemicals. 
•  Competitive Pricing: Ensuring that quality and affordability go hand in hand.
Our Mission: Human advancement via making global discoveries to end cancer, Alzheimer’s, and heart stroke - just to name a few, is the vision that every one the scientific community strives to achieve. We at Dawn are here to provide and aid our research community by supplying premium laboratory necessities as well as chemicals towards our mission of getting lifesaving research as well as treatments achieved faster. 
Customer Care: Dawn Scientific Inc (1-800-DAWN-SCI) 732 903 6300 For sales inquiries sales@dawnscientific.com#isoCertified#Synthesis#ConsumableGoods
