Name: Hennz
Description:
Su Socio Confiable en Insumos de Laboratorio

Bienvenido a Hennz, su destino principal para adquirir insumos de laboratorio de la más alta calidad. En Hennz, nos enorgullece ser su socio confiable en la búsqueda de soluciones precisas y eficientes para sus necesidades en el ámbito científico.

Compromiso con la Calidad:
En Hennz, entendemos la importancia de la precisión en la investigación y el análisis científico. Por eso, nos comprometemos a ofrecer insumos de laboratorio que cumplen con los estándares más exigentes de calidad. Nuestros productos han sido cuidadosamente seleccionados para garantizar la exactitud y reproducibilidad en cada experimento.

Variedad de Insumos:
Explora nuestro extenso catálogo que abarca una amplia gama de insumos para laboratorio. Ya sea que necesites reactivos químicos, instrumentos de medición, consumibles de laboratorio o equipos especializados, en Hennz encontrarás todo lo necesario para impulsar tu investigación.

Asesoramiento Especializado:
En Hennz, no solo proporcionamos productos excepcionales, sino que también ofrecemos asesoramiento especializado. Nuestro equipo de expertos en laboratorio está disponible para responder a tus preguntas, proporcionar orientación técnica y ayudarte a encontrar las soluciones más adecuadas para tus proyectos.

Entrega Rápida y Confiable:
Entendemos la importancia del tiempo en el ámbito científico. Por eso, nos esforzamos por brindar un servicio de entrega rápido y confiable. Con Hennz, puedes contar con la llegada oportuna de tus insumos, permitiéndote mantener el flujo de tu investigación sin contratiempos.

Description:
IVICT Europe GmbH is a leading chemical trading company and part of Mitsubishi Corporation’s global network. Our portfolio combines Mitsubishi Corporation’s upstream materials, such as Basic Petrochemicals, the C1 Value Chain, and Chlor-Alkali, with highly customized solutions through our Plastics, BioFine, and Specialty Chemicals departments. This combination allows us to meet diverse market needs with tailored expertise and adaptability.

At IVICT Europe, our mission is to be YOUR PARTNER OF CHOICE. By fostering direct communication with Asian offices and leveraging Mitsubishi Corporation’s extensive business network, we bridge markets, enable sustainable growth, and unlock new opportunities. Name: Biothak Biotecnologia Ltda.
Description:
A Biothak Biotecnologia é especializada em produtos químicos industriais, tratamento de efluentes, biorremediação e engenharia ambiental, atendendo setores como mineração, saneamento, petroquímico, agroindústria, siderurgia, óleo e gás e indústrias em geral. Atuamos com foco em eficiência, inovação e alto desempenho operacional.

Fornecemos floculantes, coagulantes, biorremediadores, antiespumantes e aditivos, desenvolvidos para otimizar processos físico-químicos e biológicos, melhorar clarificação, reduzir DBO/DQO e elevar a performance de sistemas de tratamento de efluentes em diferentes escalas operacionais.

Nossa engenharia aplicada realiza diagnóstico de processos, análises laboratoriais, desenvolvimento tecnológico, caracterização de rejeitos e consultoria especializada, garantindo eficiência, redução de custos e melhoria contínua dos sistemas ambientais e industriais.

Também atuamos em dragagem, desidratação de lodo, tratamento de passivos, geoformas, retrofit de ETEs, recuperação de reatores e biorremediação automatizada, entregando resultados comprovados em projetos de alta complexidade em todo o Brasil.

Com unidades em Valinhos, Campinas e Goiânia, a Biothak combina química, biotecnologia e engenharia para oferecer soluções ambientais de alta performance e sustentabilidade.

Name: Alchem Trading
Description:
Hi, I’m Aaron

I help non-EU chemical manufacturers successfully break into and scale within the European market.

For manufacturers outside the EU, the challenge of entering Europe is daunting. Regulatory complexity, finding the right distributors, and building market credibility can feel like an impossible puzzle.

That’s where I come in.

With over a decade of experience in the chemical industry, I’ve seen countless companies struggle with regulatory hurdles, poor market positioning, and ineffective sales channels. Many manufacturers rely on ad-hoc strategies, outdated partnerships, and a lack of real local presence, leaving them vulnerable to slow growth and compliance risks.

The EU Market Accelerator is the solution.
I’ve designed a structured, end-to-end market entry program that helps non-EU manufacturers establish a strong, compliant, and profitable presence in Europe.

Through this three-phase approach: Plan, Launch, Grow, I support manufacturers with:

Regulatory Compliance & Market Readiness
- Navigating REACH, CLP, and other EU regulatory requirements
- Market mapping
- Go to market strategy

Sales & Distribution Strategy
- Identifying and vetting distributors & direct sales opportunities
- Pricing, competitor analysis & market positioning
- Negotiating sales agreements and onboarding distributors

Logistics, Warehousing & Local Presence
- Secure storage & Just-in-Time delivery models
- Freight optimisation and customs management
- Trade show representation & local branding

The Outcome?
- Faster, frictionless EU market entry
- A strong sales pipeline & distribution network
- A long-term, scalable strategy for European success

I don’t just provide advice, I implement. Whether you need an audit of your current EU strategy, support in navigating regulations, or full-scale market expansion, I can help.

If you’re a manufacturer aiming to expand in Europe, I’d love to explore how the EU Market Accelerator can get you there.

Name: DIERRE srl
Description:
Dierre è sul mercato della distribuzione di prodotti per la pulizia e l’igiene professionale dal 1984. Lavora ogni giorno con Imprese di Pulizia, Hotel, Ristorazione, Aziende Sanitarie, Enti scolastici, Industrie, affiancando sia i responsabili acquisti che il personale più operativo con un supporto tecnico e di consulenza e formazione sulle principali necessità di igiene sugli appalti. 
L’offerta è completata da un servizio di assistenza tecnica: dai sistemi di dosaggio dei prodotti che vengono utilizzati su lavastoviglie e lavatrici, ai sistemi di diluizione dei prodotti concentrati, fino al servizio di noleggio e assistenza macchinari di pulizia. Siamo in Lombardia ma vi assistiamo sul territorio nazionale.
La logistica opera in un magazzino di 3.000 mq completamente rinnovato. Un sistema informatizzato di evasione ordini, sempre pianificato e monitorato, insieme a una rete di corrieri locali e nazionali, assicurano
un’efficiente operatività e un servizio di qualità in tempi brevi.
Per l’assistenza tecnica sui macchinari per pulizia c’è un’officina ben strutturata e attrezzata in sede e anche una mobile per le assistenze in cantiere. 
Cerchiamo nel tempo di produrre “familiarità” per creare fiducia con i nostri clienti, attraverso uno scambio continuo di informazioni, dettagli e soluzioni.
Osserviamo e impariamo dall’esterno, trasformando i cambiamenti in opportunità nuove per noi e per chi lavora con noi. Ci lasciamo coinvolgere nelle esperienze dei nostri clienti, così quando serve diamo risposte ancora più precise. Soddisfare le loro aspettative fa stare bene loro e anche noi.
Animati da grande disponibilità e capacità di ascolto, siamo in costante ricerca di soluzioni che garantiscano un servizio impeccabile e professionale.
La Qualità di prodotti e servizi rappresenta la nostra cultura aziendale, con l’obiettivo di creare rapporti duraturi nel tempo con i nostri clienti.

Name: Higipoiares
Description:
Higipoiares é uma empresa Portuguesa, fundada em 2009, especializada na comercialização de soluções profissionais e inovadoras de higiene e limpeza.

   A aposta constante na Inovação, na Formação e na Qualidade é a principal razão que permitiu o crescente desenvolvimento e manutenção de uma estrutura sólida, nos diversos mercados onde a Higipoiares está inserida, nomeadamente junto das Instituições Públicas e Privadas, como são exemplo Câmaras Municipais, Juntas de Freguesia, Estabelecimento de Ensino, Hospitais, Organismos Oficiais, Bombeiros, Instalações Militares, Creches e Lares de Idosos. 

   Esta aposta na Inovação, Formação e Rigor patente nos produtos que comercializa, nos serviços que presta através do dinamismo dos seus colaboradores e na satisfação das expetativas expressas pelos seus clientes permitiu à Higipoiares crescer ano após ano, possuindo hoje uma carteira de clientes ativos a nível nacional, cobrindo uma grande parte do território continental, Madeira e Açores.

   Todo este sucesso está assente em três pilares fundamentais, nos quais a empresa se baseia para continuar a crescer e proporcionar um serviço profissional e distinto a todos os seus clientes. É então com base na Inovação da oferta, Qualidade do produto e Respeito na auscultação do cliente, que a Higipoiares se pretende continuar a desenvolver no futuro, assumindo um compromisso fiel aos seus ideais de competência e profissionalismo. 

   Para a Higipoiares a chave do sucesso está na melhoria contínua, pelo que a sua equipa de profissionais trabalha dedicadamente para conceber soluções personalizadas que vão de encontro às necessidades dos seus clientes, produzindo assim um impacto real e positivo na atividade das suas empresas.

Name: FR TERMINALES, S.A. DE C.V.
Description:
The Operations of FR Terminals began more than twenty years ago as part of a business unit of Feno Resinas. The growth of tis activity led to the creation of the company FR Terminals in 2012.

Thanks to its sustained growth, today it has 9 railway terminals and 1 maritime terminal. They are strategically located in the states of Nuevo León, Jalisco, Guanajuato, Hidalgo, Veracruz and the State of Mexico.

With more than 180 clients and with the use of more than 350 different products.

Our facilities have: Storage tanks, warehouses transfer and packaging áreas and the are highly prepared for the handling of diverse dangerous chemical products.

We have 600 spaces in the 20,000 meters of roads built, which make up our 9 terminals. The maritime terminal of Tuxpan has tanks with a total capacity of 22,000 cubic meters.

The products we handle are classified as: liquid chemical products, petroleum products, plastic resins and gas.

The main services we provide ir our terminals are unloading to and from ships, tanker truck, rail tanker and Storage tanks.
Another Service includes bagging polyolefins and as well as other specialized services such as: unit heating, liquid packaging, mixing and in some cases, analytical testing.

Our terminals are ISO 9001 certified.

FR Terminals, a proud Mexican company has the vision of continuing to expand its operating capacity to Support the growth of our clients.

Name: Granulat-Chmielarz Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Jesteśmy jednym z wiodących dystrybutorów tworzyw sztucznych i masterbatchy w Polsce, od 30 lat dostarczamy materiały i dodatki do polskich i europejskich producentów.

Prawidłowy przebieg produkcji rozpoczyna się od granulatu. Jako pierwsi w procesie warunkujemy jego efektywność. Dostarczając surowce najwyższej jakości zapewniamy krótszy czas przygotowania tworzywa do produkcji, minimalizujemy niepowodzenia procesu spowodowane złymi parametrami tworzywa, skracamy czas cyklu. Ostatecznie wpływamy na właściwości finalnego produktu oraz jego konkurencyjność na rynku. Jako pierwsi w całym procesie wyznaczamy standard jakości Twojej produkcji.

Name: Kelewell Trading GmbH
Description:

We have our own trading company and team in China, and we are also building production facilities and factories in Asia, which should be completed by 2023.

Name: Vailent
Description:
Vailent is reimagining how the world buys and sells chemicals and plastics. As a tech-driven subsidiary of Vinmar, a global leader in polymer and chemical distribution, we’ve built a digital marketplace and software platform that transforms how business gets done in an industry ready for change.

Through our online wholesale store and marketplace, buyers and sellers connect to trade chemicals and plastics with unprecedented speed, transparency, and efficiency. Our application and platform services (ASP/PAAS) power the purchase, sale, and distribution of materials, while helping companies better manage customers, data, and supply chains across the global chemical and plastics ecosystem.

At Vailent, we bring startup energy to a global legacy. Our remote team moves fast, builds boldly, and takes ownership of projects that directly shape the future of digital commerce in the chemical and polymers industries. We’re not just modernizing transactions—we’re creating the infrastructure for the next generation of global materials trade.

Name: DKSH Marketing Services Spain SAU
Description:
DKSH Marketing Services Spain, is a Distribution Company of Speciality Chemicals supplying to many different application fields. Since June 2014, our company is part of international leading distribution group DKSH, as part of its performance materials BU. 

DKSH Marketing Services Spain is organized through four business lines: Industrial Specialties, Personal Care, Pharma  and Food & Beverages. Every business line deals with products for a wide range of technical application fields. 

Apart from these sales lines, the company also has an internal organization that covers financial, administrative, regulatory and logistics areas.
 
The company was founded as Zeus quimica in 1980 in Barcelona to distribute pigments in the Spanish market from well-known foreign companies with a good reputation that believed in the ambitious project of the two founding partners. From then orward, other relevant suppliers have joined our company to develop its commercial strategy in our market. 

In 1999 the activities were extended to Portugal through what it is today DKSH Portugal, with the support of our main Clients.

In June 2014, the company was acquired by DKSH group, joining its Performance Materials Business Unit. DKSH is one of the leading companies in specialty chemicals distribution.

DKSH Marketing Services Spain is ISO9001, adhered to  "Responsible Care" Programm with the objective of implementing a continuous quality improvement in Safety Health Protection and the Environment and Sustainable Development. From 2008, the company is listed as SQAS Distributor through ESAD assessement.

Name: Primaplas Pty Ltd
Description:
Your Partner in Plastics

Primaplas is a leading provider of polymer resins and packaging films across Australia, New Zealand, and Singapore. 

At Primaplas we provide a wide range of quality resins for manufacturing, from food packaging, healthcare, and consumer products, to building, industrial and mining uses. Our products include an extensive range of resins from PVC, PE, PET, PP, Styrene based resins, and engineering resins. Our resins are suitable for film, pipe and sheet extrusion, injection-moulding, blow-moulding, and roto-moulding.
 
We believe it is our responsibility to be industry leaders and help tackle the challenges ahead, by also offering a wide range of performance and sustainable alternatives including Recycled resins and films. 
 
Our products are sourced from globally leading manufacturers across Asia, Middle East and North America. We believe in long term partnerships with leading suppliers who believe in quality and continued innovation to provide the best products to our customers. 
 
As a trusted player in the plastics industry, suppliers and manufacturers rely on our comprehensive logistics network to run their businesses efficiently. Primaplas offers customised, end-to-end logistics solutions to meet individual customer delivery, timing and volume requirements. 

Primaplas is an industry member of the Plastics Industry Pipe Association PIPA, Vinyl Council of Australia VCA, and Association of Rotational Moulders ARMA. We are an accredited Australian Trusted Trader.
 
With over 30 years of experience in the market, our priority is to serve our customers with a great choice of products, outstanding customer service and tailored delivery. Our experience in the market and technical expertise allows us to work closely with customers to provide the right solution for every need. Our motto “working for you” remains at the heart of what we do, and we always strive to be the very best partner in plastics. 

We are a dedicated team working for you.

Name: LEFA Temsilcilik
Description:
20 yıldan bu yana petro kimya, enerji, tekstil, havacılık, kağıt ve ısı transfer gibi bir çok sektöre danışmanlık ve mühendislik hizmeti veren Lefa Temsilcilik, verdiği hizmetler ve çalıştığı firmalar ile sektördeki yerini sağlamlaştırıyor.

Firmamız kurulduğu ilk yıllardan itibaren ana faaliyet dalı olarak petrol, tekstil ve kimya sanayi piyasasına kullanım süresi pratikte 40 yılı aşan ısı transfer sıvısını sunuyor.  Isı transfer sıvıları, kızgın yağ kazanlarında sıvı faz ve gaz faz sistemlerde çalışan sıvılar olup değişik şartlara uygun ürünleri bulunuyor. Bu kategorideki farklı ürünler -120 derece ile +400 derece arasındaki sıcaklıklarda kullanılabiliyor.  Sektöre dizayn, start up, işletme ve test konularında teknik destek sağlayan Lefa Temsilcilik, 20 yılı aşkın varlıklarının sonucunda “Isıdan değer yaratma “ olan sürekli çevrim(Organik Rankine) çalışmalarına start verdi. Motor sektöründeki kesme kalıbı laminasyonlar, motor ve rotor için kömür aparatları, izolasyon sarım ve mastik uygulama makinaları, motor test cihazları ve izole edilmiş iletkenlerin yapılması ile geniş alanda hizmet haritası oluşturulduğumuza inanıyoruz. 

2015 yılında yeni yatırımların artması ve Türkiye’nin yatırım yapılabilir ülke konumuna gelmesinden dolayı mümessilliğini yaptığımız firma ürünlerinin satışının ve firmalarda artış görüldüğünü söyleyebilirim. Bu nedenle geçtiğimiz yıl ciromuzda yüzde 50 oranında bir artış gerçekleşerek 5,5 milyon dolar oldu. Hitap ettiğimiz kesim arttığından dolayı çalışan alt kademe eleman sayımızda da yüzde 15 oranında bir artış gerçekleşti. 2016 yılı sonunda 8 milyon dolar ciro hedefliyoruz. Sektördeki gelişmelerin takibi ile özellikle atıktan enerji üretiminde (Biomass Enerji ) yatırım yapan firmalar ile gerek mühendislik ve gerekse hammadde temini açısından çalışmalar içerisindeyiz. Müşteri portföyümüzün artması ve pazar payımızın artması beklentilerimiz arasındadır.

Name: FRAMACOLD
Description:
Chez FRAMACOLD, nous proposons des réfrigérants innovants pour décarboner immédiatement la production de froid dans l'industrie et la climatisation.

Nos fluides frigorigènes innovants sont : 

- La solution à la baisse des quotas pour garantir vos approvisionnement 

- La solution pour que votre client garde son équipement en remplaçant seulement de fluide

- La solution écologique pour réduire les émissions directes (GWP réduit jusqu'à 80%) et indirecte (COP supérieur jusqu'à 30%)


Notre mission : Depuis 2005, nous offrons à nos clients des solutions pour prolonger la durée de vie de leurs installations frigorifiques, tout en réduisant leur coût et l'impact environnemental. 

Grâce à nos fluides de rétrofit, vous évitez des investissements lourds de renouvellement d'équipements et sécurisez vos approvisionnement en réfrigérants malgré la baisse des quotas.


Notre expertise : Le rétrofit. 

Pourquoi remplacer une installation performante quand on peut la moderniser avec un fluide plus durable ?

 Nos solutions, comme le RS-51, RS-53 et RS-20, prolongent la durée de vie des équipements en toute conformité avec les réglementations F-Gaz.


Notre engagement : Moins de gaspillage d'installations qui fonctionnent encore, moins d’émissions de CO2, plus d’efficacité énergétique. 

En favorisant la pérennité des installations et la régénération des fluides, nous aidons les entreprises à réduire leur empreinte carbone tout en réduisant leurs coûts d’exploitation.

 Avec un réseau de plus de 100 dépositaires en France, nous garantissons à nos clients une disponibilité immédiate des réfrigérants.

Framacold, c’est l’agilité d’une PME, l’expertise d’un leader sur le rétrofit, et une vision à long terme pour un froid plus durable.


Discutons ensemble de l’avenir de votre installation ! 

Contactez-nous ➔ www.framacold.com/contact

Name: Caramba
Description:
ÜBER UNS

Caramba ist die Marke für alle, die anpacken, statt abwarten.  Was 1903 mit der Anmeldung der Marke startete, und danach mit einem einzigen, ikonischen Produkt begann – unserem legendären Multi Öl – ist heute ein breites Portfolio an Produkten für Reinigung, Pflege und Wartung.

Seit 2024 sind wir wieder unabhängig und inhabergeführt – mit frischer Energie, klarer Haltung und dem Ziel, Dinge einfacher zu machen. Für alle, die selbst anpacken, instand halten, sauber machen – ob in der Werkstatt, im Betrieb oder zu Hause in der Garage.

Für unsere Partner im Handel bedeutet das: eine starke Marke im Regal, die Vertrauen schafft, Emotionen weckt und mit Qualität überzeugt, die einfach funktioniert und starken Abverkauf sichert.


WAS UNS ANTREIBT

Caramba ist für alle, die nicht lange reden, sondern machen.
Für die, die Dinge in die Hand nehmen – mit Fachwissen, Erfahrung und dem Anspruch, Probleme zu lösen, statt nur darüber zu labbern. Für echte Macher in Werkstatt, Betrieb und Industrie.

Unsere Produkte sind dafür gemacht, Prozesse zu vereinfachen, Ergebnisse zu verbessern und den Unterschied spürbar zu machen – beim Reinigen, Pflegen oder Instandhalten.
Nicht nur wie neu. Sondern besser. Weil’s von dir kommt. Und weil du auf Lösungen setzt, die halten, was sie versprechen.

Ob Haushalt und DIY, Auto, Motorrad, Werkstatt oder Industrie – unser umfassendes Sortiment unterstützt engagierte  Hobbyschrauber und Profis gleichermaßen dabei, ihre Aufgaben mit Leichtigkeit und Freude zu meistern.

Name: GUZTEC POLYMERS TÜRKİYE
Description:
GUZTEC Polymers | Mühendislik Plastikleri ve Yüksek Performanslı Polimer Çözümleri

GUZTEC Polymers, teknik plastikler alanında 50 yılı aşkın uluslararası deneyimi ve yenilikçi vizyonuyla sektörün öncü distribütörlerinden biridir.
2013 yılında SABIC firmasının Türkiye distribütörlüğünü alarak faaliyetlerine başlayan şirketimiz, 2020 yılında Avrupa’da mühendislik plastikleri alanında lider HROMATKA GROUP bünyesine katılmış; Mart 2025 itibarıyla GUZMAN POLYMERS Türkiye adını GUZTEC Polymers olarak yenilemiştir.

Geniş ürün yelpazemizle elektrik-elektronikten beyaz eşyaya, otomotivden inşaata, medikalden tekstil ve ambalaja kadar uzanan birçok endüstriye yüksek performanslı çözümler sunuyoruz.
Portföyümüzde PC, PC/ABS, ABS, SAN, PBT, EVA, PMMA, PA66, POE, PPCOM, PPCOPO, PPRACO, PPO, PEI ve PPS gibi mühendislik ve özel polimerler yer almaktadır.

Malzeme seçimi, parça tasarımı ve proses geliştirme konularında uzman mühendislik ekibimizle, müşterilerimizin üretim verimliliğini artıran, sürdürülebilir ve katma değerli çözümler geliştiriyoruz.
Sadece bir hammadde tedarikçisi değil; aynı zamanda her projede teknik bilgi ve deneyimiyle fark yaratan bir çözüm ortağı olmayı hedefliyoruz.

HROMATKA GROUP çatısı altında, Avrupa’daki teknik bilgi birikimimizi Türkiye’nin üretim gücüyle birleştirerek, sektöre yenilik, güven ve sürekli gelişim odaklı hizmet anlayışıyla liderlik etmeye devam ediyoruz.

Amacımız sektörde mükemmelliği hedefleyerek, müşterilerimiz ile dürüstlük ve güvene bağlı iletişim kurmaktır. Sağladığımız ürün ve hizmetlerde odak noktamız yüksek kalitedir. Bu sayede alanında dünya lideri olan şirketlerin, laboratuvar testlerini tamamlamış ve sertifikalandırılmış yüksek performanslı poliüretan, epoksi ve mühendislik reçine sistemlerini sunmaktır.

Enerji ve tecrübemizin tamamını birinden farklı sektörlere yüksek kalite odaklı profesyonel hizmet sunmaktır. Müşterimizin projelerine; onların ihtiyaçları çerçevesinde uzmanlaşmış ve kullanıcı dostu çözümlerimiz sunmak standardımız haline gelmiştir.

Yüksek performanslı teknik ve mekanik özelliklere sahip mühendislik reçinelerimiz, hızlı servis, devamlı stoklu ve odaklanmış proje yönetimi… Bu politikamız, EPOKS markasını yüksek performanslı mühendislik reçinelerinden çok daha fazlasını ifade eder hale gelmiştir.

Müşterilerimiz ile olan karşılıklı güven anlayışı sayesinde, sıkı bir ağ oluşturmuş durumdayız. En önemli dönüm noktamız ise işimize ve sektörümüze olan tutkumuz olmuştur. Sadece bir tedarikçi değil, müşterilerimizin tüm proje süreçlerinde çözüm ve sonuç odaklı proje yönetimi sunmaktır.

Deneyim ve tecrübeye değer veriyoruz. Tüm ekibimiz, teknik bilgi ve farklı sektörlerin imalat süreçlerini biliyor, öğreniyor, yönetiyor ve müşterilerimiz ile beraber geliştiriyoruz.

Türkiye’nin lider şirketlerinin iş ortağı ve ülkemize değer katan projelerinin bir parçası olmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

The Tufoil and HinderRUST product lines are unique in that no solvents are present and the product is non-hazardous and non-flammable.
For natural gas midstream and transmission companies who are focused on using safe products safely, there is no better internal pipeline corrosion inhibitor than HinderRUST S4.0.  Equipment in marine environments will find do better corrosion protection than HInderRUST. 

Fluoramics also manufactures a PTFE oil additive called TufOil that is ideal for compressor engines that are forced to run on field gas.  TufOil reduces friction, lowers operating temperatures and extends engine life.

Fluoramics sealants are world class for corrosive applications in water, waste water, oxygen, chlorine and most other highly reactive chemicals.

Modumetal’s nanolaminated materials are grown using atom-by-atom deposition techniques that are designed with different stacking sequences and layer thicknesses.  Modumetal's fasteners have nanolayered alloy coatings with properties such as improved toughness, strength, thermal properties, and outstanding corrosion resistance.

Name: Kömmerling Sheets
Description:
Since the production of the first PVC sheets in 1970, Kömmerling has laid a crucial foundation for success in the sheet industry. Today, over 50 years later, our products are internationally recognized, and we are among the world's leading providers in this field. With our eight versatile product groups, we offer nearly endless application possibilities—from advertising and trade fairs to construction and industry, our panels are indispensable.

Innovation drives us. With KömaCel, we were pioneers in the field of PVC integral foam sheets. KömaDur has been established for years as a generic term for PVC rigid sheets. For digital direct and screen printing, our KömaTex and KömPrint sheets offer outstanding quality. We also set standards in the composite panel sector: our KömaAlu aluminum composite panels and KömaSteel & KömaSteel Whiteboard steel composite panels find their place in various advertising applications.

With KömaStyle, we offer aesthetic, functional, and easy-to-clean wall coverings for residential and wet rooms—perfect for modern interior designs. Sustainability is not an option for us but a standard. KömaEnviro, our environmentally friendly products with an increased recycling content, offer an eco-friendly alternative and are available in Cel, Dur, and Tex variants. They combine the highest quality with a clear environmental consciousness.

This expansion of our portfolio is proof of Kömmerling's innovative strength and our commitment to developing solutions that meet the growing demands for design, functionality, and sustainability. Together, we shape the future of sheet production—creatively, efficiently, and sustainably.

올리브인터내셔널은 'Global No.1 Cluster Commerce Platform'이라는 비전을 갖고, SNS 기반의 브랜드를 개발하고 양성하고 있습니다. 소비자의 니즈는 갈수록 세분화 되어가기 때문에 다양한 브랜드 포트폴리오를 확보, 이 세분화된 니즈를 글로벌 단위로 공략하고자 합니다.

올리브인터내셔널은 19년 4월 브랜드 밀크터치로 첫 발걸음 내딛었습니다. '가족과 지인들에게도 믿고 추천할 수 있는 제품을 만들자'라는 취지로 밀크터치를 출시했으며, 대표 제품 '서양송악 진정 크림' 은 현대, CJ 등 각종 홈쇼핑에서 완판을 기록하고 있습니다. 

또한 최근에는 장영란 모공앰플로 홈쇼핑 대란을 일으킨 성분에디터와 비건-프렌들리 비프로젝트, 붓기괄사템으로 소문난 시모먼트 등 뷰티 뿐만 아니라 생활용품 브랜드인 깔끔상회, 이너뷰티 브랜드인 갓트 등의 브랜드를 운영하고 있습니다.

21년 5월 프라이머 사제 및 프라이머로부터 20억 규모의 시리즈 A 투자 치에 성공하여 직원들에 대한 복지, 보상이 대폭 개편되었으며 21년 연매출 300억원을 달성, 20년 대비 218% 성장하였습니다. 

2022년, 올리브는 연매출 515억원을 목표로 달리고 있습니다.

Name: Hygienx India Private Limited
Description:
Hygienx India Private Limited is a new-age eco hygiene brand redefining cleanliness through science, sustainability, and smart design. Headquartered in Mumbai, Hygienx develops professional-grade hygiene solutions that protect people, promote wellness, and preserve the planet.

Our flagship brand, HUGO Hygiene Life, embodies the next generation of cleaning excellence — powered by biodegradable, non-toxic, and eco-engineered formulations. Every product is crafted with precision to meet international standards for performance, purity, and sustainability.

From facility care and kitchen hygiene to personal and institutional solutions, Hygienx delivers innovation that blends efficacy with environmental responsibility. Each solution is designed to minimize ecological footprint while maximizing protection in homes, offices, hospitality, and healthcare environments.

Driven by a vision to build a cleaner, safer, and greener tomorrow, Hygienx is committed to supporting India’s sustainable transition through its Go Green Initiatives — including water conservation, community awareness, beach cleanups, and urban plantation drives.

Currently in its soft launch phase, Hygienx is setting new industry benchmarks in eco hygiene manufacturing, brand innovation, and design leadership.

 Our Purpose: Redefine hygiene for a healthier planet.
 Our Promise: Power Clean. Planet Kind.
 Website: https://hygienx.in

Name: House of Cleaning Supplies
Description:
House of Cleaning Supplies is a family owned and operated business based in Melbourne open direct to the public. 

Having operated in the cleaning industry for 20 years we saw the need in the market for a cleaning supplier that treats all clients the same. No matter how large or small your account is, we value your business and offer you great service at competitive prices. Our focus is on building a long lasting partnership with both our customers and our suppliers.  

We believe in transparency in pricing so we offer bulk discounts to every customer on every item every day. We have worked hard to allow all customers to bulk buy the products they use without having to hoard or sit on a tonne of stock because the bulk discount was on a pallet of stock.

Using our knowledge over the past 20 years and the support of our brand partnerships we are here to assist you to solve those tricky questions, find the right chemical for that stain that just will not go away or simply source something new that you cannot find on our site.

We are continually adding new stock to our website. At the moment you can find over 400 products on our site with that number growing as quickly as we can upload them. If there are any products that you use that you cannot find on the site drop us a line and we will source it for you if it is not already sitting in our warehouse.

Name: S.R. Corporation
Description:
SR Corporation (SRC) — Precision, Performance & Partnership in Textile Dyes & Chemicals

With 46 years of trust behind us, SR Corporation has been a consistent name in textile dyes, chemicals, and auxiliaries since 1978. We’ve grown by combining innovation, quality, and solid global partnerships to help textile manufacturers stay competitive and compliant.

What We Do Best

We cover the full spectrum — from high-performance dyes and finishing chemicals to sustainable solutions that deliver results. As the exclusive distributor for Runtu China and Nicca Chemicals Japan — and now the authorised distributor for Engro’s Hydrogen Peroxide and Caustic Soda across Sindh and Punjab — we put world-class technology in the hands of mills that want to do better.

What We Stand For

More than products — we build value through:

1. Consistent, high-quality, sustainable solutions.
2. A supply chain that actually delivers.
3. Competitive pricing, zero compromise on standards.
4. Technical know-how, practical innovation, and clear guidance.

Beyond Chemicals

Textiles remain our backbone, but we keep growing — backed by smart investments in other sectors. Everything we do ties back to measured growth, risk management, and unlocking fresh opportunity where it makes sense.

Let’s Talk

We’re open to new partnerships, market expansions, and ideas that push industries forward. If you need premium chemicals or want to explore bigger plays — we’re listening.

SR Corporation — Faisalabad | Lahore | Karachi — Pakistan

Name: novoclon GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei Novoclon, einem führenden Hersteller und Vertreiber von hochmodernen Wirkstoffen für die kosmetische und pharmazeutische Industrie. Unser Engagement für Innovation und Nachhaltigkeit zeichnet uns aus, denn wir nutzen fortschrittliche biotechnologische Verfahren, um Wirkstoffe von höchster Qualität herzustellen. Jedes Produkt wird strengen In-vivo- und In-vitro-Tests unterzogen, um sowohl die Wirksamkeit als auch die Sicherheit zu gewährleisten.

Als exklusiver Vertriebspartner der renommierten Partnerunternehmen Vytrus, Barnet, Argenol und Citripel in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz bietet Ihnen novoclon die neuesten Entwicklungen im Bereich Hautpflege und pharmazeutische Inhaltsstoffe. Unsere eigene Produktlinie umfasst novoCERA (Ceramide), novoACT (Wirkstoffe), novoHYAL (Hyaluronsäure) und novoVIT (Vitamine), die auf die die unterschiedlichen Bedürfnisse der Verbraucher in unserer Branche.

Begleiten Sie uns bei unserer Mission, den Kosmetik- und Pharmasektor mit nachhaltigen und innovativen Lösungen zu revolutionieren. Setzen Sie sich noch heute mit uns in Verbindung und erfahren Sie, wie novoclon Ihre Produkte auf die nächste Qualitätsstufe heben kann.

Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam die Zukunft von Schönheit und Wellness gestalten.

Welcome to Novoclon, a premier manufacturer and distributor of cutting-edge active ingredients for the cosmetic and pharmaceutical industries.  Each product undergoes rigorous in vivo and in vitro testing to ensure both efficacy and safety.

We are an exclusive distributor for renowned partner companies Vytrus, Barnet, Argenol, and Citripel in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland, novoclon brings you the latest advancements in skincare and pharmaceutical ingredients. Our own product line includes novoCERA (Ceramides), novoACT (Actives), novoHYAL (Sodium Hyaluronate), and novoVIT (Vitamins), tailored to meet the diverse needs of our industry consumers.

We understand industry specific requirements be it Food, Personal Care or Pharma.

We source natural ingredients directly from growers, we offer product life cycle traceability and continue to improve our processes and community outreach to minimize our impact on the environment and promote sustainable sourcing practises.

Whether you are an end user or a reseller, let's collaborate to achieve your goals. Contact us today!

Name: Innotec Danmark A/S
Description:
Innotec er i dag en af Europas førende kemiske/tekniske virksomheder, og er repræsenteret i de fleste industrilande, heraf 30 år i Danmark. Vi har egen produktudvikling, hvor kvaliteten er i højsæde. Netop kvalitet er et essentielt element i vores egen selvforståelse.

Vores succes bygger på tre grundprincipper:

1). Vi har fokus på virkelige og anvendelige løsninger.
2). Stort fokus på bæredygtighed, der har gjort os førende indenfor branchen.
3). Vi har konstant tæt kontakt til vores kunder, således vores produktløsninger er for kunderne - til kunderne. 

Vi hos Innotec ønsker, at hjælpe autobranche -og industrifagligt personale, med at kunne udføre arbejde til perfektion. Derfor tilbyder vi sealers, maling, rens, polish, lim, tape, fedter og smøremidler i højeste kvalitet. Vi tror nemlig på at "Only Quality has a Future".

Name: Advent Silica Materials LLC

Name: Hongda Civil Explosives | 宏大民爆
Description: Hongda Civil Explosives Group Co., Ltd. is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Guangdong Hongda Holdings Group Co., Ltd., a publicly listed company (Stock Name: Guangdong Hongda, Stock Code: SZ002683). The Company's business scope includes the research, development, production, sales, and transportation of civil explosives, as well as raw material procurement and blasting services. Hongda Civil Explosives is recognized as a national high-tech enterprise, holding over 180 national patents and receiving six provincial and ministerial-level science and technology awards. The Company has comprehensive qualifications in the civil explosives and blasting sectors. It has an annual licensed production capacity of 700,000 tons of industrial explosives, ranking among the top three in China. It also produces 50 million electronic detonators, 20 million non-electric detonators, 5 million industrial electric detonators, 200 tons of boosters, and 120 million meters of shock tubes. The Company holds a Level 1 commercial blasting license and employs 275 professional blasting engineers, including 65 senior blasting engineers (A/B levels), 19 certified constructors, and 46 certified safety engineers. It owns over 100 large-scale construction equipment units, including mixing trucks, excavators, and drilling rigs. Annually, it uses 240,000 tons of explosives. Currently, Hongda Civil Explosives has operations across South China, North China, Northeast China, and Northwest China, and is expanding its business to Central Asia, Africa, South America, and other regions worldwide.

Name: Ditrimex
Description:
Ditrimex is your direct trader of import and export for chemicals, specifically eTCP which is a unique product from CHEMEON Surface Technology. 

CHEMEON Surface Technology eTCP, is a safe corrosion protection that has been approved to MIL-DTL-5541F and MIL-DTL-81706B for use as a conversion coating on all aluminum alloys and other light metals.

CONVERSION COATING YOU CAN SEE
eTCP provides a visual purple color indicator that your parts are surface treated and protected. The lack of color has been a major barrier to the implementation of trivalent chromium, as a replacement for the old chemical hexavalent chromium. With the ground-breaking product eTCP, significant problems with quality control and waste of resources are no longer present.
With the development of eTCP and MIL-DTL qualification, a sustainable and innovative technology has been created for global aerospace, military and OEM customers.

WHY ETCP IS A SUPERIOR CONVERSION COATING
One of the most compelling aspects of CHEMEON eTCP lies in its ability to form a protective coating on metal surfaces through a chemical conversion process. This coating acts as a shield against corrosion, provides superior adhesion to traditional paint and ARC paint, significantly extending the life of metal components and structures in harsh environments such as marine or industrial environments. By preventing oxidation and degradation, eTCP ensures the long-term integrity and reliability of materials, reduces maintenance costs and improves operational efficiency.

Name: Labo Scientific BV
Description:
Labo Scientific B.V. is a practical, service-oriented supplier of laboratory products, chemicals, equipment and specialist measuring instruments for scientific, industrial and quality-control environments. Based in Ede, we provide a broad and reliable range of materials used in daily laboratory and fieldwork, from basic consumables to advanced analytical tools.
Our assortment includes laboratory consumables, glassware, plastics, reagents, buffer solutions, standards, safety items and a wide selection of laboratory equipment for sample preparation, weighing, heating, cooling and analysis. In addition, we supply professional measuring instruments for industrial and on-site applications, including Troxler nuclear gauges and related accessories. This combination allows us to support both laboratory operations and field-measurement work within construction, infrastructure, soil testing and material-inspection industries.
With more than 20,000 products available from stock, we focus on fast, accurate delivery and dependable logistics. We supply and ship our products worldwide, ensuring that laboratories and technical teams across international markets receive essential materials quickly and reliably. Our customers include research laboratories, universities, hospitals, industrial QC departments, water and environmental laboratories, and companies working in construction and materials testing.
We aim to provide a complete and reliable solution for laboratories and technical teams that require consistency, accuracy and practical daily support. Whether you need routine consumables, chemicals, precision instruments or specialized measurement tools—Labo Scientific ensures availability, quality and confidence in every delivery.

HDPE (BL3, HM CRP 100 Black)

Secondary Products:

As secondary products, our offerings complement primary operations, ensuring reliable and high-quality solutions for water treatment needs. We are dedicated to providing products that enhance the performance and longevity of water treatment systems through innovation and efficiency.

Name: PLAN B Technische Produkte GmbH
Description:
Die PLAN B Technische Produkte GmbH mit Hauptsitz in Holzhausen (OÖ) wurde in Österreich gegründet und ist auch zu 100% in österreichischem Besitz.

Das Unternehmen wurde aus dem Zusammenschluss erfolgreicher Verkäufer mit dem Ziel gegründet, den Kunden eine Alternative – also einen PLAN B – in Hinblick auf Qualität, Wirtschaftlichkeit und Service zu den bisher bekannten Produkten und Lieferanten bieten zu können.

Wir orientieren uns an höchsten Qualitätsmaßstäben und den Bedürfnissen unseren Kunden und sind daher als Anbieter für hochqualitative Produkte in der Premium-Klasse bekannt und geschätzt.

Unsere Kernkompetenzen liegen im chemisch-technischen Bereich – hier sind wir Exklusivanbieter für Metaflux-Produkte im Bereich Reiniger, Schmierstoffe und Spezialprodukte sowie für DL-Chemical Produkte im Bereich Kleb- und Dichtstoffe in Österreich und Ost-Europa.

In den letzten Jahren widmen wir uns auch verstärkt dem Vertrieb von Arbeitsschutz. Hier setzen wir auf Premiumprodukte in Eigenmarke und top funktionelle und modische Arbeitsbekleidung der Firma DASSY.
Eigenprodukte der Schleiftechnik, der Schweißtechnik, der Montage und Befestigungstechnik, Werkzeuge, sowie Artikel für den Werkstattbedarf runden unser Programm ideal ab und machen uns somit zum fachkundigen Komplettanbieter. Unser Sortiment umfasst mehr als 10.000 Qualitätsprodukte. Unsere Zulieferer und Partner sind alle ISO-zertifiziert und produzieren nach höchsten Qualitätsstandards. Unser Grundsatz ist alle unsere Produkte so regional wie möglich, überwiegend von Produzenten aus Österreich und der EU fertigen zu lassen. Der Verkauf erfolgt durch unser Außendienstteam in ganz Österreich und über unseren Onlineshop in ganz Europa.

Name: Piscinistes Associés Somédi
Description:
La société SOMÉDI est implantée depuis 1946 à Montpellier. Nous sommes une société familiale, qui en est à la troisième génération, et qui bénéficie de plus de 75 ans d’expérience dans le traitement d’eau et de la piscine.

Il y a quelques années, nous avons décidé de nous rassembler avec d’autres acteurs de notre profession et de fonder la coopérative des pisciniers, un réseau de piscinistes associés indépendants.

Dans cette même logique, nous avons décidé de passer sous l’enseigne PISCINISTES ASSOCIÉS SOMÉDI.

Nous sommes également membres de la Fédération des Professionnels de la Piscine, un vrai gage de sécurité et d’implication pour nos clients.

Nous travaillons « dans la durée » auprès de nos clients. Nous engageons notre professionnalisme, que ce soit par le service apporté ou les matériels proposés. Nos équipes et techniciens sont formés chaque année aux nouveaux produits et aux nouvelles technologies. Nous privilégions les produits fiables et de qualité, pour cela nous attachons un soin tout particulier aux relations durables avec nos fournisseurs. Nous veillons au respect mutuel avec notre environnement, nos collaborateurs, nos fournisseurs et nos clients.

Notre société est regroupée autour de quatre activités : le traitement de l’eau, la distribution de gros, la vente de matériels et équipements et la vente et pose de piscines coques et spas.

Our commercial customers are diverse - from university geology departments and football academies and domestic and commercial sectors (from hospitality to care homes and from education to automotive - among many others). 

How do we create value for you?
We are focused on providing you with top-quality UK-made products such as juice bottles and spray bottles that we have tried and tested ourselves and can evaluate, based on our own direct experience in commercial sectors. We work with top manufacturing companies on the chemicals side of the business and with top distributors on the containers side.  
In all products, we look for quality of construction, performance, durability and sustainability. Quite simply, we look for the best product to meet your specific needs.  As an online business, we are open 24 hours.

UK quality wherever possible
More than 95% of our products are UK-made. We provide customers with the reassurance that they are dealing with a British company that sources products from the UK, cutting down on road miles, ensuring the shortest possible short supply chain, and, above all, creating British jobs.  UK-made is essential part of our DNA as a business: we want to challenge and overturn the idea that 'everything is made abroad these days' and we do this by sourcing high-quality, British-made products that are simply better quality, and, critically, are available to us on 24-48 hour delivery.

Name: BGS Alcohols SA
Description:
The company was founded in 1895 by the Spiliopoulos family in the port of Patras, when the city was the leading exporter of raisins globally. At the time, raisins were a particularly popular product the British for the preparation of traditional puddings, as well as the French for wine production - a time at which their vineyards were struck by phylloxera.

For many decades, the company used the surplus of raisins as raw material for the production of alcohol. Over the course of the 20th century, it emerged as the leading producer of pure alcohol, brandy and Mavrodaphne wine in Greece. Except for the period during World War II, the company has been in continuous operation for over 125 years, making it one of the oldest distilleries in Europe.

In 2022, the company embarked on a new chapter in its history under the name BGS ALCOHOLS S.A., as ownership passed to investors led by Dimitris Chandris and Harry Smith, who, together with a new management team, aim to strengthen the company's competitive position in the Greek market and to develop its footprint abroad.

Name: Druckwege BV
Description:
At DruckWege we believe in challenging the status quo and thinking differently in everything we do.
 
We develop, produce and provide UV resins to the 3D printing market and is an established brand since 2015. As we strive for transparency and conformity with EU regulations our resins carry UFI codes and are provided with CLP-compliant safety data sheets and GHS-compliant labeling. We enable the market with a broad spectrum of resins with technical support from our experts on the use of the resins.
 
 
Through collaborations with many universities spanning different countries and close communication with our customers, DruckWege enables new impacts on research and developments for innovative and sustainable products.

Seven years ago Anton Gillert and Florian Reil founded DruckWege. As engineers and enthusiasts on additive manufacturing, they explored new opportunities and the variety of materials and functions of potential products. After building the company for several years with a lot of passion they decided in 2021 that it was time to take developments to the next level.
 
 
To further professionalize DruckWege GmbH, the founders Gillert & Reil found a group of 3D printing specialists based in the North of The Netherlands, Groningen. In cooperation with this partner and the Northern development company, NOM, DruckWege BV entered the next phase.
 
 
DruckWege BV produces high-precision 3D-printing UV resins in the North of The Netherlands, in which safety and quality of production and products are central. The 3D-printing UV resins can be used for different purposes in industrial, functional, or particular dental applications.

Naša firma je istaknuti lider u industriji, posvećena pružanju vrhunskih uređaja i rešenja za analitičku hemiju. Sa strastvenim fokusom na napredne tehnologije i korisničku podršku, transformišemo naše klijente iz laboratorijskih istraživača u pionire u njihovim oblastima.

NAŠI PARTNERI

Spectro Analytical Instruments:
Spectro Analytical Instruments je globalni lider u razvoju i proizvodnji preciznih spektrometrijskih rešenja na polju ICP-OES, varničnih analizatora i XRF uređaja.

Grabner Instruments:
Grabner Instruments je renomirani proizvođač visokokvalitetnih analitičkih instrumenata, posebno poznat po inovacijama u oblasti analize goriva, maziva i hemijskih proizvoda.

Setaram:
Setaram je lider u proizvodnji termalnih analitičkih instrumenata, specijalizovan za razvoj termogravimetrijskih i kalorimetrijskih sistema.

NAŠA VIZIJA

Pružamo inovativna rešenja koja omogućavaju našim klijentima da unaprede svoje istraživačke mogućnosti, istovremeno smanjujući troškove i vreme potrebno za analizu. Naša vizija je da postanemo neprikosnoveni partner u razvoju tehnoloških rešenja koja potpomažu napredak u analitičkoj hemiji.

NAŠA MISIJA

Naša misija je da kontinuirano unapređujemo naš asortiman proizvoda, pružajući vrhunsku podršku i obuku korisnicima. Fokusirani smo na zadovoljavanje specifičnih potreba naših klijenata kroz stručnost, inovaciju i posvećenost kvalitetu.

NAŠI KLIJENTI

Radimo sa raznovrsnim korisnicima u akademskim istraživačkim institucijama, farmaceutskoj industriji, prehrambenom sektoru, kao i u razvoju novih materijala i biotehnologiji. Naši klijenti imaju koristi od naše duboke ekspertize i podrške u optimizaciji njihovih analitičkih procesa.

ZAKLJUČAK

Kao vaš pouzdani partner u analitičkoj hemiji, nudimo ne samo vrhunske proizvode već i strateško partnerstvo koje podržava vaš uspeh i rast. Sa jasnim fokusom na tehnološku inovaciju i kvalitet, garantujemo da ćemo vaše laboratorijske izazove pretvoriti u uspehe.

Name: TeT Metalli e Compositi srl
Description:
T&T Metalli e Compositi srl is a service centre located in the centre of Italy, on the outskirts of Rome. 
It is a leader in its field for both composites and metal divisions.
The composites division deals with the distribution of raw materials and accessories for the production of fiberglass and advanced composites to company both in the main sectors (industry, shipping, transport) than in highly specialized market niches.
T&T is the only Italian distributor of Ineos resins and gelcoats and Derakane anti-corrosion resins. 
Our range goes from commonly used products (resins, gelcoats, mastics, catalysts, roving, mat, multiaxial, etc.) to more advanced products.

Regarding metal division, T&T  has a line of coil cutters for the production of sheets that range in thickness from 0.4 to 6 mm of h 1500, and from 4 to 18 mm of h 2500.
It has also a slitter to cut conveyor belts ranging in size from 0.4 to 3 mm, with a thickness of h 1500, as well as stripping machine and a glazing system and scotch-bright line for inox sheets.
The range of products include aluminium, stainless steel and electro galvanized steel.

At Chemport, we are committed to supporting your growth by delivering exceptional products and services that align with your business objectives.

Name: SILKFLEX POLYMERS (INDIA) LIMITED
Description:
Welcome to SILKFLEX POLYMERS (INDIA) LIMITED, formerly known as Silkflex Polymers (India) Private Limited. We are grateful for your interest in our company and for taking the time to explore it.

Silkflex Polymers India Limited specialises in the trading of textile printing inks and water-based wood coating polymers sourced from the renowned Malaysian brand, Silkflex Polymers SDN BHD which is equipped with a cutting-edge thermal reactor and has a production capacity of 1000 MT per month. Setting us apart from competitors, our inks are meticulously crafted in-house, from the polymer/resin stage to the final ink. This unique process enables us to customize inks for specific applications and desired effects, guaranteeing top-notch performance and quality.

As a nominated supplier for esteemed brands like PUMA, C&A, and H&M, Silkflex Polymers Sdn. Bhd. has earned the trust of major apparel companies worldwide. Our reach extends to European markets such as Portugal, Turkey, and Spain, solidifying our position as a preferred choice in the industry.

Furthermore, Silkflex Polymers Sdn. Bhd. Malaysia proudly introduces Silkflex Wood Coating, a water-based wood coating product known for its quick hard finishes achieved in a low VOC formulation. This eco-friendly wood coating technology is utilized by top furniture brands globally and in prominent buildings, offering a sustainable alternative to conventional solvent-based wood lacquers.

We invite you to join us in exploring innovative solutions and sustainable products.

Name: Ankateksu
Description:
Ankatek Kimyasal Maddeler Arıtma olarak, endüstriyel tesislere yönelik kimyasal çözümler sunarak enerji verimliliğini artırmayı, korozyon önlemeyi ve sistem verimliliğini iyileştirmeyi amaçlıyoruz. Amerikan kimya devi NALCO'nun Türkiye distribütörlerinden biri olarak, kazanlar, soğutma kuleleri, ters ozmoz sistemleri (RO), yumuşatma sistemleri gibi birçok alanda gelişmiş kimyasal çözümler sağlıyoruz.

Ayrıca, atık su arıtma, su geri kazanımı ve jeotermal sistemler için de atık su arıtma ve buhar hattı koruma alanında sürdürülebilir çözümler sunarak çevresel etkileri azaltıyor ve sektörün ihtiyaçlarına uygun en yeni teknolojileri uyguluyoruz.

İş ortaklarımızla güçlü iş birlikleri kurarak, sanayi tesislerinin operasyonel verimliliğini ve sürdürülebilirliğini artırmaya devam ediyoruz.

Name: S. Sørensen - Thisted
Description:
S. Sørensen – Thisted er en Dansk, familieejet og drevet virksomhed, som strækker sine aner tilbage til 1942. Vi har historisk ernæret os som totalleverandør til dansk mejeribrug med domicil og egne lagerfaciliteter, tapperi, og tankanlæg i Thisted, Nordjylland.

Det er vi fortsat, og vi er stolte af, at vi gennem årene har opbygget en stærk kundegruppe. Eftersom vi konstaterede, at dansk mejeribrug i antal var vigende har vi indenfor de sidste 25 år udvidet vores produktsortiment, så det passer til en lang række forskellige brancher.

Vi sælger i dag primært grovkemi, ingredienser, tilsætningsstoffer, rengøringsmidler og salt til en lang række brancher såsom mejerier, slagterier, fiskeindustri, svømmebade, galvanoindustri, renseanlæg, kraftvarmeværker, vandværker med mere, primært i Jylland og på Fyn, men også på Sjælland.

Vi har egne lastbiler og chauffører, der i fast turnuskørsel dækker Jylland og Fyn og er derfor leveringsdygtige med kort leveringstid og en ufortrøden leveringssikkerhed, samt service.

Vi kan, blandt andet, tilbyde individuelle leveringsløsninger, hvor der eksempelvis ringes til den respektive kunde en time før levering, eller der på en fastlagt dag bliver ringet til kunden for, at afdække eventuelle mangler, som skal med på vores lastbiler.

Polyfunctional aziridines are very versatile molecules with wide-ranging usage in coatings and adhesive applications. Addition to both, water borne or solvent based systems, produces a marked improvement in water, chemical, abrasion, and humidity resistance. 

It is extensively employed with acrylic emulsions or waterborne urethane polymers in a variety of applications such as:

•	Adhesives
•	Pressure sensitive adhesives, tapes, labels, automobile trim. 
•	Protective films, plastic films.
•	Wood coatings and industrial varnishes

Name: Nanovet Limited
Description:
Nanovet Limited was founded in 2012 with a view to creating a range of globally unique water-based hand and multi-surface disinfectants, and an Organic Cleaner/Degreaser for use in Veterinary science, food preparation, healthcare, education, transportation, and the leisure/hospitality industry.
We have also created an environmentally friendly and safe to use two stage mould treatment.

Working closely with our existing manufacturing partners we were able to create these globally unique water-based products and have spent several years refining them and carrying out many certifications using UKAS accredited laboratories.

We now have a global network of clients and provide them with bespoke protocols to carry out mould treatment and hand and surface sanitisation as each client has specific needs and targets.We have developed and are further developing products to address these problems, preventing them before they occur. 
We are working with specialist clients in sectors that include healthcare, hospitality, leisure, the department for education, military, police, rail, aviation, retail, food, beverage, agriculture, zoology, veterinary science, and the marine industry.

Our Pathogon multi-surface disinfectant product offers a proven and unique residual efficacy technology.
Our residual efficacy technology improves hygiene and reduces the risk of contamination and infection.

Due to the special formulation the product contains fewer chemical ingredients, is more effective and has a lower burden on the environment. It has a unique formulation that kills all known pathogens and prevents mutations. It is also Halal certified.

The product not only eradicates but also prevents the growth of microorganisms on surfaces. The biocidal compounds that we use undergo a special production procedure and this builds a stabilized micelle structure that is safe for use on food preparation surfaces, is animal friendly and not harmful to humans.

Name: Energy Effective Ltd
Description:
Energy Effective Ltd is proud to be a UK distributor of HydroMX, an innovative nanofluid that delivers substantial energy savings of 20% to 35% in heating, cooling, and heat recovery systems. Proven over a decade of use across Europe and the USA, this cutting-edge technology is designed to replace conventional water or water/glycol mixtures, making systems more efficient and sustainable.

At Energy Effective, we are dedicated to helping organisations achieve real energy reductions. HydroMX leverages advanced nanotechnology to radically enhance thermal transfer, improving energy efficiency in a way that was previously unattainable with traditional fluids. It enables heat to be transferred up to 37% faster, delivering impressive results across a variety of applications:

 > Heating systems
>  Air Source Heat Pumps (Air to Water)
>  Cooling systems (chilled water loops, liquid-cooled chillers)
>  Heat recovery systems (run-around coils, ground and water source heat pumps)

We stand by our product's performance. That's why we guarantee a minimum 20% energy saving or performance improvement, backed by precise monitoring during installation. 

HydroMX has been specified for landmark projects such as the Empire State Building, where only the most rigorous standards apply.

With HydroMX, your organisation can take a significant step towards meeting carbon reduction targets while cutting operational costs. Let us show you how this technology can revolutionise your energy efficiency efforts.

Get in touch today to explore the potential benefits of HydroMX for your systems.

Name: Ecomet 2 S.r.l.
Description:
Ecomet è un'azienda con una storia lunga un secolo, specializzata nel settore galvanico. Con l'esperienza maturata in oltre 100 anni, Ecomet si impegna a proporre ai propri clienti i prodotti tecnologicamente ed economicamente migliori. L'azienda offre una vasta gamma di materie prime e processi galvanici, tra cui metalli, prodotti chimici, rivestimenti protettivi, rivestimenti decorativi e rivestimenti funzionali.

Ecomet fornisce anche sgrassanti e decapanti impiegati nell'industria galvanica e per i trattamenti superficiali in genere, così come preformati e composti chimici per i processi di vibrofinitura. Inoltre, Ecomet offre prodotti per la depurazione delle acque reflue, tra cui antischiuma, flocculanti, carboni attivi, calce idrata, acido solfammico, coagulanti, polielettroliti e cloruro ferrico.

L'attività di Ecomet, iniziata nel 1921 e inizialmente incentrata sulla fabbricazione e commercio di paste per pulitrici, si è trasformata e convertita nel tempo in impianti e prodotti per l'industria galvanica e il trattamento superficiale dei metalli. L'azienda fornisce attrezzature e ausiliari per il settore della vibrofinitura, per il settore galvanico e la depurazione delle acque reflue.

We are also an appointed Worldwide Agent/Distributor for the Electro-fused Magnesium Oxide range as manufactured by Peňoles, Mexico together with the products manufactured by K & S Kali, Germany. We also provide in-house  food/ neutraceutical specialist packaging/blending within our custom built production facility offering both foil/food approved plastic sachets to suit customers individual requirements for powder products. 

Altogether we supply materials to a wide spectrum of industries from the food, neutraceutical and pharmaceutical industry to the heating element, rubber, plastics and oil industry.

Name: PT. Telagasakti Sakatautama
Description:
PT. Telagasakti Sakatautama berdiri sejak tahun 1993 adalah perusahaan distributor dan supplier terkemuka yang berbasis di Jakarta dengan jaringan kemitraan bisnis skala nasional yang memungkinkan kami untuk melayani Anda dalam menyediakan rangkaian produk peralatan laboratorium terluas ke berbagai industri seperti: Food & Beverage, Mining, Life-sciences, Research Institute, Chemical, Clinical dan Pharmaceutical.

Tujuan kami adalah untuk mendukung kemajuan Science & Technology dengan terus memperluas jangkauan produk kami. Kami sangat percaya pentingnya membangun hubungan bisnis yang dapat dipercaya oleh semua pelanggan kami. Kami telah menjadi pemasok nasional terkemuka dari rangkaian lengkap produk laboratorium dan industri, instrumentasi dan peralatan lainnya yang mencakup media Microbiology, Analytical Reagent, Chromatography, Glassware, Food testing, Test kit, Water Treatment, Plastic Ware, Filter Paper, Water Treatment & Analysis, Buffer Solution, Bioscience, LSS, Beaker glass, Food Grade & Pharma Raw Material dan lain-lain. Seluruh produk kami menjalani pemeriksaan QA & QC yang ketat untuk menjaga kualitas produk kami yang sangat baik.

PT. Telagasakti Sakatautama berkomitmen untuk terus menyediakan produk berkualitas tinggi kepada pelanggan kami dan memastikan pengalaman dimanfaatkan dengan baik untuk menghadirkan produk-produk mutakhir dengan harga kompetitif. Kami mengedepankan pengalaman bertahun-tahun dalam pengetahuan teknis serta penjualan konsultatif dan membantu Anda dalam pemilihan dan konfigurasi produk. Kami telah menjalankan bisnis ini selama lebih dari 30 tahun dan akan terus memberikan Anda pelayanan dengan produk terbaik, meningkatkan efisiensi di lab, mengurangi biaya, dan mempermudah pekerjaan Anda. Memberikan value yang besar kepada pelanggan adalah prioritas utama kami.
Location: Jakarta Timur, Daerah Khusus Ibukota Jakarta

سرو شیمی یک فروشگاه تخصصی در حوزهی مواد شیمیایی، زیستی و نهادههای کشاورزی است که با تکیه بر دانش علمی، تجربه میدانی و رویکردی مسئولانه، به کشاورزان، باغداران و مصرفکنندگان نهایی کمک میکند تا انتخابهایی آگاهانه، مؤثر و پایدار داشته باشند.

ما بر این باوریم که ترکیب علم و طبیعت، کلید آیندهی کشاورزی ایران است. از این رو، با ارائهی محصولاتی منتخب، کاربردی و متناسب با شرایط واقعی زمینهای کشاورزی کشور، تلاش میکنیم بهرهوری را افزایش دهیم و وابستگی به نهادههای پرهزینه و ناسازگار را کاهش دهیم.

در ظاهر، ما یک فروشگاه رسمی، تخصصی و گسترده هستیم؛ اما در عمل، کاملاً متمرکز، پاسخگو و نزدیک به نیازهای واقعی کشاورزان ایرانی عمل میکنیم.

آنچه ما را متمایز میکند:
ارائهی ترکیبی از کودهای آلی، زیستی و شیمیایی مؤثر با تمرکز بر کارایی و قیمت منطقی

تأمین مواد شیمیایی عمومی و صنعتی سبک برای استفاده در کشاورزی، کارگاههای کوچک یا دانشگاهها

عرضهی ترکیبات زیستی نوین مثل هیومیک اسید، EM، و کودهای محرک طبیعی

مشاوره رایگان و علمی پیش از خرید، بر پایهی نیاز خاک، نوع کشت و هدف کشاورز

بستهبندی اختصاصی و ارسال سریع به سراسر ایران

وضعیت حقوقی و مجوزها
سرو شیمی دارای مجوز رسمی برای بستهبندی انواع کود و نهاده کشاورزی از اتحادیه صنف مربوطه در استان همدان است (شماره مجوز: 1403068615).


همچنین سرو شیمی در چارچوب مجوز کسبوکار خانگی تولید و بستهبندی کودهای ارگانیک از درگاه ملی مجوزها اقدام به تولید کود مرغی مایع و کود کامل آلی مایع مینمایند.

چشمانداز ما
ما بهدنبال ساختن آیندهای هستیم که در آن کشاورزی ایران، نهتنها پربازدهتر، بلکه سالمتر، مستقلتر و سازگارتر با خاک و آب کشور باشد.
در این مسیر، سرو شیمی میکوشد مرجعی مطمئن برای همهی کسانی باشد که به دنبال راهحلهای علمی و پایدار در کشاورزی و صنایع مرتبطاند.

Name: ARCin Furniture Hotmelt Systems
Description:
ARC-in Furniture Hotmelt Systems (ARCin Sp. z o.o.) is a leader in innovative adhesive technologies for upholstered furniture manufacturing. Our patented systems, recognized in both Europe and the United States, revolutionize production processes with precise solutions based on hotmelt adhesives and advanced application equipment. 

We specialize in delivering efficient and eco-friendly technologies, such as hotmelt spray systems. These systems enable both manual and automated bonding, reduce adhesive consumption, and allow bonding under high-tension capabilities unmatched by competing products. Our solutions are used to bond foam, felt, wadding, wood, metal, plastics, and other materials previously considered unbondable. They ensure stability even at low temperatures while optimizing energy consumption. 

Our offerings include: 

- Unique ARC-in FH spray systems consist of heated hoses, high-performance manual guns, melters, and specialized nozzles for hotmelt adhesives. 
- Automated adhesive heads and customized solutions tailored to meet client requirements and production processes. 
- Unique hotmelt adhesive formulations specifically designed to work seamlessly with our equipment, effectively supporting our clients' technological processes in the production of upholstered furniture. 
- Stop&Go systems and zero-emission solutions compliant with the EU CS3D directive. 

We are committed to sustainability and environmental protection by providing safe adhesives for people, the planet, and even children under three years old. With ARC-in FH technology, we support linear, serial, and robotic production in the upholstery industry. 

ARC-in offers maintenance services, equipment cleaning, and technical support to ensure production remains reliable and efficient, meeting the demands of the modern furniture manufacturing industry.

Over the years, we’ve built up a solid portfolio that includes laboratory chemicals, analytical reagents, lab glassware and plasticware, HPLC & GC columns, syringe and membrane filters, laboratory instruments, bulk chemicals, and selected pharma-grade excipients.

To make it easier for labs and pharma companies to get the materials they need, with the documentation they need, from an authorised and dependable source.

Galata Oils, sizlere esneklik sunar. Farklı ambalaj boyutlarına sahip ürünlerle, ihtiyaçlarınıza uygun seçenekler sunarız. Ayrıca, hızlı ve güvenilir teslimat hizmetimizle siparişlerinizi zamanında elinize ulaştırırız.

Galata Oils ekibi, dünya genelindeki ilaç ve kozmetik sektöründen, butik üretim yapan küçük firmalardan, araştırmacılardan ve aromaterapi ile uğraşan sağlık profesyonellerine kadar uzanan geniş bir kullanıcı kitlesine hitap etmektedir Uzman kadromuz sizlere en güncel bilgileri ve en iyi ürünleri sunmamıza yardımcı olur. İhtiyaçlarınıza özgü çözümler üretebilmek için bu değerli işbirliklerini sürdürmek için buradayız.

Biz müşterilerimizin memnuniyetini en üst seviyede tutmayı amaçlıyoruz. Müşteri odaklı bir yaklaşım benimsemek, sizlere en iyi deneyimi sunmamızı sağlar. Size yardımcı olmak, sorularınızı yanıtlamak ve ihtiyaçlarınıza hızlı ve etkili bir şekilde cevap vermek bizim için bir onurdur.

Galata Oils ailesi olarak, doğanın gücünü sizinle paylaşmaktan büyük bir mutluluk duyuyoruz. Kalite, uzmanlık, müşteri odaklılık ve esneklik, Galata Oils ile bir araya gelir. Sizlere daha iyi bir ürün ve yaşam kalitesi sunmak için buradayız.

Name: Night Saver
Description: Vergewaltigung, Raub und Tod. All dies sind mögliche Auswirkung einer Betäubung durch KO-Tropfen. Das Problem der Vergiftungen durch KO-Tropfen in Getränken wird auf Clubs und Festivals immer gravierender. Dazu kommt das konstante subjektive Unwohlgefühl von Mädchen, die immer den Gedanken im Hinterkopf haben: „Vielleicht ist ja etwas in meinem Drink“. Um sowohl diese Angstgedanken auszulöschen und gleichzeitig vor vergifteten Getränken zu warnen hat sich das Team von Night Saver als Lösung eine Visitenkartengroße Testkarte überlegt, auf der man sein Getränk auf GHB und Ketamin testen kann. Dies sind die meistverwendeten Betäubungsmittel in der Clubscene. Mit dem Strohhalm tropft man sein Getränk auf die vorgesehene Fläche auf der Karte und innerhalb von Sekunden bekommt man das Ergebnis mittels Verfärbung angezeigt. Die Karten passen perfekt in jede Geldbörse und für diejenigen, die nur Ihr Handy in den Club mitreinnehmen, passt die Karte auch perfekt in jede Handyhülle.

Name: Kimia Aqua Solutions SAS
Description:
En KIMIA Aqua Solutions, filial en Colombia de SPIN Grupo, ofrecemos soluciones integrales para el tratamiento de agua con el respaldo de más de 57 años de experiencia en Latinoamérica. Con sede en Bogotá, somos especialistas en cloración y desinfección, potabilización, tratamiento de aguas residuales e industriales, filtración y análisis de parámetros físico-químicos, combinando productos de alto rendimiento, asesoría técnica especializada y tecnología de vanguardia.

Nuestro compromiso es garantizar calidad, sostenibilidad y eficiencia, apoyando a industrias clave como la alimenticia, bebidas, agropecuaria, textil, farmacéutica, láctea, florícola, pesquera, avícola y agrícola.

Formamos parte de un plan de expansión internacional que integra la experiencia local con el respaldo global de SPIN Grupo, asegurando a nuestros clientes soluciones alineadas con las normativas ambientales y sanitarias de Colombia (Decretos 3930/2010, 1575/2007, Resoluciones 2115/2007, 631/2015, entre otras) y con certificaciones internacionales como NSF/ANSI 60 y 61, EPA y FDA.

Nuestra propuesta de valor se centra en:

• Innovación en productos químicos de desinfección y potabilización (INDIGO, PROVICHLOR, PROVITAB 3, SANIFONT).
• Tecnología de análisis y monitoreo (LOVIBOND).
• Sistemas de filtración y suavización de agua de última generación (KINETICO).
•Acompañamiento técnico especializado con cobertura nacional.

Endüstriyel Çözümlerde Suyunuzun Güvenilir Ortağı

Merhaba, Entegre Kimya olarak, endüstriyel su şartlandırma ve havuz kimyasalları sektöründe, güvenilirliği ve kaliteyi ön planda tutan köklü bir kuruluşuz. Sektörün önde gelen birçok markası için gerçekleştirdiğimiz fason üretim ile uzmanlığımızı ve üretim kalitemizi taçlandırıyoruz.

 Neler Yapıyoruz?

· Özel Formülasyonlar: Buhar kazanı, soğutma suyu, kapalı devre sistemler ve reverse ozmos (ters ozmoz) süreçleri için yüksek verimli kimyasallar.
· Çevre ve Su Arıtma Çözümleri: Atık su arıtma ve havuz suyu sistemleri için kapsamlı kimyasal üretimi.
· Fason (Contract) Üretim: Sektördeki uzman firmalar için, kendi markalarına özel yüksek kaliteli üretim.
· Teknik Danışmanlık ve Sahip Desteği: Uzman mühendis ve teknisyen kadromuzla tüm uygulama alanlarında çözüm ortağınız oluyoruz.

 Değerlerimiz & Taahhüdümüz:

· Kalite: Tüm süreçlerimizin merkezinde değişmeyen bir kalite anlayışı var.
· Etik & Şeffaflık: Müşteri ve iş ortaklıklarımız, karşılıklı güven ve saygı üzerine inşa edilir.
· Sürdürülebilirlik: Çevreye duyarlı üretim anlayışıyla, geleceğe değer katıyoruz.
· Yenilikçilik: Gelişen teknolojileri ve endüstriyel ihtiyaçları takip ederek, ürün portföyümüzü sürekli geliştiriyoruz.

Sektördeki deneyimimiz ve uzman kadromuzla, suyunuzla ilgili her türlü zorluğa çözüm üretmek için buradayız.

 İş birliği fırsatlarını konuşalım. Şirket sayfamızı takip edin, bizimle iletişime geçmekten çekinmeyin.

Name: OOO "The GreaseMan"

- Food-Grade Lubricants and Greases compliant with strict safety standards in food, beverage, and pharmaceutical production.

- Greasing Equipment, including manual and automatic systems, perma-tec lubricators, and simatec devices to ensure consistent lubrication and lower maintenance costs.

- Industrial Cleaners that effectively remove contaminants and extend equipment service life.

- Anti-Friction Coatings and Pastes from Molykote and Krytox, reducing wear and improving performance.

Our experienced team provides professional consultation to help you choose and apply the right products for your operation. Whether you need a reliable lubricant for high-speed bearings or a complete automated lubrication system, we guide you every step of the way.

At OOO "The Greaseman," we are dedicated to supplying premium products backed by deep technical expertise. Our goal is to be Uzbekistan’s most advanced and trusted provider of lubricants, greasing solutions, and maintenance tools.

Contact us to learn how we can help protect your equipment, reduce downtime, and optimize your production processes.

Sinopharm Foreign Trade, anteriormente conocida como Corporación de Cooperación Técnica y Económica Extranjera Farmacéutica de China, es una empresa directamente afiliada a la antigua Administración Estatal de Medicina (antecesora de la Administración Estatal de Alimentos y Medicamentos) y una de las primeras empresas en China en participar en operaciones internacionales en el campo de la medicina y la salud. En 1998, Sinopharm Foreign Trade formó el Grupo Sinopharm con otras tres empresas directamente dependientes de la Administración Estatal de Medicina. En 2010, Sinopharm Foreign Trade se reorganizó con otras dos empresas estatales para formar Sinopharm International, que está afiliada al Grupo Sinopharm.

Description:
Centrochem, plastik hammadde tedariğinde Türkiye ve CIS ülkelerinde kaliteli hizmet sunmak amacıyla 2014 yılında kurulmuştur.

Şirketimiz  Ukrayna, Avrupa Birliği, Orta Doğu ve pek çok ülkenin lider polimer üreticileri ile olan güçlü bağlantıları sayesinde tedarikçiler ile son kullanıcılar arasında güçlü ve uzun vadeli ilişkiler kurmayı ilke edinmiştir.

Bizim imajını ürünlerin kalitesi ve bulunabilirliği doğrultusunda geliştirmeyi hedeflemiş olup bu doğrultuda çalışmalarımıza devam ettirmekteyiz .

Bu ilkeler ve hedefler sayesinde Türkiye’de polimer hammaddeler pazarında lider firmalar arasında yer almayı başarmış bulunmaktayız .

Ürün yelpazesi ve nitelikli ve tecrübeli personel, şirketin başarısı için önemli katkıda bulunmaktadır. Gelişmiş depo ağı ve düzenli lojistik organizasyonuna dayalı satışlar gerçekleştiriyoruz.

Türkiyede lider olabilmek adına uzmanlığımızı kullanarak yeni pazarlar ve ürün araştırması yapıp ticaret ve imkanlarımızı güçlendiriyoruz .

 
Üreticilere ve son kullanıcılara kolay erişim sağlayabilmek adına yıllar boyunca İstanbul, İzmir ve Mersin (Türkiye), Odessa (Ukrayna) ve Budapeşte (Macaristan) depolama ağı geliştirdik  .

Türkiye, Bulgaristan, Romanya, Moldova Cumhuriyeti, Ukrayna, Çek Cumhuriyeti ve Macaristan'daki müşterilerimize farklı menşeili HDPE, LDPE, PP-Homo ve PVC gibi farklı polimer hammaddelerle tedarik imkânı sunuyoruz.

The company was established in 2014 in order to provide high-quality service in distributing of plastic raw material, resins, isopropanol, synthetic and mineral oils in markets of Turkey and countries of the Black Sea region.

Our advantages are strong connections with leading polymer manufacturers in European Union, Middle East and the rest of the world. We are committed to build long-term relationships with both suppliers and the end users. Steady product quality and consistent availability are the remarkable features of our business conduct.

Name: P.C.Shroff and Company
Description:
Established in 1947 in Baroda, Gujarat, P.C. Shroff & Co. has evolved into a distinguished entity renowned for its integrity and commitment to excellence. Founded by the late Bhanubhai Shroff and late Rasikbhai Shroff.

Guided by unwavering principles, our journey began with esteemed associations. Since 1961, we have been distributors for Union Carbide, facilitating the marketing of LDPE pipes and chemicals. In 1967, GSFC Ltd. Baroda appointed us as dealers for marketing Sulphuric Acid 98%, a vital chemical for numerous industries.

Further enriching our portfolio, we acquired the distributorship of M/s Standard Alkali, a prominent entity of the Stanrose group of Mafatlal, in 1967. This partnership expanded our offerings to include Caustic Soda lye and flakes, Caustic Potash lye and flake, and Liquid Chlorine.

In 1971, we became distributors for M/s Polyolefins Ind. Ltd. (PIL), a division of the Arvind Mafatlal group, for marketing HDPE pipes and fittings, enhancing our scope in the industry.

Today, under the stewardship of Krishnakant Shroff, Vrajesh Shroff, Niraj Shroff and Shalin Shroff, P.C. Shroff & Co. stands as the preeminent "House of Acids & Chemicals." Representing esteemed companies like GSFC Ltd., Punjab Chemicals & Crop Protection, Epigral Limited and Aarti industris  we cater to diverse sectors including textiles, pharmaceuticals, petrochemicals, and more.

Our commitment to delivering unparalleled quality at competitive prices remains steadfast. Customer satisfaction is not merely our motto; it is our unwavering pursuit.

Connect with us to explore synergies and discover how P.C. Shroff & Co. can be your trusted partner in chemical solutions.

Name: Rota Hırdavatçılık
Description:
Mazisi 1978’e dayanan ve 1982’de İstanbul Karaköy’de Rota Hırdavatçılık deneyimli kadrosu ile gemi, fabrika, inşaat ve otomotiv sektörlerinde hizmet vermektedir. 
Endüstriyel bakım-onarım ürünleri ile dünyaca tanınan HENKEL, LOCTITE, DEVCON markalarının ana bayiliklerine ve 1998 yılında sızdırmazlık alanında ileride ülkemizde kalitesi ile daha da tanınacak olan tescilli marka ROLITE’ın Asbestsiz Contalık Levhalarının ve Yün Keçelerinin distribütörlüğünü eklemiştir.

Denizcilik sektöründe talep gören CORDOBOND Epoksi Bakım Onarım Sistemleri ürünleri temsilciliğini 2004 yılında ve 2005 yılında da yine epoksi yapıştırıcılar dünyasında bu sefer daha çok butik kullanıcılarının fan kulüpleri ile tanınan JB-WELD Company ürünlerinin temsilciliğini bünyesine katmıştır.

Zaman içerisinde özellikle üreticilerin talebi üzerine ihtiyaçları yerinde görmek ve çözüm üretebilmek adına daha fazla dışarı açılma gereği hisseden firma, WINKEL ürünleri Marmara Bölge Temsilciliği ve kendi markası KLEBOND’un tescilini alarak yoğun temposunu daha da arttırmış ve 2008 yılında İstanbul Pendik’te şube açma gereğini hissetmiştir.

Özellikle araştırmacı ve geliştirmeci ruhunu dinç tutarak müşterilerinin sorunlarına ve arayışlarına ekonomik ve işlevsel çözümler sunmaya samimiyetle gayret eden Rota Hırdavat, her geçen gün bir tedarikçiden daha fazlası olmaya çalışmakta ve sizlere hizmet vermenin kıvancını taşımaktadır.
