2) SCR (Selective Catalytic Reduction): We provide urea or ammonia solutions for converting NOx into harmless nitrogen and water, supporting SCR systems.

3) EGR (Exhaust Gas Recirculation): Our products aid in recirculating exhaust to reduce NOx formation, maintaining compliance and efficiency.

For Water Treatment Providers: We provide essential chemicals like coagulants, flocculants, and disinfectants for effective water treatment, along with consultancy to optimize processes and ensure regulatory compliance.

For Factories and Industrial Users: Our extensive range covers processing, maintenance, and cleaning chemicals, ensuring seamless operations and high-quality production outputs.

For Businesses Requiring Cleaning Chemicals and Raw Materials: From industrial cleaning agents to critical manufacturing ingredients, our products guarantee purity and performance, supporting diverse industry needs.

Choose FEGV for sustainable, reliable, and efficient chemical solutions tailored to your industry requirements.

Meta-Aramid Excellence:

Menjadi mitra terpercaya dan terdepan dalam penyediaan pelumas industri, fuel additive, dan sukucadang mesin, dengan komitmen terhadap kualitas, keberlanjutandan kepuasan pelanggan di seluruh sektor industri.

Misi:
1. Menyediakan Produk Berkualitas Tinggi. Menyediakan oli pelumas food grade dan non-food grade, fuel additive, serta suku cadang mesin industri yang memenuhi standar nasional dan internasional.

2. Mendukung Efisiensi Operasional Pelanggan. Menyediakan solusi yang mendukung kinerja dan efisiensi operasional mesinindustri melalui produk yang andal dan layanan yang responsif. 

3. Menjaga Kepatuhan Terhadan Standar Keamanan dan Lingkungan. Berkomitmen terhadap produk yang ramah lingkungan dan sesuai denganregulasi industri, terutama dalam sektor makanan dan minuman.

AGRICARE está comprometida a apoyar a agricultores en la optimización del rendimiento de sus cultivos ofreciendo productos confiables y un acompañamiento técnico permanente.

Nuestras oficinas centrales se encuentran en Guadalajara, Jalisco, y contamos con una red de distribución que abarca el territorio nacional.

Misión:
· Proveer soluciones innovadoras, sostenibles y de alta calidad que impulsen la productividad agrícola, mejoren la calidad de los cultivos y generen un impacto positivo en los agricultores, cudando al medio ambiente y la socieda en general.

Visión:
· Ser líderes en el mercado de la industria agrícola, reconocidos por nuestra capacidad de innovación, el compromiso con la sostenibilidad y la calidad de nuestros productos, promoviendo una agricultura responsable, eficiente y orientada al desarrollo del campo mexicano.

Nuestra matriz, TIDE Group, fundada en 1994, se especializa en la fabricación, registro y comercialización de una amplia variedad de productos para la protección de cultivos.

Desde nuestra planta de producción en Hangzhou, China, TIDE Group fabrica ingredientes activos de alta calidad que abastecen tanto a AGRICARE México como a diversos mercados a nivel global; principalmente Estados Unidos de América, Canadá, Brasil y Europa entre otros.

Our products include all stable isotopes below the second row of the periodic table. If you are interested in any particular isotope of any enrichment and quantity please let us know and we will supply it!

Description:
Embracing a Greener Future with MECSERVICES PTY

At MECSERVICES PTY, we believe in the transformative power of eco-friendly living. As a dedicated supplier of eco-friendly cleaning products, pet supplies, and gear, we embody a commitment not only to our clients but to our planet and the furry companions we cherish.

Every day, we are inspired by the wonderful bond between humans and animals. We recognize that our pets bring joy, laughter, and unconditional love into our lives. But as custodians of that love, it's essential that we provide them with safe, sustainable products that do not harm our environment. Our line of biodegradable and non-toxic cleaning supplies means you can keep your home sparkling clean without compromising your values. We know, from personal experience, the importance of maintaining a healthy home for both our pets and families.

At MECSERVICES PTY, we strive to create a shopping experience that emphasizes not just the quality of our products but also their eco-friendliness. Each item we offer—from our gentle, plant-derived cleaners to our sustainably sourced pet products—is selected with care, ensuring they reduce waste and promote a healthier planet for generations to come. We are proud to offer alternatives that align with our belief in sustainability.

What sets us apart is our passion for what we do. We approach our work with enthusiasm and a sense of responsibility. We understand that together we can make a difference. Every time we choose an eco-friendly product, we take a step toward a better tomorrow—a tomorrow where our pets can roam free and our planet can thrive.

Join us on this inspiring journey toward sustainability. With MECSERVICES PTY, you’re not just purchasing products; you’re contributing to a movement that values eco-conscious living and celebrates the love we all have for our pets. Together, let’s clean with purpose, play with passion, and protect our precious earth for the furry friends that mean the world to us.

Name: Kebco Nordic
Description:
Kebco Nordic AS ble grunnlagt i september 2009. og har siden 2020 vært 100% norskeid.

Gjennom årene har vi etablert gode samarbeid med ledende produsenter, som vi anser som de fremste innen sine felt. I tillegg utvikler vi kontinuerlig våre egne produkter med spesifikke egenskaper. Vi er stolte av å si «Kjøp KEBCO, når kvalitet teller!» og streber alltid etter å levere det lille ekstra.

Innenfor alle produktområder har vi etablert partnerskap med de beste produsentene nasjonalt og internasjonalt. Dette samarbeidet gir oss muligheten til å kontinuerlig forbedre og utvide vårt produktsortiment. Produktutviklingen skjer ofte i respons på våre kunders spesifikke krav og ønsker angående bruksområder og effekt. Dette gjør at vi tilpasser vårt sortiment i tråd med gjeldende krav til helse, miljø og sikkerhet. Målet vårt er å ha de mest tilfredse kundene i vår bransje. Vårt sortiment gjennomgår en grundig kvalitetssikring. I tillegg tilbyr vi skreddersydde produkter med våre kunders egne merkevarer, fra utkast til ferdig produkt.

Vi legger stor vekt på et engasjerende samspill for å bidra til suksessen til både oss selv og våre kunder. Vårt salgsteam etablerer meningsfulle relasjoner med kundene våre, og gjennom denne dialogen får vi innsikt i deres nøyaktige behov. Dette gjør det mulig for oss å anbefale produkter og metoder som løser oppgavene deres på en effektiv og skånsom måte. Vi vet hva som fungerer hvor og hvorfor – bare utfordre oss!

Produktutvikling er en prioritet for Kebco Nordic AS, og vi investerer tid og ressurser internt for å være i forkant. Sammen med våre kunder, samarbeidspartnere og egne erfaringer garanterer vi at vi også i fremtiden vil være ledende når det gjelder effektive produkter og oppfyllelse av fremtidige krav til helse, miljø og sikkerhet for den enkelte bruker. Vi tror at denne tilnærmingen til våre kunder bygger tillit og sikrer felles suksess.

Name: Czystoscihigiena.pl
Description:
Czystość i higiena to nasza misja w CzystosciHigiena.pl. Jako eksperci w dziedzinie profesjonalnych i gospodarczych środków czystości oraz nowoczesnych rozwiązań higienicznych, codziennie wspieramy klientów w utrzymaniu najwyższych standardów bezpieczeństwa i porządku.

Oferujemy szeroką gamę preparatów i akcesoriów dedykowanych branży HoReCa, przemysłowi, obiektom użyteczności publicznej oraz gospodarstwom domowym. Znajdziesz u nas skuteczne środki czystości, kosmetyki do pielęgnacji skóry, profesjonalne produkty do mycia i dezynfekcji rąk, kremy ochronne i regenerujące, a także specjalistyczne pasty BHP w zamkniętych systemach. Dzięki nim dbasz o najwyższy poziom higieny i komfortu pracy.

Jednak CzystosciHigiena.pl to nie tylko produkty – to również wsparcie w doborze i wdrażaniu systemów dozowania artykułów higienicznych, pozwalających zoptymalizować zużycie materiałów oraz dbać o środowisko. Kładziemy nacisk na proekologiczne rozwiązania, takie jak recykling ręczników papierowych czy nowoczesne maszyny czyszczące. Dodatkowo oferujemy wózki i mopy sprzątające, zaprojektowane z myślą o efektywnym i oszczędnym sprzątaniu – tak, by Twoja przestrzeń zawsze lśniła czystością.

Wiemy, jak istotne jest spełnienie norm i wymogów przetargowych, dlatego aktywnie wspieramy naszych partnerów w przygotowywaniu niezbędnej dokumentacji. Dzięki dużemu doświadczeniu w obsłudze różnorodnych zamówień publicznych i prywatnych potrafimy wskazać najbardziej opłacalne i funkcjonalne rozwiązania, zapewniając przy tym pełne wsparcie merytoryczne.

Zaufały nam liczne instytucje i firmy, ceniąc rzetelność, profesjonalizm oraz indywidualne podejście. Nieustannie się rozwijamy i śledzimy pojawiające się innowacje, by jeszcze lepiej odpowiadać na dynamicznie zmieniające się potrzeby rynku. Dołącz do grona zadowolonych klientów i przekonaj się, jak CzystosciHigiena.pl wspiera w budowaniu czystego, bezpiecznego i przyjaznego otoczenia – zarówno dla pracowników, jak i gości czy klientów.

Name: FERTAN LLC
Description:
FERTAN is a family-owned company that started production in 1979. Working from a small one-room basement apartment, founder Siegfried A. Lang worked diligently to create his first product—a formulated protective chemical barrier. Siegfried patented his rust converter and sold it from the trunk of his car.

Over four decades later, FERTAN delivers the same high-quality German designed solutions that help prevent, reduce, or eliminate corrosion. We support our international customers with their corrosion-related projects—classic car, motorcycle, home renovation, body shop, and large-scale industry—marine, freight, agriculture, and more.

Our customers have diverse needs, and FERTAN has adapted to meet those needs. Whether you require corrosion control for some metal fixings, specialized products for your classic car, or a tailor-made solution for corrosion elimination and protection specific to your industry, we are here to help.

FERTAN products also protect large metal structures like tanks, trailers, and cranes. Our innovative team of engineers continues to stay cutting-edge by bringing superior products to market. There is no limit to how far our products go. FERTAN products are found traveling the globe—supporting equipment and components used in the original manufacture of central technology systems.

Our steadfast commitment to exceeding industry standards has made us one of the largest European manufactures in anti-corrosive solutions.

Now joined by his son Bjoern Lang, Siegfried has built a company on honesty, fairness, transparency, and trust. Customer communication is still the foundation of their success. Forty years later, they always put their customer first.

The secret to FERTAN's ongoing success? A reasonable price point plus innovative technology. FERTAN goes beyond surface rust, removes 100% of the deepest underlying rust, and offers longer-term corrosion protection for your specific applications.

Name: ZeoMem Sweden AB
Description: ZeoMem Sweden AB is a spin-off company that emerged from 30 years of research about Zeolite membranes at Luleå University of Technology. The company was founded in 2015 with the aim to commercialize the unique properties of ultra-thin Zeolite membranes in separation and upgrading of a variety of different types of gas mixtures e.g. separation of carbon dioxide from synthesis gas or natural gas, separation of heavy hydrocarbons from natural gas, separation of ethylene from nitrogen, to name just a few. The driving force for this commercialization was the apparent need for a more energy efficient process in the gas separation industry. It offers an alternative to very energy consuming distillation and amine scrubber processes that need a lot of expensive heat. Membrane based chemical separations would be up to 10 times more energy efficient.

Name: Vefas Endüstriyel Ürünler A.Ş.
Description:
Vefas Endüstriyel, temizlik ürünlerinden teknik servis hizmetlerine, inşaattan elektrik altyapısına kadar kurumsal firmaların ihtiyaç duyduğu tüm hizmetleri tek çatı altında sunan entegre bir çözüm sağlayıcıdır.

2024 yılında Bursa’da kurulan firmamız; “her ihtiyacın tek noktadan karşılandığı bir iş modeli” sunarak, zamandan ve maliyetten tasarruf sağlamak isteyen tüm işletmelerin güvenilir partneri olmayı hedeflemektedir.

Vefas Endüstriyel, işletmelere yönelik geniş kapsamlı hizmet alanlarıyla faaliyet göstermektedir. Endüstriyel temizlik ürünleri, kağıt grubu sarf malzemeleri ve hijyen çözümleri başta olmak üzere, farklı sektörlerde faaliyet gösteren firmaların operasyonel ihtiyaçlarını bütünsel bir yaklaşımla ele almaktadır. Bununla birlikte, elektrik tesisatı ve bakım hizmetleri, doğalgaz sistemleri, endüstriyel mutfak kurulumu, soğuk oda sistemleri, inşaat ve tadilat projeleri gibi teknik alanlarda da uzmanlaşmış ekiplerle hizmet sunulmaktadır.

Hizmetlerin tamamı, çoklu tedarikçi ihtiyacını ortadan kaldıran entegre bir sistem içerisinde yürütülmekte; böylece müşterilere zamandan ve kaynaklardan tasarruf sağlayan yalın bir operasyon modeli sunulmaktadır. Kurumsal yapılara uygun, sürdürülebilir ve koordineli çözümler üretilerek, süreç yönetiminde güvenli ve ölçülebilir sonuçlar hedeflenmektedir.

Vefas Endüstriyel, kısa vadeli hizmet anlayışının ötesinde; kalite, süreklilik ve çözüm odaklılık ilkeleri çerçevesinde uzun vadeli iş ortaklıkları kurmayı esas almaktadır.

Description: Cuprivit olarak, bakır sülfat üretiminde en yüksek standartları koruma taahhüdümüz, modern ve tam donanımlı laboratuvarımızdan başlar. Ürünlerimizin kalitesini ve güvenilirliğini garanti altına almak için son teknoloji cihazlarla donatılmış laboratuvarımızda titiz test ve analizler gerçekleştiriyoruz. Çevreye olan duyarlılığımız, laboratuvar süreçlerimizde de  kendini gösterir. Kimyasal analizler sırasında atıkların minimuma indirilmesi ve geri dönüşüm yöntemlerinin kullanılması, çevre dostu  üretim taahhüdümüzün bir parçasıdır. Ayrıca, laboratuvarımızda kullanılan tüm kimyasalların güvenli ve etik bir şekilde bertaraf edilmesi  sağlanır.  Laboratuvarımız, yeni formülasyonlar ve daha verimli üretim teknikleri geliştirmek için sürekli olarak araştırma yapmaktadır. Bu çalışmalar, müşterilerimize rekabet avantajı sağlayan yenilikçi çözümler sunmamıza olanak tanır. Cuprivit olarak, müşterilerimize her zaman en iyi hizmeti sunmayı taahhüt ediyoruz. Daha fazla bilgi almak, ürünlerimizle ilgili detaylı  analiz raporlarına erişmek veya işbirliği fırsatları hakkında konuşmak için bizimle iletişime geçmekten çekinmeyin. Name: Ziemer Klaus GmbH
Description:
Die Klaus Ziemer GmbH wurde 1984 als Handels- und Beratungsunternehmen für Verbrauchmaterialien der Instrumentellen Analytik, vorzugsweise chromatographische Methoden, in Mannheim gegründet.

Im Jahre 1993 erfolgte die Angliederung einer Produktionsabteilung für die Herstellung von Polyurethan-Schaumstofffiltern (PUF) für die Gasprobennahme. PU-Filter werden in vielen Abmessungen sowohl ungereinigt als auch in gereinigter Form hergestellt und geliefert. 2001 erfolgte die Sitzverlegung nach Langerwehe/Kreis Düren, wo das Unternehmen auch heute noch beheimatet ist.

Ab 01.01.2018 gehört auch die Marke „A-Z Analytik Zubehör“, ehemals mit Sitz in Langen, mit Ihrem umfangreichen Lieferprogramm an Verbrauchsmaterialien und Zubehör für die Chromatographie zum Unternehmen.

Das Gesamtlieferprogramm beinhaltet die marktüblichen Trennsäulen für chromatographische Methoden wie GC, GPC, LC, HPLC und UHPLC sowie Kapillar-Elektrophorese (CE) aller bekannten Hersteller. Ein umfangreiches Sortiment an Verbrauchsmaterialien und Zubehörteilen rundet das Programm ab.

Die Klaus Ziemer GmbH ist u. a. autorisierter Fachhändler für Produkte führender internationaler Hersteller im Bereich Analytik, wie z.B. IDEX (Upchurch Scientific, Rheodyne), Trajan/SGE Analytical Science, CRS – Chromatography Research Supplies, Kimble-Kontes und andere. Eine ausführliche Aufstellung der in- und ausländischen Partnerfirmen finden Sie auf den Seiten "Liefermöglichkeit nach Produkt" und "Liefermöglichkeit nach Lieferant" hier im Internet und in unserem aktuellen Hauptkatalog.

Name: FROS Z.P.S. s.r.o.
Description:
Společnost FROS ZPS s.r.o. - chráněná dílna invalidů, velkoobchod drogerie, ochranné pracovní pomůcky, vznikla v roce 2003 jako dceřiná společnost velkoobchodu FROS Opava s.r.o. Z počátku byla její činnost zaměřena pouze na výrobu v textilní dílně, ovšem postupem času se výrobní činnosti začali rozšiřovat až do dnešní podoby viz. produkty a služby. V roce 2006 převzala kompletní aktivity od své mateřské společnosti a začala nabízet komplexní velkoobchodní služby v oblasti dodávek drogerie, kartáčoviny, hygienických výrobků a toaletních potřeb. V roce 2009 došlo k rozšíření portfolia nabízených produktů o výrobky z oblasti osobních ochranných pracovních pomůcek. Od července 2011 byl otevřen nový prodejní sklad maloobchodního typu spojený s obchodním oddělením o celkové rozloze 250m2, který byl především zaměřen na prodej ochranných pracovních pomůcek v co nejširším měřítku. S rozlohou 200m2 prodejní plochy byl největší prodejnou na ochranné pomůcky v Opavě. Náš obchod je v systému shop in shop společnosti Červa. 

V červenci roku 2022 došlo k přestěhování firmy do nově postavených vlastních prostor v obci Otice u Opavy, kde firma funguje primárně jako velkoobchod se vzorkovnou. Maloobchodní prodej zajišťuje naše druhá prodejna, která se nachází v centru Opavy.

Od roku 2006 se s převodem aktivity z mateřské firmy na FROS ZPS s.r.o. začal rozvíjet i třetí pilíř společnosti, dodávky dílů pro železniční vozy. Tato část našich podnikatelských aktivit dnes představuje velice klíčovou část společnosti.

MISJA i WIZJA FIRMY HQRS

Misją “HQRS” jest osiągnięcie pozycji lidera w branży systemów i środków czyszczących w Polsce, a tym samym zapewnienie naszym Klientom najwyższej jakości produktów i usług, profesjonalnej obsługi oraz doskonałej komunikacji z klientami.

Coraz bardziej zaawansowane rozwiązania technologiczne stymulują dynamiczny rozwój branży systemów i środków czystości. HQRS podąża za duchem szybko zmieniającego się rynku międzynarodowego analizując najnowsze trendy w branży i wprowadzając na rynek Polski zagranicznych liderów w swoich branżach. Celem tych działań jest dostarczenie polskim i zagranicznym klientom produktów i usług na najwyższym poziomie, zapewniających najwyższe międzynarodowe standardy zarządzania  oraz profesjonalne wsparcie.

Wspieramy nasz zespół doradców poprzez stałe podnoszenie ich kwalifikacji, pełne wykorzystanie specjalistycznego know-how firmy oraz potencjału intelektualnego i zawodowego naszych pracowników. Nasi doradcy oprócz wiedzy i doświadczenia w zakresie systemów i środków czyszczących posiadają wieloletnie doświadczenie branżowe, co ma również kluczowe znaczenie dla zapewnienia najwyższej jakości.

Stosowane rozwiązania przekładają się na wymierne korzyści dla naszych Klientów, takie jak redukcja kosztów, precyzyjna identyfikacja potrzeb czy szybka i profesjonalna obsługa.

Zależy nam na budowaniu długofalowych relacji z naszymi Klientami opartych na szacunku i wzajemnym zaufaniu, a dowodem skuteczności naszej strategii jest fakt, że ponad 80% Klientów pozostaje z nami na stałe.

JAKOŚĆ HQRS
jNajwiększy nacisk kładziemy na rzetelność i kompleksowość naszych doradców, dlatego szybko zyskaliśmy uznanie najbardziej wymagających klientów. O jakości naszych produktów najlepiej świadczy wysoka lojalność naszych klientów, z którymi łączą nas partnerskie i przyjacielskie relacje.

HQRS to doświadczony i profesjonalny zespół specjalistów opierający efektywność swojej pracy na najnowszych technologiach.

Description:

W sektorze rolniczym niestabilność dostaw, ograniczony asortyment i brak konkurencyjnych rozwiązań mogą wpływać na efektywność działalności. Mojak Bogdan Sadowski pomaga eliminować te wyzwania, pozwalając Ci skupić się na kluczowych celach biznesowych.
Jak wspieramy Twój biznes?
Elastyczne i Terminowe Dostawy
Dostosowujemy logistykę do Twoich potrzeb – od dużych zamówień po pojedyncze transporty. Dzięki współpracy z doświadczonymi firmami TSL minimalizujemy ryzyko opóźnień, zapewniając ciągłość produkcji.
Szeroka Oferta Produktowa
Oferujemy nawozy (NPK, DAP, MAP, sól potasowa, wapno granulowane, nawozy azotowe i specjalistyczne), materiał siewny (zboża, rośliny strączkowe, trawy) oraz innowacyjne rozwiązania, np. bakterie poprawiające żyzność gleby. Dzięki temu dostosujesz ofertę do swoich potrzeb, unikając braków i nadwyżek.
Konkurencyjne Warunki i Nowoczesne Rozwiązania
Bezpośrednia współpraca z producentami i importerami pozwala nam oferować wysokiej jakości produkty w atrakcyjnych cenach. Dzięki dostępowi do nowoczesnych technologii możesz wyprzedzać konkurencję.
Stabilna Sieć Logistyczna
Działamy na terenie całej UE, zapewniając terminowe i bezpieczne dostawy „just in time”. Twoje magazyny są optymalnie zaopatrzone, a produkcja przebiega bez przestojów.
Dlaczego warto nam zaufać?
 Gwarantujemy niezawodność dostaw.
 Oferujemy innowacyjne, wysokiej jakości produkty.
 Wspieramy rozwój Twojego biznesu, dostosowując się do zmian rynkowych.
Zapraszamy do współpracy!
Zostań naszym partnerem i usuń bariery ograniczające rozwój Twojej firmy. Skontaktuj się z nami i dowiedz się, jak możemy przyczynić się do Twojego sukcesu.

Łatwość aplikacji - Możliwość nakładania bezpośrednio na metal (DTM) skraca czas przygotowania powierzchni i upraszcza proces lakierowania.

Description:
Firmamız; endüstriyel temizlik, hijyen ve sağlık alanında geniş ürün yelpazesiyle profesyonel çözümler sunar. Kurumsal işletmelerin, fabrikaların, hastanelerin, otellerin ve kamu kurumlarının ihtiyaç duyduğu tüm sarf ve hijyen ürünlerini tek çatı altında birleştiriyoruz.

Sarf Grubu: Günlük kullanımda tüketimi yüksek olan mop, temizlik bezi, fırça, sünger gibi ürünlerle temizlik süreçlerini kolaylaştırıyoruz.

Kimyasal Grubu: Yüzey temizleyici, dezenfektan, yağ çözücü, lavabo açıcı, bulaşık ve çamaşır kimyasalları gibi güçlü ve etkili formüllerle hijyenin her aşamasında yanınızdayız.

Kağıt Grubu: Tuvalet kağıdı, havlu kağıt, peçete ve endüstriyel rulo gibi ürünlerle hem ekonomik hem hijyenik çözümler sunuyoruz.

Çöp Poşeti Grubu: Farklı ebat ve kalınlıkta, sızdırmaz, yırtılmaya dayanıklı çöp poşetlerimizle atık yönetimini daha kolay ve hijyenik hale getiriyoruz.

Medikal Grubu: Eldiven, maske, bone, önlük, hasta alt bezi gibi temel medikal sarf ürünleriyle sağlık sektörüne kaliteli ve güvenilir ürün tedariki sağlıyoruz.

Kalite, süreklilik ve müşteri memnuniyetini esas alarak; ihtiyaca özel çözümlerle iş ortaklarımızın her zaman yanındayız. Hijyenin her alanında güvenin olduğu yerdeyiz!

Name: 1XChem
Description:
Our Story:
While dealing with the current industry we have faced few glitches of the chemical industry in a short period of time. Issues with material purity, delayed deliveries, and difficulties with returns and payments. By addressing these problems head-on, we aim to revolutionize the industry and provide a platform that meets the needs and expectations of businesses.

Our Vision:
At 1XChem, we're on a mission to revolutionize the chemical industry. Our vision is to build an e-commerce platform that places trust and reliability at the center of every transaction. We want to empower businesses to thrive in a competitive market.

Our Mission:
We're committed to overcoming industry challenges, including trust issues, transportation delays, and material sourcing concerns. Our focus is on creating a transparent, reliable, and efficient e-commerce platform for sourcing and supplying raw materials.

What Sets Us Apart
1XChem's success is built on significantly reducing the risk of financial fraud. We connect verified suppliers with discerning buyers, ensuring materials meet the required purity standards. If quality is compromised, we offer a fair returns and refund policy.
By partnering with reliable logistics providers and offering real-time tracking, we provide visibility and efficiency in operations. We aim to create a lasting impact in the chemical industry by establishing a trusted platform for businesses to thrive.

Join Us:
1XChem is about revolutionizing chemical sourcing. Join us in creating a simplified, efficient solution for your raw material needs. Together, we'll shape the future of the industry.

Name: Goyal International - Chemical Wholesaler
Description:
Founded in August 2019 by industry veteran Ravinder Goyal, Goyal International is a fast-growing chemical wholesale and distribution company specializing in preservatives, additives, pigments, and dyes. After more than 30 years at Sudarshan Chemical Industries, Ravinder brought his deep technical expertise and long-standing industry relationships into building a company centered on quality, reliability, and customer partnership.

Despite the global supply challenges of 2020, Goyal International continued to grow—expanding to a team of professionals and earning the trust of manufacturers across sectors such as plastics, coatings, inks, textiles, and cosmetics.

Drawing on experience shaped within one of the world’s most respected pigment manufacturers, we offer a comprehensive portfolio that includes:
	•	Dry-film and Wet-state preservatives for protection against fungi and microorganisms
	•	Paint & coating additives for improved performance, durability, and application
	•	Organic & inorganic pigments
	•	High-performance pigments
	•	Pearlescent/effect pigments
	•	Solvent dyes & specialty colorants

We prioritize products that meet global quality, regulatory, and safety standards, enabling customers to achieve consistent, reliable results in their formulations.

At Goyal International, we believe chemical distribution goes beyond supply. Our team provides technical guidance, procurement support, regulatory clarity, and application insight to ensure customers choose the right solutions for their specific needs.

Name: RS Bulk Propane Inc
Description:
RS Bulk Propane is a proudly Canadian-owned, family-operated bulk propane supplier delivering safe, reliable, and affordable propane solutions across Ontario 

Whether you're heating a home, powering a business, or fueling a job site, our experienced team of local gas technicians, delivery drivers, and support staff ensures seamless service—every step of the way 

What Sets Us Apart

Generous Welcome Offer: Ask us for the specials

Smart Monitoring & Delivery: The ReST remote sensor app lets you track your tank levels in real time and set reminders. Pair it with our Auto-Fill Automatic Delivery to eliminate the worry of running out 

Flexible Delivery Options: Choose Auto-Fill or take control with our Will-Call delivery program—especially handy if you prefer to schedule based on real-time needs 

Propane for Every Need: From homes and new-builds to commercial buildings and construction sites, we provide a full range of solutions. This includes equipment sizing, temporary construction heating, tank installations, and safety inspections 

Wide Variety of Equipment: We offer everything from standard tanks to powerful construction heaters—like salamanders, direct-fired, indirect-fired, radiant, and convection heaters—to keep job sites warm, safe, and productive 

As a founding member of the Ontario Propane Association and a member of the Canadian Propane Association, RS Bulk Propane is deeply committed to upholding the highest standards in service and safety

Name: Tecnogrease Lubrificantes Especiais
Description:
Desde 1996, a TECNOGREASE se destaca como referência no mercado de lubrificantes industriais de alta performance, oferecendo soluções especializadas para os exigentes setores alimentício e têxtil. Nosso portfólio abrange uma vasta gama de produtos, incluindo óleos, graxas especiais e lubrificantes sintéticos de última geração, projetados para otimizar a eficiência energética e minimizar o tempo de inatividade (downtime) em seus equipamentos.

Comprometidos com a excelência, possuímos a certificação ISO-9001, que atesta a qualidade de nossos processos, e nossos produtos são aprovados pela NSF, garantindo a segurança e a conformidade, especialmente em ambientes com potencial contato alimentar. Nossas formulações avançadas são desenvolvidas para minimizar o desgaste e o atrito, maximizando a confiabilidade e a vida útil dos seus equipamentos. Por exemplo, nossas graxas para rolamentos operam em uma ampla faixa de temperatura, garantindo a lubrificação ideal mesmo em condições extremas.

Nossa equipe de especialistas oferece consultoria personalizada, trabalhando em estreita colaboração com você para criar soluções de lubrificação eficientes, sustentáveis e economicamente vantajosas. Um exemplo prático: a seleção do lubrificante correto para um redutor industrial não apenas reduz o consumo de energia, mas também aumenta significativamente a durabilidade do equipamento, diminuindo custos de manutenção e paradas não programadas. A escolha de um óleo sintético com alta estabilidade térmica, por exemplo, pode reduzir a formação de verniz e borra, prolongando a vida útil do óleo e do equipamento.

Escolha a Tecnogrease como sua parceira em lubrificação industrial e garanta proteção superior, máxima eficiência e um excelente retorno do investimento em suas operações industriais. Nossos lubrificantes ajudam a otimizar o desempenho de seus equipamentos, reduzir custos operacionais e aumentar a produtividade.

Name: Baselube
Description:
%100 Türk sermayesiyle kurulan Baselube, madeni yağ ve gres üretimi alanında yüksek teknoloji, güçlü Ar-Ge ve kalite odaklı üretim anlayışıyla faaliyet göstermektedir. Sanayinin tüm ihtiyaçlarına cevap verebilecek geniş ürün yelpazemizle; otomotivden inşaata, metal işlemeden gıdaya kadar birçok sektöre yüksek performanslı çözümler sunuyoruz.

Modern üretim tesislerimizde, uluslararası standartlara uygun şekilde geliştirdiğimiz ürünlerimiz, makine ve ekipmanların maksimum verimlilikle çalışmasını sağlar; bakım maliyetlerini azaltarak operasyonel sürekliliği destekler.

Yerli üretimi önceleyen yaklaşımımızla, yurt içi ve yurt dışı pazarlarda güçlü bir oyuncu olmayı hedefliyor, sürdürülebilir başarıyı kaliteli ürün, teknik destek ve müşteri memnuniyeti ile birleştiriyoruz.

Name: Chemics ECO CLEANERS GmbH
Description:
Wir sind Spezialist in Sachen Reinigung und haben in den letzten 30 Jahren eine beachtliche Produktpalette von mehr als 400 Reinigern für den Industrie- und privaten Bereich entwickelt. 
Uns war es dabei wichtig den gesamten Prozess zu steuern: Produktfindung, Kreation und Herstellung.

Auf Nachfrage unserer Kunden durften wir uns vor über 20 Jahren in eine neue Richtung weiterentwickeln. Wir spezialisierten uns auf hochwertige Arbeitsschutzkleidung die hält was sie verspricht. 
Unsere Kunden sind bis heute begeistert von sicherer Ausrüstung, die sowohl zweckmäßig als auch komfortabel ist. 
Denn wir sind bedacht auf die langfristige Gesundheit ihrer Mitarbeiter.

Name: Labnation India Pvt Limited
Description:
Labnation India is a company that provides laboratory equipment, chemicals, and turnkey projects for various industries. The company was founded in 2018 and has registered under the START UP policy in DIPP for manufacturing and supplier of clean room equipment, turnkey projects, laboratory equipment, and chemicals. Labnation India has an ISO 9001:2015 certification and has a diverse product range that covers equipment like air handling systems, bio safety cabinets, air shower curtains, molecular lab/histopathology/analytical lab and service providers in the country including infrastructure.

Labnation India has a strong network of well-established Indian and multinational principals such as Thermo Fisher Scientific, Prome Labs, Envision Biotech, Pharma Tech Engineers, Labconco, Vishnu Traders, and many more. The company sources its products from trusted vendors of the industry who use high quality raw material and advanced technology to manufacture them. The products are tested by the vendor's quality experts against various quality parameters to ensure their durability, light-weight, easy installation, high strength, corrosion resistance, and dimensional accuracy.

Labnation India also offers custom products and services to meet the specific requirements of its customers. The company has expertise in providing turnkey projects for clean room, lab furniture, animal house, BSL laboratory, and other infrastructure facilities. 

Labnation India also offers a wide range of laboratory chemicals and reagents from reputed brands such as Fisher Scientific Chemical, Rankem Chemical, Acros Organic Chemical, etc. The company ensures that its chemicals have longer shelf life, reliability, and accurate compositions.

Name: Sandrine Corpor
Description:
Since 1948, Sandrine Corporation has
been the trusted, reliable solution to
recycling and eliminating unused,
surplus chemicals and overstocked materials.
With a renewed emphasis on effectively
recycling generic pharmaceuticals and organic
compounds, Sandrine Corporation partners
with chemical manufacturers to find effective
alternatives to finding new uses for these
materials. Sandrine Corporation solves the
dilemma related to dumping, disposing and
destroying unwanted chemicals for manufacturers that are dealing with a surplus. Instead
of risking the harm that can be caused to the
environment, Sandrine Corporation is able to
provide better and more effective solutions.
Sandrine Corporation is an independent
company with roots in the U.S. chemical industry
for 72 years. Located in Boca Raton in South
Florida, Sandrine Corporation specializes in
recycling unused and unwanted materials via
streamlined approaches that create a win-win
solution for supplier and recycler.
Their primary method of operation is to try
to find additional or alternative uses for materials
that are considered to be in excess. Since 1948,
Sandrine Corporation has saved and repurposed
more than 40,000 tons
of chemical products
by purchasing and
recycling them to the
appropriate sources.
The concept of
effectively recycling
unused product is
not a new one. Over time, it has been proven to
be one of the best ways to minimize waste and
reduce the potential for any negative effect on
the environment. Not only is recycling unused
products a sound time-tested approach, but it
keeps in step with most current strategies.
Sandrine Corporation is one of the leading
corporations in investment recovery, focusing
on buying and selling overstock chemicals,
pharmaceuticals, polymers, intermediates
and additives. This is an advantage to both
manufacturers and purchasers. Manufacturers
are able to sell products that would otherwise
be wasted and unused. Purchasers are able to
acquire products at more affordable

Name: Micro Pak BD
Description:
Micro-Pak is the leading supplier of sustainable anti-mold and moisture control products to global brands and retailers. 

Our products are now used inside the packaging of over 2 billion consumer goods every year in a diverse range of industries including but not limited to footwear, apparel, accessories, furniture, toys, food and many others.

Technical Services

In addition to products we offer unrivalled technical services including factory audits, training, and mold testing to help vendors eliminate mold and moisture issues from the point of production. Micro-Pak technicians based in China, Vietnam, India, Bangladesh and the USA conduct over 3,500 factory audits every year in over 15 countries.

Sustainability Commitment

Our commitment to sustainability is reflected in our best-in-class products which include:

a.	Anti-microbial stickers, sheets and polybags with up to 100% post-consumer recycled LDPE
b.	A plastic-free, natural and biodegradable alternative to silica gel desiccants
c.	Container desiccants with 100% recycled materials

We also operate The Micro-Pak Plastic Recycling Factory in Hubei, China which has the capacity to recycle over 10 metric tonnes of plastic per day. This initiative enables Micro-Pak and our customers to achieve important plastic-reduction goals:

1.	Remove at least 5X as much plastic from the waste stream each year than the amount of plastic we create, thereby exceeding plastic neutrality as a business.

2.	Transform plastic waste into the highest quality, GRS-certified 100% post-consumer recycled resin that we will use in our own products and make available to other manufacturers.

3.	Offer plastic off-set credits to customers that use our plastic-based products, which renders them plastic-neutral.

Name: Ziemer Chromatographie GmbH
Description:
Die Ziemer Chromatographie GmbH wurde 1984 als Handels- und Beratungsunternehmen für Verbrauchmaterialien der Instrumentellen Analytik, vorzugsweise chromatographische Methoden, in Mannheim gegründet.

Im Jahre 1993 erfolgte die Angliederung einer Produktionsabteilung für die Herstellung von Polyurethan-Schaumstofffiltern (PUF) für die Gasprobennahme. PU-Filter werden in vielen Abmessungen sowohl ungereinigt als auch in gereinigter Form hergestellt und geliefert. 2001 erfolgte die Sitzverlegung nach Langerwehe/Kreis Düren, wo das Unternehmen auch heute noch beheimatet ist.

Ab 01.01.2018 gehört auch die Marke „A-Z Analytik Zubehör“, ehemals mit Sitz in Langen, mit Ihrem umfangreichen Lieferprogramm an Verbrauchsmaterialien und Zubehör für die Chromatographie zum Unternehmen.

Das Gesamtlieferprogramm beinhaltet die marktüblichen Trennsäulen für chromatographische Methoden wie GC, GPC, LC, HPLC und UHPLC sowie Kapillar-Elektrophorese (CE) aller bekannten Hersteller. Ein umfangreiches Sortiment an Verbrauchsmaterialien und Zubehörteilen rundet das Programm ab.

Die Ziemer Chromatographie GmbH ist u. a. autorisierter Fachhändler für Produkte führender internationaler Hersteller im Bereich Analytik, wie z.B. IDEX (Upchurch Scientific, Rheodyne), Trajan/SGE Analytical Science, CRS – Chromatography Research Supplies, Kimble-Kontes und andere. Eine ausführliche Aufstellung der in- und ausländischen Partnerfirmen finden Sie in unserem aktuellen Hauptkatalog.

أولاً ( منتجات تربو ماكس)

تربو فوكس:-

تربو بروما:-
مكعبات تعمل على القضاء على الفئران

المنتج عباره عن معطر جو , فاهو يضفي رائحة زكية على الأماكن العامة وفي المنازل والمكاتب والصالات الكبيرة والفنادق، والسيارات وتعطي إحساساً بالرقي والأمل وتخلق جواً من الألفة الروحية مع المكان، ورغم استخداماتها المتعددة والتي تتلخص في تغيير رائحة المكان واستبدالها برائحة مقبولة وجميلة، معطر جو فريدا من نوعها
انوع المعطارات :-

Name: Trubac (Pty) Ltd
Description:
The world is now transitioning from utilizing chemical means of activities to a more biologically sustainable “green” approach.

Traditional chemical processes and products were implemented for various applications; however, the ever-increasing threat to the environment is real. And therefore, more eco-friendly processes that drive the initiative of saving the world’s natural resources must become the norm.

Trubac supplies a wide range of eco-friendly biological products that are sold in the water treatment and industrial markets. However, our products find application across a wide range of sectors and customer segments such as corporates and the public sector, rural sanitation, and domestic users. 

Our products and processes encourage water treatment in the urban but especially the rural sector which was identified as one of the country's priority needs. These include sewage treatment, rural sanitation, aquaculture, and agriculture products as well as a diverse range of eco-friendly, biodegradable cleaning products.

The cutting-edge technology, using indigenous beneficial bacteria, efficient production systems, and a lower-cost local manufacturing base, gives us a competitive advantage to meet customer needs. The proprietary formulation technology and agile product development approach allow us to supply stable products of different formats to meet individual customer needs. Trubac applies eco-friendliness to all processes involved in the development and production of our products, besides all the ingredients used in the products being biodegradable our packaging system allows for recyclability by employing refillable vessels to save on the use of excessive plastic.

Name: İkram Kimya

Ikram Kimya, kimya sektöründe hammadde tedariği, üretim, depolama ve nakliye konusunda uzmanlaşmış bir firmadır. Müşterilerimize kaliteli, çeşitli ve yenilikçi kimyasal hammaddelerin sağlanması konusunda taahhütte bulunuyoruz.

Firmamız, geniş bir ürün yelpazesiyle endüstriyel kimya, ara malzemeler ve özel üretim kimyasalları, arıtma kimyasalları gibi çeşitli sektörler için hammadde tedariki sağlamaktadır. Kimya endüstrisindeki yenilikleri takip ederek, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına uygun çözümler sunmayı hedefliyoruz.

Tedarik zincirimizdeki güvenilir ve kaliteli tedarikçiler sayesinde, müşterilerimize yüksek standartlarda hammadde seçenekleri sunuyoruz. Sektördeki gelişmeleri yakından takip ederek, müşterilerimizin rekabet avantajını artırmalarına destek oluyoruz.

Müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımızla, iş ortaklarımızın ihtiyaçlarını anlamak ve onlara en uygun çözümleri sunmak için çalışıyoruz. Hammadde satışı ve satın alımı alanında uzmanlaşmış ekibimiz, sektördeki değişen talepleri karşılamak adına sürekli olarak çözüm odaklı bir yaklaşım benimsemektedir.

Müşteri memnuniyetini ön planda tutarak, şeffaf ve güvenilir iş ilişkileri kurmayı ve sürdürmeyi amaçlıyoruz. Profesyonel ekibimiz ve sektördeki deneyimimizle, hammadde tedariki konusunda güvenilir bir iş ortağı olmak için sürekli çaba sarf ediyoruz.

Ikram Kimya olarak, müşterilerimize kalite, güvenilirlik ve çözüm odaklı yaklaşımımızla değer katmayı ve sektördeki lider konumumuzu sürdürmeyi hedefliyoruz.

Name: Luhns 1869 Care GmbH
Description: Met Luviran biedt Luhns 1869 Care GmbH duurzame bescherming en zeer effectieve zorg. Zo zet Luhns 1869 Care GmbH de merkgeschiedenis van meer dan 150 jaar voort: Luhns werd in 1869 door August Luhns en Theodor Leyerer opgericht als de "eerste elektrisch aangedreven en grootste zeepfabriek in Duitsland". De zeepfabrikant ontwikkelde zich tot een merkproducent en begeleidde generaties in Duitsland met de reclameslogan "De rode band staat voor het merk Luhns". In de loop van de tijd hebben de Luhns-merken zich ook internationaal gevestigd en zijn ze synoniem geworden met de hoogste kwaliteit. Het productassortiment groeide ook gestaag tot het wasmiddelen en schoonmaakproducten, lichaams- en haarverzorging en huishoudelijke en hygiëneartikelen omvatte. In de geest van deze traditie werd in 2020 met Luviran een lijn van zeer effectieve desinfectieproducten gecreëerd, die op innovatieve wijze inspelen op de hygiëne- en zorgbehoeften die ontstaan tijdens de SARS CoV 2-pandemie: duurzame bescherming en zeer effectieve zorg. Kenmerken/essentiële eigenschappen van Luviran met blijvende relevantie.

we identify problems first, then engineer the chemistry that solves them cleanly, efficiently and safely.

Performance, Reliability and Precision.
For operators and industries where failure is not an option.

Name: Faser Kimya
Description:
Faser Kimya, 2025 yılında Konya’da kurulmuş, kökleri bir asrı aşkın süreye dayanan bir ticari mirasın temsilcisidir. Hikayemiz 1920 yılında Konya’da ‘’Toptan ve Perakende Bakkaliye’’ olarak başlamıştır. Ailemiz, nesiller boyu ticaretle iç içe büyüyerek; 1940'lı yıllarda toptan gıda ticaretine, 1990'larda ise yerel ve uluslararası markaların distribütörlüğüne yöneldi.

1997 yılında Konya-Adana çevre yolundaki modern tesis yatırımıyla birlikte distribütörlük sistemine yeni firmalar ekleyerek yoluna devam eden firmanın yönetimine 2008 yılında dördüncü kuşak katıldı. 2015'te plastik enjeksiyon sektörüne adım atan firmamız, yurtiçinde önde gelen süt ve gıda üreticilerine, ayrıca uluslararası büyük firmalara özel ürünler üreterek önemli başarılara imza attı.

Tüm bu tecrübe ve güvenin üzerine inşa ettiğimiz Faser Kimya, 2025 itibarıyla yem katkı ürünleri, mandıra ve çiftlik grubu hammaddeleri alanında faaliyet göstermeye başlamıştır. Kaliteyi ve güveni esas alarak; yem fabrikaları, çiftlikler ve hammadde tüccarlarına, hem yurt içinde hem yurt dışında hizmet veriyoruz.

 Firmamız, hayvancılık sektöründe sürdürülebilir verimlilik ve sağlıklı üretim anlayışıyla, uzman kadromuz ve bilimsel altyapımızla, hayvan sağlığını ve performansını artırmaya yönelik çözümler geliştiriyor.

Ürün portföyümüzde; yem katkı ürünleri, mandıra grubu ürünleri ve çiflik hammaddeleri yer almaktadır. İlk olarak enerji dengesini optimize eden Fraksiyonize By-Pass Yağ ve Kalsiyum Sabunu gibi rumen korumalı yağlar, genç hayvanların sağlıklı gelişimi için özel formüle edilmiş yüksek oranda süt tozu ve probiyotik içeren Buzağı Maması da ürün grubumuzdadır. 

Hayvanların sindirim sistemini destekleyen Rumen Modülatörü, Canlı Maya ve İnaktif Maya gibi ürünlerle, ruminant sağlığına katkı sağlıyoruz. Ayrıca, yem kalitesini artırmak ve mikotoksin risklerini azaltmak amacıyla Toksin Bağlayıcı çözümler sunuyoruz.

Endüstriyel tutkal sektöründe dünya devlerinden biri olan Jowat'ın bölge distribütörlüğü ile başlayan yolculuğu uygulamaya yönelik olarak daha farklı çözümler sunabileceği farklı markaları da bünyesine katması ile devam etmiştir.

 

2019 yılından beri kendi formülasyonlarını kendisi gibi üstün kalite anlayışına sahip üreticilerde fason ürettirip SENTA markası ile müşterilerine sunmaktadır.

 

2021 yılı ile birlikte tutkalın yanında müşterilerinin ihtiyaç duyduğu bazı hammaddeleri de portföyüne dahil etmeye başlamış ve bu kapsamda müşterilerine sunduğu ürün ve hizmetleri çeşitlendirmiştir. Bu yöndeki büyümesine de piyasa ihtiyaçları ve teknolojik ilerlemeler doğrultusunda devam etme kararlılığındadır.

 

Portföyünde yer alan yapıştırıcılar, sızdırmazlık ürünleri, fonksiyonel kaplamalar ve hammaddeler ile müşterilerine rekabet avantajı ve eşsiz bir müşteri deneyimi vermeye hazırdır. Yaratıcı düşünce ve girişimci ruh firmanın DNA’sının ayrılmaz bir parçasıdır.

 

Müşteriyi odağına alan ve toplam kalite yönetimi anlayışına sahip tecrübeli kadrosuyla müşteri memnuniyetini hedefleyen firmamız sizin de çözüm ortağınız olmaktan gurur duyacaktır.

Name: Ammonia Supplies Corporation Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Officially established in Mumbai, ASCO Group has been a cornerstone of the ammonia trading industry since 1938. From its humble beginnings, the company has grown to become the largest retailer of ammonia in India, emphasizing customer service and support.

With a commitment to excellence, ASCO made significant strides in the industry. In 1972, it set up the first ammonia bottling plant in Bombay and initiated liquor ammonia manufacturing units. Today, the group operates 14 bottling stations across India, spanning from Chandigarh to Coimbatore and Mumbai to Kolkata.

Adhering to strict government standards, ASCO ventured into self-manufacturing of cylinders and tankers in 1977, complete with welding and radiography facilities. Producing 1600 cylinders and 5 tankers of various capacities annually, ASCO has continuously improved operational efficiency while prioritizing quality and safety. The company proudly holds approvals from the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) and the Chief Controller of Explosives under the Department of Explosives, attesting its achievements.

With a strong work culture and a goal-driven approach, ASCO continues to learn and excel. The company's esteemed customer base serves as its guiding light, driving its commitment to meet future demand with unwavering dedication and a welcoming smile.

Name: Pool-Chlor-Shop GmbH
Description:
Der Pool-Chlor-Shop ist ein führender Online-Shop für Pools, Chlor und Zubehör, der hochwertige Produkte für Privat- und Geschäftskunden anbietet. Unser Sortiment umfasst Pools in verschiedenen Größen und Ausführungen, Poolchemikalien wie Chlor und pH-Regulatoren sowie eine breite Palette an Zubehör, einschließlich Poolabdeckungen, Reinigungsgeräten und Filteranlagen. Wir legen großen Wert auf Qualität und Kundenzufriedenheit und bieten umfassenden Service und Beratung, um sicherzustellen, dass Ihre Poolanlage optimal funktioniert. Vertrauen Sie auf unsere langjährige Erfahrung und unser engagiertes Team, um Ihr perfektes Pool-Erlebnis zu gewährleisten.

Unser Expertenteam steht Ihnen mit Rat und Tat zur Seite, von der Planung und Auswahl der richtigen Poolprodukte bis hin zur Pflege und Wartung Ihrer Anlage. Wir verstehen, dass ein Pool nicht nur ein Ort zum Schwimmen ist, sondern auch ein Ort der Entspannung und Freude für die ganze Familie. Daher bieten wir maßgeschneiderte Lösungen, die genau auf Ihre Bedürfnisse abgestimmt sind.

Zusätzlich zu unserem umfangreichen Produktangebot bieten wir auch wertvolle Tipps und Ratschläge zur Poolpflege in unserem Blog. Hier finden Sie Informationen zu Themen wie der richtigen Wasserpflege, der Vermeidung von Algenbildung und der optimalen Nutzung Ihrer Poolausrüstung. Unser Ziel ist es, dass Sie das ganze Jahr über kristallklares Wasser und eine einwandfreie Poolanlage genießen können.

Für weitere Informationen besuchen Sie uns auf pool-chlor-shop.de. Tauchen Sie ein in die Welt der Pools und genießen Sie erstklassigen Service und Produkte, die das ganze Jahr über für Wohlfühlmomente sorgen. Lassen Sie sich von uns inspirieren und machen Sie Ihren Pool zu einem Highlight in Ihrem Zuhause.

Description:

Beyond just selling products, we are committed to exceptional customer service and helping our customers find the right solutions for their specific odor challenges. Whether you need expert advice or product recommendations, we are here to help.

Odor Supply House was founded by a team of odor control experts who saw a clear need for reliable, high-performance odor removal solutions. With years of experience in the industry, we committed ourselves to sourcing and developing products that deliver real results—because you deserve better than just masking odors.

We know that dealing with persistent odors can be frustrating, whether at home, in your car, or at your business. That’s why we focus on more than just selling products—we’re here to help you find the right solution for your needs. Our team is always available to provide guidance, support, and expertise so you can eliminate odors quickly and effectively.

Yaw Hygiene imports & wholesales a range of water soluble sachet & cleaning tablets for Motels, Hotels, Cafes, Rest Homes, Building Service Contractors, Offices, Industrial & Commercial Businesses, Service Stations - in fact for any end-user that requires commercial cleaning products. 
Why buy bulky, cumbersome 5 & 20L liquid cleaning products when you can now use water soluble cleaning sachets & tablets. Add water at the point of use - NOT the point of manufacture.

Cost Effective – Eliminates staff over-use of conventional products. Ensures cost-of-clean management.     Enhanced and consistent results via controlled dosing. 

Convenient – Easy to use. No messy dispensing systems. Simplifies staff training.

Storage – Reduces storage by up to 70% when space is often at a premium. Less space on housekeeping trolleys.

Safety – Eliminates heavy lifting of containers, dangerous mixing and decanting, reduces spill risks and injury.

Environment – All products biodegradable, 70-80% reduction in container waste. reduced rubbish costs.

Bảo vệ môi trường là bảo vệ sự sống trên hành tinh.

Việt Nhật Xanh được cấp phép thành lập ngày 26 tháng 03 năm 2025 với ngành nghề kinh doanh chính là mua bán hóa chất công nghiệp chuyên xử lý chất thải công nghiệp, phục vụ sản xuất công nghiệp với quy mô và số lượng lớn.

Để có khả năng cung cấp số lượng lớn hóa chất thì Việt Nhật Xanh có nhà máy sản xuất hóa chất hợp pháp tại Việt Nam, có hệ thống kho bãi và các đội tàu, đội xe vận chuyển.

Với đội ngũ nhân sự là các chuyên gia hàng đầu trong ngành hóa chất kết hợp với hệ thống nhân viên, chuyên viên trẻ nhiều nhiệt huyết, chúng tôi đã xây dựng nguyên tắc chuẩn như sau:
- Đáp ứng chính xác nhu cầu của khách hàng.
- Đảm bảo chất lượng và số lượng hàng hóa.
- Cam kết về tiến độ sản xuất và giao nhận hàng hóa.
- Nhân viên tư vấn nhiệt tình, chu đáo với thái độ nhanh nhẹn, hòa nhã.
- Luôn luôn đồng hành và thấu hiểu khách hàng.

Stóra og breiða vøruúrval okkara umfatar m.a. ymisk evni til reingerð, yvirflatuviðgerð og verju. Ymisk avfeittingarevni, smyrjievni, lím, tape, tettingartilfar, amboð, el-útgerð og ljósskipanir.

Tú sparir tíð og pening við vørum okkara, tí brúksumráðið á teimum er stórt. Tískil gerst goymslan minni og lættari verður at halda skil á.

Sum kundi hjá okkum vilt tú uppliva at vit leggja dent á:

Góðsku
Ráðgeving
Personligt samband
Skjóta levering
Um búmerkið

Kjarnuvirðini hjá TOPTEK eru góðska, trygd og umhvørvið og hetta sæst aftur í búmerkinum.

Bókstavurin O brýtur frá hinum og er samansettur av ymsum myndum. Sjálvur formurin er ein rundingur, sum vísur á, at vit fevna víða og røkka út til allar vinnur og heim í samfelagnum. Dropin ímyndar ymisk evni, oljur, sápur og vatn. Eisini eitt blað sæst, sum vísir á vørur, ið eru umhvørvisvinarligar.

Name: Patio Bright
Description:
Patio Bright is a commercial-grade, water-based concentrate specifically designed for revitalising and cleaning patios and decking areas without the need for jet washing or brushing.

Key Features:
Powerful Cleaning: Patio Bright is formulated with advanced cleaning agents that effectively remove moss, algae, and environmental grime from various patio surfaces.

Concentrated Formula: With its concentrated formulation, Patio Bright offers excellent value for money. A little goes a long way, providing a cost-effective solution for maintaining outdoor spaces.

Safe for pets: The product's formula is designed to be pH neutral, non-toxic, and pet-friendly. However, to ensure safety, keep pets away from the treated area during application and until the surface is completely dry. Following the instructions on the product label will help you achieve a clean patio while keeping your pets safe.

Versatile Application: Patio Bright can be used on a wide range of patio and decking materials, including wood, concrete, stone, and tiles. It is adaptable to different surface types, making it a versatile solution for various outdoor spaces.

Easy to Use: Patio Bright comes in a convenient concentrate form, allowing for easy dilution and application. It can be applied using a spray bottle, pressure washer, or brush, depending on the surface and level of cleaning required.

Target Audience:
Patio Bright is ideal for homeowners, property managers, facility maintenance teams, and anyone seeking a professional-grade solution to restore and maintain their patio and decking areas. It caters to individuals who value the appearance and cleanliness of their outdoor spaces and desire a high-quality product that delivers exceptional results.

Brand and technology accumulation

FEILITE focuses on the research and development of printing inks. Its product range covers diversified fields such as surface printing inks, composite inks, PVC inks, paper inks, environmentally friendly water-based inks, water-based emulsions, and CIJ inkjet printer inks, which fully meet the needs of multiple application scenarios such as packaging printing and industrial printing. Name: Nyusantara
Description:
Indonesia adalah negara yang kaya akan budaya, tradisi, cerita, dan sejarahnya. Dengan salah satu ciri khas yang paling menarik adalah sejarah dan ceritanya yang memiliki begitu banyak pembelajaran dan pengetahuan. Setiap cerita diturunkan dari generasi ke generasi berikutnya. Perkembangan zaman dari waktu ke waktu memberikan banyak dampak, terutama
pada budaya Indonesia yang semakin memudar dimakan waktu, salah satu faktor utamanya yaitu banyak generasi muda yang seharusnya menjadi penerus bangsa dalam melestarikan budaya dan sejarah, enggan untuk mempelajari sejarah nenek moyangnya, apalagi membaca buku sejarah. Minat dan keinginan untuk membaca buku sejarah mulai berkurang. 

Mengapa ini bisa terjadi? sebagian generasi muda menganggap bahwa buku sejarah terlalu membosankan, tidak menarik, dan kuno. Oleh karena itu, Nyusantara hadir, bukan hanya sebagai brand yang memperkenalkan aroma Indonesia, namun juga menyajikan cerita, sejarah, dan budaya indonesia didalamnya, tentu dalam penyajian yang menarik. kami memanfaatkan perkembangan teknologi saat ini untuk memperkenalkan kembali budaya dan cerita kita pada generasi muda, bahkan secara internasional. 

Dari sinilah kami ingin menggabungkan antara ciri khas aroma dan kisah sejarah Nusantara yang terbalut dalam botol parfum yang wangi dan memesona yakni, Nyusantara. Kombinasi dari ‘Nyu’ yang berarti seseorang yang memiliki bakat seni atau menulis dan ‘Nusantara‘ yaitu tanah air kita sendiri. Sekelompok pemuda pemudi yang senang akan bidang seni dan tulisan serta ingin menjaga sejarah-sejarah tanah airnya agar tetap kekal abadi dengan pendekatan modern di era yang juga modern ini.

Name: Dutch Lube Company Limited
Description:
At Dutch Lube Company Limited, we specialize in advanced lubricants engineered for the textile industry and industrial applications worldwide. With a strong commitment to innovation and reliability, we have built our reputation on delivering products that ensure superior machine performance, extended durability, and unmatched washability.

Our lubricants are more than just fluids—they are precision solutions designed to meet the demanding needs of high-speed textile machinery, knitting operations, and modern manufacturing processes. By combining cutting-edge formulations with advanced chemistry, we help our customers achieve smoother production runs, lower downtime, and longer machine life.

Washability is at the heart of our textile oils, ensuring that fabrics remain free of residue and contaminants, while protection against wear, friction, and corrosion safeguards delicate components and high-value equipment. Each drop of Dutch Lube lubricant represents our dedication to quality, efficiency, and sustainability.

Beyond textiles, our range of lubricants extends into automotive, industrial, and specialty sectors, reflecting our vision to be a global partner in performance fluids. Whether it’s supporting a high-output spinning mill, powering precision knitting operations, or protecting engines and industrial machinery, Dutch Lube stands for trust and long-term value.

Our mission is simple yet powerful: to provide reliable lubrication solutions that empower industries to operate at peak performance while reducing costs and ensuring sustainability.

With a forward-looking approach, we continue to invest in research, innovation, and customer partnerships, ensuring that Dutch Lube remains a brand synonymous with performance, protection, and progress.

Name: PCC Morava - Chem s.r.o.
Description:
PCC MORAVA – CHEM s.r.o. byla založena v roce 1992 a vznikla zápisem do obchodního rejstříku Krajského soudu v Ostravě, oddíl C, vložka 5069, dne 11. listopadu 1992. Sídlem společnosti je Český Těšín, Leoše Janáčka 798/20, PSČ 737 01, základní kapitál činí 100 mil. Kč. Jsme součástí nadnárodního holdingu PCC SE se sídlem v Duisburgu (SRN).

PCC MORAVA – CHEM s.r.o. působí na českém i evropském trhu v oblasti chemie, petrochemie, uhlí, koksu a slévárenství a je pro řadu společností dlouhodobým, spolehlivým a kvalitním obchodním partnerem. V roce 2013 společnost vstoupila do oblasti stavebnictví. Pod značkou NEW-THERM SYSTEM nabízí tepelné izolace na bázi tvrdých polyuretanových stavebních desek a pod značkou TERRIX inovativní stavební produkty. Společnost provozuje pod značkou www.distripark.cz e-shop zaměřený na firemní klientelu i širokou veřejnost. Za dobu své existence se PCC MORAVA – CHEM s.r.o. stala stabilní konsolidovanou společností.
Praktické zkušenosti z oblasti obchodu, dlouholeté kontakty s předními západo – i východoevropskými výrobci a jejich výhradními zástupci, stejně jako přítomnost reprezentantů holdingu v jednotlivých státech představují jedinečné know-how, které je nezbytnou základnou a předpokladem pro rozvoj našich aktivit.

Jsme progresivní, tržně orientovaná společnost s individuálním přístupem ke každému zákazníkovi.

Name: EcoShieldChem
Description:
Company Overview: EcoShieldChem is a leading provider of innovative dust suppressant solutions, committed to environmental sustainability and superior dust control. Established with a vision to create cleaner and safer environments, we specialize in the development and distribution of eco-friendly chemicals that effectively suppress dust across various industries.
Mission Statement: At EcoShieldChem, our mission is to offer cutting-edge dust suppressant technologies that not only meet the highest industry standards but also prioritize environmental responsibility. We strive to contribute to a healthier planet by providing sustainable solutions for dust control without compromising performance.
Product Portfolio: Our product line comprises a range of advanced dust suppressant chemicals designed to address the unique challenges of diverse industries. From construction sites to mining operations and agricultural settings, EcoShieldChem products are formulated to deliver effective and long-lasting dust control, promoting safety and sustainability.
Key Features of EcoShieldChem Products:
•	Environmentally Friendly Formulas: Our products are engineered with a focus on eco-conscious formulations, ensuring minimal impact on the environment.
•	High Performance: EcoShieldChem products excel in providing efficient dust suppression without compromising on effectiveness.
•	Long-lasting Effects: Our chemicals are designed to create a lasting barrier against dust, reducing the need for frequent applications and ensuring prolonged protection.
Industry Applications: EcoShieldChem caters to a wide range of industries where dust control is paramount, including:
•	Construction
•	Mining
•	Agriculture
•	Road Maintenance
•	Industrial Facilities
Environmental Stewardship: As a responsible business, EcoShieldChem is committed to environmental stewardship. Our manufacturing processes prioritize sustainability, and we continuously explore eco-friendly alternatives to enhance our product line.

블랑디바는 안앤케이글로벌이 선보이는 영코어 감성 뷰티 브랜드로, **“취향의 다양성”과 “표현의 자”**를 핵심 가치로 합니다. “취향의 모양은 다양하니까”라는 슬로건과 let you be you라는 태그라인 아래, 개성과 스타일을 자롭게 드러낼 수 있는 뷰티 아이템을 제안하며 10‧20대 소비자들의 취향을 사로잡고 있습니다.

뉴베러는 파인드디앤서가 전개하는 건강기능식품 브랜드로, 트렌디하고 키치한 무드를 바탕으로 10‧20대의 라이프스타일에 맞춘 이너뷰티 솔루션을 제공합니다. 특히 인플루언서를 통한 공동구매 방식으로 빠른 화제성과 충성 고객층을 확보하며, 매번 “새롭고 재미있는 소비 경험”을 만들어내고 있습니다.

뉴니크는 뉴베러와 함께 파인드디앤서가 운영하는 또 다른 이너뷰티 브랜드로, 이름 그대로 새롭고 독창적인(Unique) 콘셉트를 중심에 둡니다. 건강기능식품을 단순한 보충제가 아니라, 나만의 개성과 취향을 담을 수 있는 라이프스타일 아이템으로 풀어내며 차별화된 시장 포지셔닝을 구축하고 있습니다.

Name: EMS Slovenija
Description:
Hitro, učinkovito in varno industrijsko čiščenje za podjetja, ki ne sprejemajo kompromisov

Pri EMS Slovenija verjamemo, da lahko industrijsko čiščenje združi moč, hitrost in varnost. Naša patentirana tehnologija, razvita v ZDA, omogoča, da podjetja dosežejo vrhunske rezultate brez korozije, brez nevarnosti za opremo in ljudi.

Več kot 20 let izkušenj nas je vodilo k temu, da EMS čistila uporabljajo vrhunska podjetja po svetu in v regiji, med njimi NASA, US Coast Guard, Doka, Volvo in Mack. Smo zanesljiv partner podjetjem v Sloveniji, Hrvaški, Italiji in Avstriji, ki iščejo rešitve za hitro, učinkovito in trajnostno čiščenje industrijskih površin, strojev in vozil.

Naše vrednote so jasne: rezultat, zaupanje in odgovornost. Z EMS čistili omogočamo podjetjem, da delo opravijo hitreje, varneje in z minimalnim vplivom na okolje, hkrati pa ohranijo opremo v brezhibnem stanju.

Name: Metalmate
Description:
A Family Owned business, 
Metalmate is sold as a ‘pro-fitted’ product and is applied by the dealership on new and used cars with the potential to sell also on service (as long as the wheels have been thoroughly cleaned prior to applying the product).
KEY SALES POINTS
Customers recognise that alloy wheels get dirty easily and are difficult to clean.
METALMATE treated wheels easily preserve the as new appearance of the wheels.
FAQ’s
1. WHAT IS METALMATE ?
An inert polymer coating that is bonded with the alloy wheel modifying the surface to easy clean .
2. DOES IT ALTER THE APPEARANCE OF THE WHEEL
NO. Metalmate is invisible and will preserve the Alloy wheel, and make it easy clean, guaranteed!
3. HOW LONG WILL IT LAST
The coating is permanent and with simple Aftercare will last the lifetime of the wheel
4. WHAT IS THE AFTERCARE
Metalmate is supplied with an Aftercare Dispenser which is a special blend of detergent and water borne polymers. By rinsing cleaned wheels once or twice a year with Aftercare the polymers will find and repair any unseen damage and maintain optimum performance of the coating.
5. DOES A BUILD UP OCCUR
NO. The polymers will only bond with the exposed surface of the alloy wheel .
6. DOES THE COATING VISIBLY DETERIORATE
NO. Unlike waxes or unbound silicones which rely upon mechanical adhesion and soon dissipate resulting in an irregular appearance and should be completely removed before re application, Metalmate is chemically reacted with the wheel surface to provide a uniform permanent coating.
7. DO AUTOMATIC CAR WASHES DAMAGE THE COATING
No. In fact they become more efficient at cleaning the wheels.
8. IS IT EASY TO SELL
METALMATE is easily recognised by the customer to be the solution to the easy upkeep of the appearance of their alloy wheels and saves on time and the cost of specialist cleaning products.
Enquiries then please email sales@metalmate.info

For More Information visit www.metalmate.info

Il nostro successo si basa sulla flessibilità, l'affidabilità e la competenza del nostro team di esperti. Jebagro GmbH, che opera nell'ambito della divisione Trading Solutions, è una filiale di Jebsen & Jessen (GmbH & Co.) La nostra organizzazione si avvale di una lunga esperienza internazionale e di una vasta rete di società affiliate, tra cui Jebsen & Co. a Hong Kong e Jebsen & Jessen Southeast Asia con sede a Singapore. Queste società, insieme a Jebsen & Jessen (GmbH & Co.) KG, appartengono al gruppo globale Jebsen & Jessen, che dalla sua fondazione nel 1909 impiega circa 8.000 persone in tutto il mondo.
In qualità di azienda di distribuzione e servizi globale, siamo responsabili in diversi modi: come datore di lavoro, come acquirente e come partner commerciale. Il nostro obiettivo è dare il buon esempio come membro dell'economia globale. Questa convinzione determina le nostre azioni imprenditoriali. Con trasparenza, fiducia e un forte spirito imprenditoriale, ci concentriamo sulla trasformazione della nostra attività.
In Jebagro ci impegniamo a fornire ai nostri clienti soluzioni innovative e affidabili che soddisfino le esigenze in continua evoluzione dell'industria agricola. 
Il nostro impegno per l'innovazione e l'efficienza ci ha permesso di diventare un partner di fiducia per i nostri partner commerciali nel settore agricolo. Con sedi in Europa, Asia, Africa, Australia e un'attenzione particolare ai mercati dell'America Latina e dei Paesi andini, forniamo soluzioni che aiutano a migliorare la resa delle colture e la salute del suolo.

Name: Lifol Austria GmbH

LIFOL ist ein Schutzfilm, der Bakterien, Pilze, Algen und spezielle Viren für ein Jahr um bis zu 99,9% reduziert.

Im Gegensatz zum herkömmlichen Desinfektionsverfahren wird LIFOL nur einmal pro Jahr aufgetragen. 

Hierdurch reduzieren sich die Kosten für Desinfektionsmittel sowie für den Personaleinsatz. 
Durch die nachgewiesene Wirksamkeit kann LIFOL ein zentraler Baustein für Hygienekonzepte im touristischen oder im betrieblichen Umfeld sein. 

Dies schafft ein erhöhtes Wohlbefinden und Sichertheitsgefühl bei Mitarbeitern, Kunden und Gästen.

Name: K-Oil
Description:
Celebrating a decade of specialized expertise, KOSEN ENERGY, an Automotive Lubricant Specialist, is dedicated to advancing research and development initiatives in the dynamic field of lubricants. Skillfully channeling our expertise, we invest in new product inventory and continually upgrade our technology facilities to drive growth within the lubricant market. Our expertise extends across diverse industries, including mining, steel mills, oil and gas, chemical, construction, electronic/electrical, machinery, food, automotive manufacturing, textiles, and more.



At the core of our narrative is the unwavering passion of our founder, Mr. Phua, whose lifelong pursuit was sparked by a profound fascination with machinery. Despite early challenges in the auto parts industry, his spirit remained resilient. A fortuitous encounter with the brilliant Ph.D. Jamie Yeoh, a German chemical engineering expert, opened doors to deep insights into mechanical oil production.



Facing unprecedented challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic, Mr. Phua's vision expanded beyond mere business objectives. He envisioned KOSEN ENERGY not just as a company but as a means to contribute to a world in need. Leveraging innovative technological advancements, K-OIL emerged as a beacon of success in January 2023, making its public debut in July and ushering in a new era of affordable motor oil.



Motivated by a commitment to societal impact, K-OIL stands tall, pledging to revolutionize the affordable motor oil market as a leading Automotive Lubricant Specialist. Through relentless innovation, we commit to elevating product quality, and ensuring the sustainable protection of our customers' assets. Our journey transcends the mere realm of oil; it's a dedicated effort to fortify dreams and safeguard aspirations in the specialized domain of automotive lubricants.

Name: DDDClean
Description:
Sklep, hurtownia i usługi DDDClean.pl

W naszym sklepie klienci znajdą skuteczne środki do deratyzacji, dezynsekcji, dezynfekcji oraz profesjonalne środki czystości, przeznaczone dla szkół, przedszkoli, placówek opieki zdrowotnej, biur, magazynów, garaży czy gospodarstw rolnych. sss
DDDClean to także niezawodny partner w walce z uciążliwymi szkodnikami. Nasz doświadczony zespół specjalistów oferuje skuteczne i kompleksowe usługi DDD, dostosowane do indywidualnych potrzeb naszych klientów. Działamy na terenie całego województwa mazowieckiego, w tym w Warszawie, zapewniając szybkie i efektywne reakcje na problemy związane ze szkodnikami.

Wśród oferowanych produktów dostępne są trutki przeciwko szczurom, myszom i pozostałym gryzoniom, preparaty owadobójcze do stosowania w pomieszczeniach jak i na otwartej przestrzeni, aerozole, opryski przeciwko szkodnikom roślin, a także różnego typu pułapki, w tym lepy, na gryzonie, owady latające, owady biegające i pozostałe szkodniki.

W ofercie wyroby opracowane i wyprodukowane przez czołowych producentów środków dezynsekcyjnych i deratyzacyjnych, których skuteczność działania została wielokrotnie potwierdzona przez profesjonalistów.

DDDClean Mariusz Brzeziński jest autoryzowanym dystrybutorem produktów chemii profesjonalnej marki EILFIX.

Z naszej oferty korzystają podmioty z branży gastronomicznej HoReCa, placówki oświatowe, ośrodki zdrowia, magazyny wielkopowierzchniowe, gospodarstwa rolne, firmy sprzątające oraz klienci indywidualni, którym zależy na skutecznym rozwiązaniu problemu insektów i gryzoni oraz zabezpieczeniu się przed nimi w przyszłości a także na bardzo dobrej  jakości oraz wydajności środków czystości w rozsądnej cenie.

Name: Aravind Enterprises
Description:
Aravind Enterprises is one of South India’s trusted distributors of Givaudan flavours, food ingredients, enzymes, sweeteners and filtration aids, serving both MSME manufacturers and large corporations across the food, beverage and pharma ecosystem.

For over two decades, we have helped brands create great-tasting, stable and cost-efficient products by combining strong sourcing networks with deep technical expertise.
Our portfolio includes Givaudan flavour systems, citric acid, sodium benzoate, sodium citrate, ascorbic acid, sucralose, maltodextrin, modified starches, prebiotic fibres, stabilizers, Radiolite filter aids, Activated Carbon, and a wide range of essential raw materials used across modern manufacturing.

We support customers in beverages, dairy, confectionery, snacks, pulp & fruit processing, distilleries, pharma and nutraceuticals, offering both ingredient supply and end-to-end formulation guidance. Мы предлагаем современные технологии и продукты, направленные на снижение затрат и улучшение результатов наших клиентов.
Наш ассортимент продукции включает (но не ограничивается):
•	Гуаровая камедь: Используется для регулирования реологических свойств жидкостей гидроразрыва пласта, других технических жидкостей, а также в бытовой химии и пищевой промышленности
•	Ксантановая камедь: Применяется для регулирования реологических свойств буровых растворов на водной основе.
•	Стирол-этилен-бутилен-стирольный блок-сополимер (SEBS): Термопластичный эластомер, используемый в качестве адгезива, для создания эластичных изделий или в качестве модификатора для придания эластичности в смесях с другими пластиками.
•	Полианионная целлюлоза (PAC): Доступна в высоковязкой (HV) и низковязкой (LV) формах; применяется для регулирования вязкости и фильтрации буровых растворов на водной основе.
•	Пеногасители: Эффективно удаляют пузырьки и предотвращают образование пены на длительное время, обладая отличной совместимостью с суспензиями.
Наш головной офис находится в Москве, с дополнительными офисами и складами в Екатеринбурге и Тюмени. Мы сотрудничаем с производителями из Индии, Китая, Турции и Тайваня, обеспечивая стабильные поставки высококачественной продукции.
В 2А мы уделяем особое внимание промышленному консалтингу, помогая клиентам в поиске и подборе химического сырья, соответствующего их специфическим потребностям. Мы стремимся предоставлять инновационные решения, способствующие повышению эффективности и успеха в отраслях, которые мы обслуживаем.

Description:
𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗮𝗻 𝗦𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗰 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝘁 | 𝗬𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗻𝗲𝗿 𝗶𝗻 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 & 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀

𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗮𝗻 𝗦𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗰 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝘁 is a 𝘁𝗿𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗻𝗮𝗺𝗲 in the 𝗱𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗯𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗼𝗳 𝗵𝗶𝗴𝗵-𝗾𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗹𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆 𝗶𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀, 𝘀𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗰 𝗲𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗽𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁, and 𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝗮𝗰𝗿𝗼𝘀𝘀 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗮. With a 𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗶𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 to 𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻, 𝗮𝗰𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘆, and 𝘀𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲 𝗲𝘅𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲, we 𝗲𝗺𝗽𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗿 𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗰𝗵 𝗶𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗶𝘁𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀, 𝗽𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗺𝗮𝗰𝗲𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗲𝘀, 𝗮𝗰𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗺𝗶𝗰 𝗹𝗮𝗯𝘀, and 𝗶𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗥&𝗗 𝗰𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘀 with 𝗰𝘂𝘁𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴-𝗲𝗱𝗴𝗲 𝘁𝗼𝗼𝗹𝘀 that fuel 𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘆 and 𝗱𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗹𝗼𝗽𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁.

 𝗪𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗪𝗲 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗲𝗿:

• 𝗟𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆 𝗚𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘀𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲 & 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗰𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲
• 𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼𝘀𝗰𝗼𝗽𝗲𝘀 & 𝗢𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀
• 𝗔𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘆𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀 (𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗽𝗵𝗼𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘀, 𝗽𝗛 𝗠𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘀, 𝗲𝘁𝗰.)
• 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗺𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗦𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗮𝗴𝗲 & 𝗦𝗮𝗳𝗲𝘁𝘆 𝗘𝗾𝘂𝗶𝗽𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁
• 𝗟𝗮𝗯 𝗙𝘂𝗿𝗻𝗶𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲 & 𝗖𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗺 𝗟𝗮𝗯 𝗦𝗲𝘁𝘂𝗽𝘀
• 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗴𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀, 𝗦𝗼𝗹𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀 & 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘀𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲𝘀

 𝗪𝗵𝘆 𝗖𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘀𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗮𝗻 𝗦𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗰 𝗠𝗮𝗿𝘁?

 𝗜𝗦𝗢-𝗖𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗲𝗱 𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝘀
 𝗦𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗰𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗳𝗿𝗼𝗺 𝗚𝗹𝗼𝗯𝗮𝗹𝗹𝘆 𝗥𝗲𝗰𝗼𝗴𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗲𝗱 𝗕𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱𝘀
 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗣𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗻𝗴 & 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗗𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗴
 𝗡𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘄𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝗗𝗲𝗹𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘆 & 𝗥𝗲𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆 
 𝗗𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗦𝘂𝗽𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁

Whether you're 𝗯𝘂𝗶𝗹𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 a 𝗻𝗲𝘄 𝗹𝗮𝗯 or 𝘂𝗽𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗮𝗻 𝗲𝘅𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗼𝗻𝗲, we are your 𝗼𝗻𝗲-𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗽 𝗱𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 for 𝗿𝗲𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝘀𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗰 𝘀𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 that meet both 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 and 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗮𝗿𝗱𝘀.

Name: Aqua Munda Limited
Description:
Our product comprises bioactive stress proteins processed to form tight complexes with surfactants. The synergistic effect on the surfactants creates the power behind the technology of Protein-Surfactant Complex or PSC.

The product is cell free, does not contain any bacteria and is not based on any particular enzymes.

As there are two components working in synergy, so there are two sets of fundamental effects:
- The effectiveness of the surfactant is greatly enhanced by the protein. 
- Reduces the amount of surfactant needed. 
- Dramatically outperforms many harsh cleaners.

It is stable and functional at temperatures in excess of 200° Fahrenheit and retains activity in a broad range of pH 1 to pH13. It is also compatible with some strong oxidants such as Hydrogen Peroxide (over 15%) or Hypochlorite Bleach.

In addition to changing the surface tension, interfacial tension and critical micelle concentration, (up to 2 logs) of many other surfactants, it also converts oils and greases into additional surfactants therefore multiplying the beneficial effects of the product.

It induces bacterial metabolism to accelerate the breakdown by oxidation (digestion) of organic materials such as fats, oils, greases, diesel, crude, etc.  These contaminants are digested more rapidly and completely into carbon dioxide and water.  This is all achieved using the natural resident bacteria (microbes) present in the contaminated environment. As previously stated it contains no added bacteria and produces this biological effect known as the ‘uncoupling of oxidative phosphorylation’. This biological phenomenon causes no disruption to ecosystems and as it is highly biodegradable there is no accumulation in the environment in which it is used.

Name: Raja Ram Rangwala
Description:
Synthetic organic dyes come from cracking crude oil. The specific colors, attributes, and ranges come from chemicals derived from petroleum products. They do not occur in nature, so we categorize them as manmade dyes. “Organic” comes from the idea that they are still derived from organic material, in this case, oil

Dyes are classified according to their solubility and chemical properties. The major classes of dyes are: acid, basic, direct, reactive, vat, disperse, azoic, sulphur, and mordant. Each dye class will dye certain substrates. Some of the dyes will dye specific fibers and some are purified to sell as FD&C dyes. These dyes color food, pharmaceutical products, and cosmetics and are safe for consumption and use on the body.

Specialized in all kind of synthetic organic dyes and chemicals. Feel free to reach out for any queries/questions.
